name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Thanks to pressure, 39 Democratic Representatives changed their votes last week
body:
We need to keep leaning into the bold progressive demands that people want and deserve. | | |
---
Friend, **Last week, the House of Representatives passed HR 9495, a dangerous and unconstitutional bill that would give presidential administrations unchecked power to shut down any nonprofit organizations they disagree with.** This attack on our right to dissent threatens the existence of groups like the NAACP, ACLU, Planned Parenthood, LGBTQ+ or environmental justice organizations, Palestinian human rights groups, or any nonprofit organization critical of government policy—including news outlets and schools. Now we have to make sure this “nonprofit killer” bill doesn’t pass the Senate. **Even while this bill passed the House, 39 Democratic Representatives changed their votes in just one week and voted against this assault on our civil liberties, thanks to their constituents reaching out to them** and pushing back on their previous “yes” votes. This affirms that people have tremendous power to move their government representatives and reminds us how important it is to have elected officials who listen to their constituents. Let’s keep this in mind come mid-January when Republicans control the White House, the House of Representatives, and the Senate: **People will still have power at the local, state, and federal levels.** Transformative change comes when the people demand it, and we cannot stop fighting for the society we need and deserve, where we all have equal rights and freedoms and everyone’s needs are met. **We know that most people want progressive change and are with us** : In at least seven states where Trump got the majority of votes, the majority of voters passed ballot measures to increase the minimum wage, expand paid sick leave, or enshrine the right to abortion in their states’ constitutions.1 In at least five states where Trump got the majority of votes, progressive state Supreme Court justices won against Republican opponents—including two judges I endorsed in my home state of Michigan. This expanded the left’s majority on our state Supreme Court with justices who will enforce our state Constitution’s abortion protections.2 **I created the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to help elect progressive candidates with working class backgrounds who are rooted in their communities and understand their neighbors’ struggles.** These are folks who understand how urgently and desperately their constituents need change, and who aren’t afraid to push for bold progressive policies to make their neighbors’ lives better. Thank you so much. And as a reminder: The presidential election was not a landslide. Even with $200 million from Elon Musk and roughly $2 billion from other far-right billionaires, Trump won less than 50% of the vote. There is no right-wing mandate, only the responsibility we all still have to each other to keep pushing for a better world.
People are understandably afraid about what’s coming with the upcoming presidential administration. I promise I will not back down when it comes to protecting our communities and making sure that our most vulnerable neighbors are safe, seen, and heard.
Always in service,
Rashida

name: RELEASE THE REPORT [FFR]
subject: You're not standing with Jack Smith?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
this can’t be true...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22570%2E4449941%2ETKFolb)
---
Take a look at this, friend: **LAST WEEK,** we sent you a message asking if you support Jack Smith and if you wanted him to release his damning report of Donald Trump.

**YESTERDAY,** we decided to ask again to see if you had missed the email, __but you still hadn’t responded this morning!__

**TODAY,** we’re reaching out again – your response is still missing, **and now we’re wondering if you even support Jack Smith?** **[_Tell them how you feel, friend: Sign our petition to stand with Jack Smith and support the release of the Trump report! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241125_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22570%2E4449941%2ETKFolb)** __ | [STAND WITH JACK SMITH: SUPPORT THE RELEASE OF THE TRUMP REPORT AND SUPPORT DEMOCRATS »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241125_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22570%2E4449941%2ETKFolb)

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=22570%2E4449941%2ETKFolb). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=22570%2E4449941%2ETKFolb).**

name: Fair Fight
subject: Project 2025 attacks the right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
Your donation helps us fight back |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97665314/514182394/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241125_f_EOM1_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZhMmVjOS04ZGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uERyvdBHV4ObOW8KwZDWnGJvf6W3Djlv_lpeCVO2DBM=&emci=b96a2ec9-8dab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=d86a2ec9-8dab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1037277)

| | Under a Trump administration, these threats to our voting rights could become realities:
* Weakening enforcement of laws that protect the freedom to vote;
* Criminalizing parts of the voting process;
* Making it even easier for election disinformation to spread.

Project 2025 is the playbook for the next Trump administration, and it could upend our government and weaken our freedoms — including our say in our reproductive rights, the right to an education, and more. We need to be prepared for legislation that seeks to threaten the freedom to vote at the state and federal level, and for the spreading of disinformation in our elections. [**That’s where your support comes in. Your contribution can help us fight back against the voter suppression tactics to come. Can you make a gift today, before we reach the end of the month?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97665315/514182395/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241125_f_EOM1_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZhMmVjOS04ZGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uERyvdBHV4ObOW8KwZDWnGJvf6W3Djlv_lpeCVO2DBM=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97665316/514182396/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241125_f_EOM1_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODZhMmVjOS04ZGFiLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uERyvdBHV4ObOW8KwZDWnGJvf6W3Djlv_lpeCVO2DBM=)
---
Throughout this election season, we saw increased attempts at voter intimidation, from mass purges to threats of violence on Election Day. We cannot allow this to spread and become normalized.
We’ve faced Trump and his MAGA-loyalists before, and we refuse to back down from the challenges ahead. That means we need the support of this team with us at every step along the way.

name: Katie Porter
subject: I want to hear about something wild:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39322%2E3422442%2E1qFTYo)
Derek,
Some of America’s greatest treasures are our public lands.
These breathtaking natural landscapes aren’t the property of a well-connected few; they belong to you and me, and they should be protected from exploitation and interference—where America can still be wild.
Our national parks can stoke adventure within all of us, even if it's just the once (like the one time I hiked Angel’s Landing in Zion—incredible, but once in a lifetime for me in every way).
**[I’d love to know what wild, public lands mean the most to you and what your favorite national parks are—will you share your story today?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241125_1/?refcode=em20241125-39322&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39322%2E3422442%2E1qFTYo)**
[Share your story ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241125_1/?refcode=em20241125-39322&akid=39322%2E3422442%2E1qFTYo)
[****](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241125_1/?refcode=em20241125-39322&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39322%2E3422442%2E1qFTYo)
Whether it’s your first park visit (for me, the Smoky Mountains), or your most recent (if you can believe it, I recently went to Shenandoah for the _first time_ to get a bit of respite from Congressional chaos)—our national parks are special places that need our stories and our advocacy.
That’s why I convened a Congressional hearing to learn how we can make our national parks more accessible for people with disabilities and veterans, and I’ve spearheaded the _Every Kid Outdoors Act_ to get more young Americans to our national parks, free of charge.
And while it’s my personal belief that California has some of America’s best national parks, I think we can all agree: Sorry St. Louis, but Gateway Arch National Park... shouldn’t qualify.
**[I’d love to hear more about your favorite national park, hiking trail, or just your favorite wild corner of America—share your story today.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241125_1/?refcode=em20241125-39322&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39322%2E3422442%2E1qFTYo)**
Thanks,
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241125-39322&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39322_3422442_1qFTYo&akid=39322%2E3422442%2E1qFTYo)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39322%2E3422442%2E1qFTYo).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

subject: Big (and terrific) news on the NC Supreme Court race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Justice Allison Riggs has now declared victory!
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97666423/514206753/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZGU3ZDA3LTk2YWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qBKITD8d8ApHjgDWggpbnTgZljNlUliVm05XG1HQcw0=&emci=a19d15eb-70ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=47de7d07-96ab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=8431045)
---

Big update from North Carolina, Peter: Now that counties have certified their results, and with recount numbers so far lining up with the original count, **Justice Allison Riggs declared victory in her race for the state supreme court! ** This is a huge win for North Carolinians. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in this election because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And over the past few weeks, we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard. Let’s continue working to elect Democracy Defenders across the country (there’s a state supreme court race in Wisconsin in just 127 days!) — [**chip in to help power that work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97666424/514206754/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggsRRTopper_email_20241125-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241125-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper-NOR_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggsRRTopper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZGU3ZDA3LTk2YWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qBKITD8d8ApHjgDWggpbnTgZljNlUliVm05XG1HQcw0=) Thank you for being the kind of Democrat who invests in critical state-level races like these. It makes a real difference. \- Team NDRC \-------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
From: Team NDRC <info@democraticredistricting.com>
Date: Wed, Nov 20, 2024
Subject: Update: The NC Supreme Court race is headed to a recount
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hi Peter, North Carolina was one of our key electoral priorities this cycle, and one of the most critical races there — for the state supreme court — is now going into a recount. We endorsed Justice Allison Riggs for the North Carolina Supreme Court because she has proven to be a fair-minded and independent voice on the court. She is a tenacious civil rights attorney who has been a champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. **She leads her opponent by just over 700 votes — out of more than 5.5 million total ballots cast.** We knew that major state-level races this year could come down to just a few hundred votes, so everything this team does can make a real difference. And this is an important reminder that our work fighting for a fair democracy is far from over. In fact, given the extreme MAGA Republicans who will be leading the federal government, our work at the state level is more important than ever before. The NDRC is supporting count and cure campaigns on the ground in North Carolina while also gearing up for the next phase of our 10 Year Plan. The Republican majority on the North Carolina Supreme Court has already had a massive impact on the state: The court removed constitutional guardrails on extreme partisan gerrymandering, brought back a voter ID law, and disenfranchised people with felony convictions.
Justice Allison Riggs’s reelection will ensure that critical pro-democracy leadership remains a force on this massively influential court — and we’ll avoid adding yet another extreme partisan voice to the court.
We need to do everything we can to get pro-democracy candidates in seats at the state level, to hold the line against extreme Republicans and their Project 2025 policies. **[We may be down, but we’re certainly not out. Are you with us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97666432/514206762/1464966451?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggsRRTopper_email_20241125-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241125-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggsRRTopper-NOR_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggsRRTopper&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ZGU3ZDA3LTk2YWItZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qBKITD8d8ApHjgDWggpbnTgZljNlUliVm05XG1HQcw0=)**

This is a huge win for North Carolinians. We threw our full support behind Justice Riggs in this election because she’s a fair-minded champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. And over the past few weeks, we’ve supported efforts to make sure every voter’s voice was heard. Let’s continue working to elect Democracy Defenders across the country (there’s a state supreme court race in Wisconsin in just 127 days!) — = Thank you for being the kind of Democrat who invests in critical state-level races like these. It makes a real difference. \- Team NDRC \-------------------------Forwarded Message------------------------- From: Team NDRC <info@democraticredistricting.com> Date: Wed, Nov 20, 2024 Subject: Update: The NC Supreme Court race is headed to a recount To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Hi Peter, North Carolina was one of our key electoral priorities this cycle, and one of the most critical races there — for the state supreme court — is now going into a recount. We endorsed Justice Allison Riggs for the North Carolina Supreme Court because she has proven to be a fair-minded and independent voice on the court. She is a tenacious civil rights attorney who has been a champion of every American’s fundamental rights, including voting rights. She leads her opponent by just over 700 votes — out of more than 5.5 million total ballots cast. We knew that major state-level races this year could come down to just a few hundred votes, so everything this team does can make a real difference. name: Andrew Yang
subject: What Are the Limits?
body:
Appetite for the news has gone down in the wake of the election, as many people find it depressing. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=3f826f2429&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=6cc7d6da67&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| Hello, I hope that you and yours are doing well.

Appetite for the news has gone down in the wake of the election, as many people find it depressing.

That said, a few questions are on everyone’s minds in regards to the incoming administration:

1. Are they going to be able to confirm their announced Cabinet appointments?
2. Will the Department of Government Efficiency really be able to downsize the federal government?
3. Will they follow through with their announced plans, i.e. mass deportations?

To help answer these questions, I interviewed legal expert and ABC news contributor Sarah Isgur on the podcast this week. “The Supreme Court has taken a dim view of the expansion of executive powers these past several years. A few of the Justices who Trump appointed, for example, actually said in one opinion that recess appointments weren’t still a thing and were an anachronism based on a time when it was a lot harder for the Senate to get to D.C. from their hometowns via horse and carriage.” This is one of the main workarounds that gets mentioned, which is that Trump would make his appointments when the Senate is in recess. Sarah thinks this would run afoul of recent rulings.

That said, Sarah noted that it’s possible that the Supreme Court could wait to hear the case for months during which time the appointed Cabinet member could serve in their role. “The Court could say you can’t appoint the person while they’re waiting for the case to be heard, or they could say that they can serve in a temporary capacity. But the temporary capacity could be 18 months, after which it could become moot.”

A number of Republican Senators have already indicated that they don’t like a couple Cabinet picks. Gaetz likely dropped out for this reason. Sarah said that both the Supreme Court and the Senate could look to avoid a head-on confrontation with Donald Trump in order to preserve their power. “It looks bad, obviously, if you say something and then Trump does another. So both the Senate and the Supreme Court will try and avoid that situation.”

So it seems that the Senate will indeed wield clout in its traditional approval role. What about Trump’s stated desire to fire various federal employees and downsize the government?

“There is actually a law called the anti-deficiency act that stipulates that the Executive Branch must spend the amount of money allocated by Congress to a particular agency,” Sarah observes. “So you can’t just not spend the money, at least according to the statute.” I don’t think this would constrain Trump and his allies. Elon in particular is going to want to head down this road. His WSJ op-ed with Vivek lays out a clear plan to shrink the workforce by reducing the number of regulations they are responsible for. In a battle between Elon and the bureaucracy, I’d bet on Elon. I’d be very concerned if I was a rank-and-file federal employee.

There’s a famous quote from President Andrew Jackson about the Supreme Court ruling against forced removal of Native Americans in 1832: “John Marshall (the Chief Justice) has made his ruling, now let him enforce it.” Andrew Jackson is not an admired President. But Donald Trump is going to feel he has a popular mandate based on his sweeping electoral win. His staff picks indicate that he was sincere in what he said he was going to do as President. I think he follows through, and the Senate and the Supreme Court will find themselves increasingly challenged as to when to stand up to Trump and when to let him have his way. The ongoing decline of our institutions will speed up in 2025.

For my interview with Sarah Isgur, which is more positive, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=645d763f83&e=0f227c2ae3). To help fuel the Forward political movement click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=b020175d26&e=0f227c2ae3) – new people are joining these days. For a bottle of wine, click [_here_](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=81a9f42ab7&e=0f227c2ae3). Kidding!
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party

clean_body: Appetite for the news has gone down in the wake of the election, as many people find it depressing. | | | | | | | | | Hello, I hope that you and yours are doing well. Appetite for the news has gone down in the wake of the election, as many people find it depressing. That said, a few questions are on everyone’s minds in regards to the incoming administration: 1. Are they going to be able to confirm their announced Cabinet appointments? 2. Will the Department of Government Efficiency really be able to downsize the federal government? 3. Will they follow through with their announced plans, i.e. mass deportations? To help answer these questions, I interviewed legal expert and ABC news contributor Sarah Isgur on the podcast this week. “The Supreme Court has taken a dim view of the expansion of executive powers these past several years. A few of the Justices who Trump appointed, for example, actually said in one opinion that recess appointments weren’t still a thing and were an anachronism based on a time when it was a lot harder for the Senate to get to D.C. from their hometowns via horse and carriage.” This is one of the main workarounds that gets mentioned, which is that Trump would make his appointments when the Senate is in recess. Sarah thinks this would run afoul of recent rulings. That said, Sarah noted that it’s possible that the Supreme Court could wait to hear the case for months during which time the appointed Cabinet member could serve in their role. “The Court could say you can’t appoint the person while they’re waiting for the case to be heard, or they could say that they can serve in a temporary capacity. But the temporary capacity could be 18 months, after which it could become moot.” A number of Republican Senators have already indicated that they don’t like a couple Cabinet picks. Gaetz likely dropped out for this reason. Sarah said that both the Supreme Court and the Senate could look to avoid a head-on confrontation with Donald Trump in order to preserve their power. “It looks bad, obviously, if you say something and then Trump does another. So both the Senate and the Supreme Court will try and avoid that situation.” So it seems that the Senate will indeed wield clout in its traditional approval role. America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership. This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America. |

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2c5fc881211d44d399ad776e86f95ca1&_e=IfuoZR-hKfeIt0eKal-30ip_OUnLj4-XqsawG3wb0kDzJfqs_bD6nOBMQ6ZI0nTEM-Op3AzYrV8q1tPJutS1-yvzPgdLxGozLd_h9MmK5hTGvBq2DKwQbVrTUG1a6HEyy1jNgITFU0OLae6gEVZXoDSc_c6Cj7_Mt7DvP062Gvn4GvYLA8LudWZUIhkOfroh0Kvtxc3p3vFWKb6PsXnYl7B1160VDMHmAHjKO_0sesufiXZTfiz5HtNzWIKfLZPuGYzSYxOx4wfqD6E0r0jpZwRofMvJpK3IQFdoq2yqNBd57ANl4Ee84pVt530__QB3UZCWTyH7_Vj4qiG8uHcjMktf8AX3BQU6YHruI1RvJU3D7H9Xtr9jX7_M0Kofa9eyzRR4aNuU-qLk6gLO3NCXSMsJ-VTWpfQ1nAb9T35BGh8%3D)
Peter,

When I was flying F-16s over hostile territory, protecting American lives and freedoms, I learned a lesson I'll never forget: _courage_ is what separates those who stand by from those who step up.

I was called to serve, and born to fight. Today, I'm stepping up again–this time to run for Congress in Florida's 1st Congressional District in the April 1st Special Election.

**I'm Jeff Witt.**

I'm not a politician. I'm a fighter pilot, a conservative, a businessman, and most importantly, a father and a husband, determined to protect the country my children will inherit. But the America I love–the one that values freedom, hard work, and opportunity–is slipping away under the radical left's control. The country we're living in today is barely recognizable, and I refuse to stand by and let them destroy it.

This isn't a political moment. Our country is at a breaking point.

America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership.**This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America.**

[**Will you help this campaign take flight as one of our very first donors?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2c5fc881211d44d399ad776e86f95ca1&_e=IfuoZR-hKfeIt0eKal-30ip_OUnLj4-XqsawG3wb0kDzJfqs_bD6nOBMQ6ZI0nTEM-Op3AzYrV8q1tPJutS1-yvzPgdLxGozLd_h9MmK5hTGvBq2DKwQbVrTUG1a6HEyy1jNgITFU0OLae6gEVZXoDSc_c6Cj7_Mt7DvP062Gvn4GvYLA8LudWZUIhkOfroh0Kvtxc3p3vFWKb6PsXnYl7B1160VDMHmAHjKO_0sesufiXZTfiz5HtNzWIKfLZPuCJx72CdHB2u7ZiaBeeYVvbFfB0iH6Fk6f5s_DaZdJM1Nohz0lCvdEZwu37WUeY8i7B0DMsev6d84c2f6ACfKdC9q8rd40Qs9DdPf_HkYrn5VRuykf7ePRBSJdL2_OwncCspLS-XZBBHASjuHqB_TBua8c8VV5zhAZOSsueTdbwE%3D)

clean_body: America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership. This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America. | Peter, When I was flying F-16s over hostile territory, protecting American lives and freedoms, I learned a lesson I'll never forget: courage is what separates those who stand by from those who step up. I was called to serve, and born to fight. Today, I'm stepping up again–this time to run for Congress in Florida's 1st Congressional District in the April 1st Special Election. I'm Jeff Witt. I'm not a politician. I'm a fighter pilot, a conservative, a businessman, and most importantly, a father and a husband, determined to protect the country my children will inherit. But the America I love–the one that values freedom, hard work, and opportunity–is slipping away under the radical left's control. The country we're living in today is barely recognizable, and I refuse to stand by and let them destroy it. This isn't a political moment. Our country is at a breaking point. America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership.This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America. I've been inspired by Republicans' historic sweep to take control of the House, Senate, and White House. I'm ready to join the ranks in Washington with relentless determination to secure our borders, stop the radical left's destructive agenda, and put America First. Time is short. And the stakes couldn't be higher. The April 1st Special Election is the first major test of 2025 for Republicans, and the entire country will be watching. For America, Jeff Witt Republican for Congress P.S. Be one of the FIRST DONORS to my campaign and help us take the fight to the radical left and the Washington establishment. name: SkyTree Book Fairs
subject: Warning… these children’sbooks will anger you
body:
Here is the single most impactful thing you can do

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcg7oack3dk3fm50g4husqb9j5ug8n310hjdhde8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

You would not believe the inappropriate books Scholastic pushes on kids at innocent book fairs, from highly sexualized content to confusing stories about gender transitioning to books promoting self-harm.

**I’ve documented some of the books for you below so you can find them yourself if you don’t believe me.**

Each of these contains storylines aimed at making children question their identity, consider dealing with their feelings through self-harm, or accept gender confusion as a normal part of growing up.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2k5s3dnecgf3h65br8hei0g6pstqohqqbng6hh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs) _Red: A Crayon’s Story_ (for Ages 3-7)
About a crayon mistakenly labeled as “red” who finds the courage to be his true-blue self.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4knrivjt0stm1b73551kbu5b8fvgu0ke6kfbm2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
_Asking for a Friend_ (for Ages 8-12)
A story about queer joy and all the ups and downs of true friendship.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjsu3mao17qre9ehp00j35a59m90ddqe5024og70_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
_Cut_ (for Ages 12 & up)
A novel about a young girl who cuts herself and her time in a psychiatric facility.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp4copn1gthrhl32kjg5pjkep7gkaehsf9gap4ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
_Escape from St. Hell: My Trans Teen Life Levels Up_ (for Ages 14 & up)
The story of a teen coming into her own as a “trans man.”
**Here is the single most impactful thing you can do to help disrupt Scholastic’s market dominance on school book fairs:**

Support SkyTree Book Fairs.

Our mission is to nurture childhood innocence through book fairs that allow children’s imaginations to soar with stories that are rooted in truth. Our book fairs provide only wholesome, age-appropriate content to kids.

You can help us impact over 150,000 families through SkyTree Book Fairs.

[Our goal is to raise $83,000 this month to provide no-cost book fairs to schools. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $100, or more today and help us provide age-appropriate and inspiring book fairs to schools across the nation? Click here to donate today. >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zom9bi6gpnafeeeiis2kgc2q031a2len7ubmskk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt4om2h6da9vfu4b0n9vv534n84o89p6t5481d30_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
Friend, it’s been one year since we set out to create a wholesome alternative book fair experience for both private _and_ public schools.

And in just 12 months, SkyTree has...
* Hosted over 280 book fairs in 47 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students in 2024

**When schools choose SkyTree Book Fairs** , every book we send to schools is carefully vetted by our team to ensure it does not include sexually explicit content, storylines about gender confusion, or other harmful political and psychological themes that kids are not equipped to handle.

Here are some of our books:
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfavq4i15hd3n08eq8kbfessrm0p3acr5g34k4ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znct8lhvlq1kenf0scim8sjcdrjio0i95p127i4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs). [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqh8tp3n5c73pduc48glson1qodco2ocmk4d1hko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
[Please consider donating today to help us reach our goal of $200,000 to reach 150,000 families in the coming year! Click here to send your gift. >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z11rmrqbcfkirh4s926g9cn3n7hvl2ue3va7998g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
[Donate to Put a Wholesome Book
Into the Hands of a Child](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjjq1a12emdfudsvb9ql0d7suibdufm79gnp6tsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)
Scholastic is neglecting your values to push their agenda forward while offering books and promotions at an affordable price. It makes it nearly impossible to compete with them.

As a non-profit, we are committed to providing book fairs to schools free of charge so that every school has the opportunity to enrich their students with uplifting content that points them toward eternal truths.

This means we rely on your support to continue making reading a wholesome adventure again.

[Today, we invite you to join the SkyTree Family Tree. Donate now to be part of the movement to build a wholesome, affordable, age-appropriate book fair experience that doesn’t expose kids to explicit content! Click to send your gift of $10, $35, $50 or more. >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpo9tj864hn4pqaf6ov3fe4c4pej802dtc7oivqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)

We look forward to counting you among the SkyTree Family!

Thank you in advance for your support,

SkyTree Book Fairs

SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk5fpkb41b5qol40ai1cktnmc865r5fnu3q8tb98_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6cor6chieaoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrdv3m6cb7prgj3965s25pmr9qjb28d683706l6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi6aoj2cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zct1ojgolghsr2p8hije4gm1e2kjss93vekum010_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c9hm8pb2c9ie49fg)

name: SkyTree Book Fairs
subject: Warning… these children’sbooks will anger you
body:
Here is the single most impactful thing you can do

|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zso05plbsiub768jiqjf125ralgudmdtuijdk6vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

You would not believe the inappropriate books Scholastic pushes on kids at innocent book fairs, from highly sexualized content to confusing stories about gender transitioning to books promoting self-harm.

**I’ve documented some of the books for you below so you can find them yourself if you don’t believe me.**

Each of these contains storylines aimed at making children question their identity, consider dealing with their feelings through self-harm, or accept gender confusion as a normal part of growing up.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9o57q25jj6npqp0rjngvgm3dl3fs50mptmcgv78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs) _Red: A Crayon’s Story_ (for Ages 3-7)
About a crayon mistakenly labeled as “red” who finds the courage to be his true-blue self.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztl9flritua7s5jk5dpk3112n4bshjh2llsjt8h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
_Asking for a Friend_ (for Ages 8-12)
A story about queer joy and all the ups and downs of true friendship.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu2kasij5dr032vcoti4uru8plcq5bolth4sdvpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
_Cut_ (for Ages 12 & up)
A novel about a young girl who cuts herself and her time in a psychiatric facility.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqqogmet1k5vj2is6tub8bblnmt45uaf6bs5rqj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
_Escape from St. Hell: My Trans Teen Life Levels Up_ (for Ages 14 & up)
The story of a teen coming into her own as a “trans man.”
**Here is the single most impactful thing you can do to help disrupt Scholastic’s market dominance on school book fairs:**

Support SkyTree Book Fairs.

Our mission is to nurture childhood innocence through book fairs that allow children’s imaginations to soar with stories that are rooted in truth. Our book fairs provide only wholesome, age-appropriate content to kids.

You can help us impact over 150,000 families through SkyTree Book Fairs.

[Our goal is to raise $83,000 this month to provide no-cost book fairs to schools. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $100, or more today and help us provide age-appropriate and inspiring book fairs to schools across the nation? Click here to donate today. >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4ridccp8uaq0q3446skgqufn1obrvra93hlpmd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
[Donate >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zollsvp5k70253n2uv6h2lubi9cgpkdgobfqup08_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
Friend, it’s been one year since we set out to create a wholesome alternative book fair experience for both private _and_ public schools.

And in just 12 months, SkyTree has...
* Hosted over 280 book fairs in 47 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students in 2024

**When schools choose SkyTree Book Fairs** , every book we send to schools is carefully vetted by our team to ensure it does not include sexually explicit content, storylines about gender confusion, or other harmful political and psychological themes that kids are not equipped to handle.

Here are some of our books:
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1mpe18cul4gjfc69gdd2b294vr0tm95l7b4ineg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs) [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2p02e1h3uh8ke6dr5344udacqa5h13ofatbajt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs). [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt6csu52kupppv4791pnfaaemakae8n6iujfg6mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
[Please consider donating today to help us reach our goal of $200,000 to reach 150,000 families in the coming year! Click here to send your gift. >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq3o4tb9eo3vjth6ovmot6lgi1mojple6k3i6kho_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
[Donate to Put a Wholesome Book
Into the Hands of a Child](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2za73n5bskilp2nq70trj142l0sbaa4ju5e2gg4og_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)
Scholastic is neglecting your values to push their agenda forward while offering books and promotions at an affordable price. It makes it nearly impossible to compete with them.

As a non-profit, we are committed to providing book fairs to schools free of charge so that every school has the opportunity to enrich their students with uplifting content that points them toward eternal truths.

This means we rely on your support to continue making reading a wholesome adventure again.

[Today, we invite you to join the SkyTree Family Tree. Donate now to be part of the movement to build a wholesome, affordable, age-appropriate book fair experience that doesn’t expose kids to explicit content! Click to send your gift of $10, $35, $50 or more. >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9ccvvbpu1807mb201j1a5ab51hn36tbqvcbp6c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdi61o71cjh2bs)

We look forward to counting you among the SkyTree Family!

Thank you in advance for your support,

SkyTree Book Fairs

SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.
---

It makes it nearly impossible to compete with them. As a non-profit, we are committed to providing book fairs to schools free of charge so that every school has the opportunity to enrich their students with uplifting content that points them toward eternal truths. This means we rely on your support to continue making reading a wholesome adventure again. We look forward to counting you among the SkyTree Family! Thank you in advance for your support, SkyTree Book Fairs SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWnCmuXWN4
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I
want to say:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWnCmuXWN4

You are
absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into
your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms
children.

Fellow
Conservative,
As
someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want
to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is
reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment"
that grooms children.
Today
when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the
Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

And the
result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where
children lecture you on what you can and cannot say…
...and
they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean"
ideas.
But you
and I know your ideas aren't old-fashioned or mean at all. They
are the same biblical values that made America the greatest
country on earth.
That's
why I'm reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance
to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and
grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.
Today,
I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first
children's television show that actively fights back against the
groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical
values that made America great.
And it's
only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to
see a Christian resurgence in America like you.

Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.
This
ground-breaking live-action television show captivates
children...
...but
more importantly, it builds their character at the same time.
Imagine a
children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a
greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.
Courage,
honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a
biblical and traditional lens.
Imagine a
children's show that brings families together instead of driving
them apart.
Now
imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible.
Because I
can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding
Supporter.
Season
One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled
episodes planned.
And each
episode costs around $70,000 to produce.
I know
that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it
would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio.
And
obviously we won't work through Hollywood.
Hollywood
has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and
hijack our children.
We
parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to
rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture.
That's
why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to
help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.
Whether
you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything
higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are
needed and greatly appreciated.
As your
special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the
$35 and above level, we'll send you all ten episodes of
Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE
on DVD.
Hollywood
groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we
rebuild from the ashes.
And it
starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with
faith and family -- not filth.
Thank you
for joining us as a Founding Supporter.

Kirk
Cameron
Actor,
Author, and Father

Kirk
Cameron
Actor,
Author, and Father

DONATE

Brave
Books
13618
Poplar Cir, Suite 302
Conroe,
TX 77304

subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8k3pli8q4ejn0ffinmj1f1gf6etbr5c0m0l5mbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdh64ob1c9h2bs)

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6rdnco6j0d4e6kq9eonaa3l3o93uo9pbkbts8hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdh64ob1c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0bm837u8muils9f283qfoag06000afou7pu3bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdh64ob1c9h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Most Incompetent Cabinet in American History?
body:
MAGA is filling the government with their most extreme loyalists, and Americans are already unhappy.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjlg6-jzkk1t-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **The Most Incompetent Cabinet in American History?**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vjlg6-jzkk1u-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | folks, Donald Trump is assembling what critics are calling the _most incompetent cabinet in U.S. history_ , and it’s already setting off alarm bells about the future of our democracy. The chaotic saga of Matt Gaetz, Trump’s initial pick for Attorney General, is a glaring example. Gaetz, plagued by allegations of sexual misconduct and drug use, withdrew his nomination after bipartisan backlash in the Senate. His short-lived candidacy underscores just how unqualified and reckless Trump’s cabinet selections are shaping up to be. The incompetence doesn’t stop there. Trump has nominated vaccine conspiracy theorist Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and billionaire Elon Musk for key roles in his administration. Musk, tapped to lead the newly created Department of Government Efficiency, symbolizes a dangerous blend of corporate overreach and government mismanagement. Meanwhile, Kennedy’s nomination to oversee public health has horrified experts who warn of the devastating consequences his leadership could bring. Trump isn’t just nominating loyalists with questionable qualifications—he’s actively undermining the confirmation process. Reports suggest he’s considering bypassing Senate approval altogether through recess appointments, a move that would sidestep critical vetting and further erode trust in our institutions. Even Republican senators are uneasy, with outgoing Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell reminding his colleagues that the Senate’s constitutional role of "advice and consent" must not be abandoned. Trump’s picks aren’t just unqualified—they’re dangerous. From public health to national defense, this administration is shaping up to be an unprecedented disaster, putting lives at risk and destabilizing democracy. If this is the team Trump thinks will "Make America Great Again," it’s clear he’s more interested in chaos than competence. The stakes couldn’t be higher. America needs leaders who are prepared to serve—not disrupt for the sake of power.

Hey Reader,

Designed from the ground up with premium features you’d find in night vision that costs ten times as much – and let me tell you, these are packed full of features – these are a game-changer!

Whether you're navigating a dark forest on a camping trip, tracking a mule deer on a hunt, or simply enjoying the mysteries of the nocturnal world, DarkForce NVB’s are your reliable companion.

You won’t find higher quality night vision for a better price.

**[Grab your DarkForce NVB’s for 90% OFF now.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19216/6374453/46cd91d2a43a1cd98d72db853a1767b757665d9f/acfe7f262bd8e41e1d9457b57957e3406095cff0)

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58e041ab0f2942b0aff410b52300cf85&_e=EmitA2GvoNwNegF94Q2wrCNqBadjdPrwN9p19ggE9at9dJwGj4prJKhL_4BgFAScMs3Lb5QAzh2siwHio653z7FE9hknyHj8Cw_Hf3TZ2-ul-_fSPyVM7ZltzaaIAGX-fU4jE17_oCRw_5UxqAXdnzAbQH5K5D32qyvYqC0c6pMHeyH5aYEqrCVHvPybrlUFKNOwjC0pbOG76YE0kam19Us6r4UooybBpmf25sBj042-3ugN0YIuS6HHh20-0VXOP-2mubzx_xWZpdE9ILx6fJXFhDtxFQAMBuSgRDvVHtuZy_RgFcMIQXdYCs1ZQRm1sS58OsLlcqm_UXumKhegKoDcR2IWifXeTVxyEJ7DdxkRKgXhQSe8O6Hh9_sqV76-QN17Y0bNb1W-J0dBvgBnSA%3D%3D)

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58e041ab0f2942b0aff410b52300cf85&_e=EmitA2GvoNwNegF94Q2wrCNqBadjdPrwN9p19ggE9at9dJwGj4prJKhL_4BgFAScMs3Lb5QAzh2siwHio653z7FE9hknyHj8Cw_Hf3TZ2-ul-_fSPyVM7ZltzaaIAGX-fU4jE17_oCRw_5UxqAXdnzAbQH5K5D32qyvYqC0c6pMHeyH5aYEqrCVHvPybrlUFKNOwjC0pbOG76YE0kam19Us6r4UooybBpmf25sBj042-3ugN0YIuS6HHh20-0VXOFjOoLpz5_93ZrumkyJAs_Brz41IrUlR7-fDBwPTaOJk_nycoJnLPX47C8i9nCYyvpB8XzTaZv6J4875vcC4KsPaH8rvHJm-c2QsG_OZw9EvpOI6G5PPjfSboKTnNqCXBxordiyqsPHiQgYOyIgw7eA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=58e041ab0f2942b0aff410b52300cf85&_e=EmitA2GvoNwNegF94Q2wrCNqBadjdPrwN9p19ggE9at9dJwGj4prJKhL_4BgFAScMs3Lb5QAzh2siwHio653z7FE9hknyHj8Cw_Hf3TZ2-ul-_fSPyVM7ZltzaaIAGX-fU4jE17_oCRw_5UxqAXdnzAbQH5K5D32qyvYqC0c6pMHeyH5aYEqrCVHvPybrlUFKNOwjC0pbOG76YE0kam19Us6r4UooybBpmf25sBj042-3ugN0YIuS6HHh20-0VXOG-HMfpxD9lWwprRWRWDxmIODjxKOnEBQHu0tk__Q4laq0pmSOFzPLWnS1jtXpXutHOV2MHaWeBS59xTLUVbIMVa451OR55Wp536tS76-rbAlSTST-4MeQKUvBkvfasbT2Lem1goquOXnExOg6LKcLw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: FWD: Do your part to Trump-proof climate progress
body:
Speak out against six LNG projects that Biden can stop right now
| | |
---
| Hi—

Did you see this email from Mattea? With so much uncertainty ahead of us, there is one thing we can do right now to listen to communities that will be severely impacted by an incoming Trump presidency—**and that's calling on President Biden to reject six super-polluting gas projects before the end of his term.**

A new analysis on the environmental and economic impacts of liquefied "natural" gas (LNG) is expected to drop any day now, and we've already rallied **43,009** Evergreen advocates to sign our letter to President Biden. **But your name is still missing, {First Name}—**[**will you take a minute to sign on?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3069935/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3069936/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for getting involved,

Eva Piatek
Email Production Manager
Evergreen Collaborative

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Collaborative
Date: Thur, Nov 14, 2024
Subject: Act not to Trump-proof climate progress |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3069937/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

I know these are difficult times, and I hope you're doing what you need to take care of yourself and your community. **I hope you can take one minute right now to help with the urgent work of Trump-proofing some critical climate progress.
**
Now that we're just _two months away_ from handing over the keys to a fascist who believes the climate crisis is a "hoax," President Biden must act fast to cement his strong climate legacy.

Number one on his to-do list should be working with the Department of Energy (DOE) to conclusively determine that liquefied "natural" gas (LNG) exports are not in the public interest and quickly denying six pending export authorizations for six super-polluting gas projects that would poison frontline communities.

[**Send a message to President Biden right now to stop these six super polluter projects while we still can.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3069938/87SdQ4wZ) |
[](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3069939/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We know that LNG presents a massive threat to our climate, public health, and economy. Just last month, over half a million people submitted comments to DOE, asking for an end to LNG expansion, which sacrifices our collective future in favor of the short-term profits for a select few.

Throughout his presidency, President Biden has shown his willingness to listen to the people most affected and knowledgeable when making policy decisions—whether they are scientists, frontline and environmental justice leaders, or healthcare professionals. **As he closes out his term, he should heed the will of the country and do what's best to secure wins for the long haul— _regardless of who is in office._**

The task of preserving our democracy, values, and a safer climate future from a Trump administration will no doubt be challenging and will require a movement-wide effort that goes beyond these next few months. **But President Biden can set the stage to help us succeed if we get loud enough.**[**Tell him to finish the job ASAP on LNG.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3069940/87SdQ4wZ)

Thanks for raising your voice in this critical moment, |
---
| | |
---
### Mattea Mrkusic
Senior Policy Lead
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
| **P.S.** If you want to learn more about why LNG should be the Biden administration's #1 climate priority until January, [**check out our latest blog.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3069941/87SdQ4wZ) |
---

clean_body: Speak out against six LNG projects that Biden can stop right now | | | | Hi— Did you see this email from Mattea? With so much uncertainty ahead of us, there is one thing we can do right now to listen to communities that will be severely impacted by an incoming Trump presidency—and that's calling on President Biden to reject six super-polluting gas projects before the end of his term. A new analysis on the environmental and economic impacts of liquefied "natural" gas (LNG) is expected to drop any day now, and we've already rallied 43,009 Evergreen advocates to sign our letter to President Biden. But your name is still missing, {First Name}— | | Thanks for getting involved, Eva Piatek Email Production Manager Evergreen Collaborative \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Collaborative Date: Thur, Nov 14, 2024 Subject: Act not to Trump-proof climate progress | | | ---|---|--- | Hi there, I know these are difficult times, and I hope you're doing what you need to take care of yourself and your community. I hope you can take one minute right now to help with the urgent work of Trump-proofing some critical climate progress. Now that we're just two months away from handing over the keys to a fascist who believes the climate crisis is a "hoax," President Biden must act fast to cement his strong climate legacy. Number one on his to-do list should be working with the Department of Energy (DOE) to conclusively determine that liquefied "natural" gas (LNG) exports are not in the public interest and quickly denying six pending export authorizations for six super-polluting gas projects that would poison frontline communities. | | We know that LNG presents a massive threat to our climate, public health, and economy. Just last month, over half a million people submitted comments to DOE, asking for an end to LNG expansion, which sacrifices our collective future in favor of the short-term profits for a select few. Throughout his presidency, President Biden has shown his willingness to listen to the people most affected and knowledgeable when making policy decisions—whether they are scientists, frontline and environmental justice leaders, or healthcare professionals. As he closes out his term, he should heed the will of the country and do what's best to secure wins for the long haul— regardless of who is in office. The task of preserving our democracy, values, and a safer climate future from a Trump administration will no doubt be challenging and will require a movement-wide effort that goes beyond these next few months. But President Biden can set the stage to help us succeed if we get loud enough. Thanks for raising your voice in this critical moment, | | | | Mattea Mrkusic Senior Policy Lead Evergreen Collaborative | P.S. If you want to learn more about why LNG should be the Biden administration's #1 climate priority until January, | * | Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- 1250 Connecticut Ave NW, Suite 700, Washington DC 20036 | | content © 2024 Evergreen Collaborative. Thinking that the cavalrymen might be carrying pay for the Mexican army, the Texans attacked them only to discover they were transporting grass for the army’s animals. If you prefer to let someone else bake your Thanksgiving pies, you might need to get in line now if you want one from [Houston's Flying Saucer Pie Company](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvhCAYxvFPA9sZeMEXHBiaXEwXu143A4InCdarcnJ--8butz5P8kv-t67vbEzx5_5l52Dya1x6YCAvnF8Ae29jOnpJvXHMN5wGw5UABIYo6GTkoIJmSjtAaDSCEw6D82rgtXVcWRrNiXEOyDlowapGBjFq6eoa0Te6JpIFH_OyVnkKObzsNqZj2cNaDctMk5lyfmxEfBBoCbSllOpYnvnpwvmfi83DRES7E3EVbXf7bY7r92ehq_GPElOKGyoi2X22Mf2T-W3jbuAvAAD__4j9Un8). ## State Wants More Control Over Crypto Mining
The Public Utilities Commission of Texas (PUCT) has [implemented a new rule](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb8GOww8ELWg2MZutt3SKDz1JQgG2XH8-81Mv_XNPTk5P4_xMVGguH5PO9ryWtIIAjSXkoMZ_UThHnXl7Sx8Lyu0slVgQBijqs0CuAacaJbZdK3rJGhsvRDKNbN0YvEV2TdMSjBSQqdE3WtUS6fnpjHG913DtEBPJeW6bFjwNZ1LuNMTc-3SXgW7lXKcTH0xGBgM13XVbsspvlcGQ8TrZDBs6fcsKfLPn8Ew5UIuIIMBI-b15i7fR0l8puISRb5TpLhyzC4VLvte9W0L9bEdVbb-uCgEOk3LtFj3icLHpPyb5mnhLwAA__8ulWap) requiring cryptocurrency mining facilities operating on the Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) grid to register with the agency to ensure the grid’s reliability. Bitcoin mining has surged in Texas, particularly after China [banned the practice in 2021](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQBb8Gd0SwEGIXFNe4y7VXWmuzTlbCJoJVzvn7U9Jf_96MND_X6Yqceb9940ZRjrVMYMBrazWEKSHn1-S7FGeTBttRtBcHAUwIrrtH5xfjaJnn1SzOG6K-H8iR8X1ywaHrOL5h1kKwFnpnToMnt_Z-Pp9DSEN_Vt5QYin1JHcSOrCt-VWeVE9L2boc7yKPptyXglHBmDBnbHQ8KrX2XigYm6CQgvFz1hvuCYWanlmWwrveeKfatBRd6cZNqGre11I3FC67grGrMT1-OWdu4aK8uW3I-WOXf3M8I_wFAAD__yNjZF0). However, it has drawn criticism for its high energy consumption and noise disruptions in local communities. As of 2023, five of the 10 largest Bitcoin mines were in Texas, using 1,212 megawatts of energy. According to estimates, crypto mining represents between 0.6% and 2.3% of total U.S. electricity consumption. President-elect Donald Trump has floated the idea of [creating a strategic reserve of Bitcoin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOmzAURp_GbEb2tWNg8FBVZUsrVZU6IoMvcCWDU3MTkrevkv3fv-_o6Py9DtdAifblZ9jQ83POAyiwUmsJboiB0muwVfSjip2u0OvGgAPlnKlWb5UbO1CzG4MbzRhQtW6KnQNs0LnJVOTfMK3BaQ2tUXVn0cytHS8X52LXXoRVGIlzqXlFxmc45vTKDyz1lLcq-ZX5dgjzTUAvoD_Ps74zJeJXpAe-NwL6Hc9DQP95y4L_7lTwkCPxlGmXG-1YDslZFlzoYCzyJF4lJpy40CSXQlHmG5bAucgfv7__-iOgb4xpbSugr4qPt5NSosM1wqplC5Q-dvxlroeH_wEAAP__doxuew), and Sen. Ted Cruz has said he wants Texas to “be an oasis for Bitcoin.” The new rule requires crypto mining facilities to disclose their location, ownership, and electricity demands with the PUCT or [face penalties of up to $25,000 per day](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L-OhCAYBPCnwQ4DH4haUFxDt9deaZA_7pegGGTX9e0vu7n22pnkl8n83KabxYTb8m3XoOsr5gkYSMo5BTV5i-maZOP1zPzIm6B5L0ABU0o0d81lJwbrvBqVBO4HEcH2wo4ixmCHMDeo3xjnoDiHQbB2lEHEQc5dp5Qfh45IFjzWXNp6DzW87BHTlZ-htC6vTdL3WveDiC8ChoA5z7PdZufj-a4JmC2cBwGTsrOJgPkA9C905dprpituuC00WocJK4aD7g9XaQkLHrXYinmj5ZECASN6JrpREjBN0X4_MSU8VE8kW1aL6TOp_vvRU8NvAAAA__8W8GnB).
## Report Highlights State's Water Woes
A report by Rice University's Baker Institute highlights Texas' [vulnerability to long-term water supply shortages](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGutCAUhJ8GOwwcEaWg-Bu7_dtbGlaOK1kUA8d1ffub3f6Wk8lMvnw_t_HmQgzb479b0dJ7TiMIUFxKDnr0LsRrVJW3d-GNrNDKrgENQuumWqzvvb4LRO2kaQ3OkzKd1tJ4ITujnamC_ZxJCVpK6BtRG4XN3Kt722rtTd8yJdAHSrmmBQnfrszxSi_M9ZTWKtqFaC-s-cdgYDCc51k_3277lAyGDc_CYPjOGAwZ95SJfyPHKW1pvbgjnkN58jmnlZ-OMPNy7Hu8eNjmfBTKx0RHRl6WlMk9kMFQZev3M8QYiu6YEo_VhfgFoj8NvSz8BgAA__-3P2s6) and deteriorating infrastructure. It warns of severe economic consequences if legislators don’t provide additional funding to address the situation. Commissioned by the nonpartisan advocacy group _Texas 2036_ , the [report](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OwyAQBOCnwZ0tWH5sFxRpkK7IVZFSWtgsCRI2FpC_tz85_fWrb2fmep7ONsSw3X7tirq-fZqAgmgZa0FNzob4mUTj9EzdyBrUrOeggCrFm7sW1kvZz3ZEIb33M6eoBtm7xdreDwtvgj4wxkAxBgOn3SiQ-0HMUirlxkESQdGFmnJX71jxbYuPn_TE3C1pbaK-17oXwk8EDAHzPQDKVZfyjYB57e2StopbJWAee0zWFQLm-EnAMErAXN5XWzG3P5vPttT8WOojY3sqBUtZcavT5UDbQ_0273bnm6zd_goxhqJ6IuhttSF-E9V_J3pq-AsAAP__M5poAg) predicts that if Texas experiences a drought similar to that of the 1950s, it could lead to reduced energy production, $160 billion in annual GDP losses, 800,000 lost jobs, and significant population declines by 2030. By 2070, the state’s water supply is projected to be nearly 6.9 million acre-feet less than needed, the amount of water required to supply as many as 20.7 million homes for a year. The report calls for [investing $154 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO8yAUBOCnwd2xuAXbBcXfuMvfbmkdh2MbCQMClMvbr5LddtuR5tNovq7LFX3wcf-PJ9n23NIiudQgBEizOPThtejO2ZW7SXRkxaCkkdwY1R1WDVpvOOoRb3xyuKKeBuOMmjYlVqdE5-0bE0IaIeSoeD9pUtuo18vFGDeNF6Y5Od9S6dtBjZ5Yt_BKdyr9LZ1dsEdruTL1j8mZyblixNhS9KlQTqX1qexMzpEe8BMA1kq1-rjDB4MHNioQiVyFnHxsFVqCihF-IcAK9MQzB4K0QQ4Y47uOB6Fjcu6KdfnhQ_DVDEzz_UQfPuPan2_drfwOAAD__4UtcBg) in water supply, infrastructure repair, and wastewater systems over the next 50 years, with state and federal funding expected to cover $40-$45 billion of that amount.
## Glen Powell Look-alike Crowned
A [Glen Powell look-alike contest](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSwiAURb-GdGTgQQALim3Sue2WGZQXw_gSnICif7-jW29_55w75-c4HUOitF2-w4q-Puc8gQDNpeRgphgSvSbdRX8S8SA79NIqMCCMUd3i46AEgAZtjJXaotMKxDCL4eSUcGi75N8wKcFICU6J_qBRzU6fhsGYeHAD0wJjqnnv64IVn6HM9MoP3PtzXjvyS623wtQXg5HB2Frr5_y04V5q2t4TBuOGrTAYL4Qbv-WGRJxyvvJA6Yr8nLeKpfJw_2jSfeVlyTsW_gfhH2m3-3hriSgVY5kWlzUk-lyo_zZ5ePgNAAD__8WZZRs) drew hundreds to Austin's Auditorium Shores on Sunday, celebrating the local actor who has starred in hits like _Top Gun: Maverick_ , the romantic comedy _Anyone But You_ , and the disaster film _Twisters_. The winner, [Maxwell Braunstein](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPozAQBeBfYzojezA2FC6ucbfXXokGPEmsNTjCsyH8-xPpt3vF09On9-9r-sKU03b_iyt5ft_KBAqM1FqCnSKmfE6miX5WcdQNee06sKCs7ZqHB0dLpIHciAjOuYimI0A7O7SAhE3y15jWYLWGoVPtaKi7DWbue2vjOPTCKIqJy97yg5jeWG_5LC_a26WsTfYP5mcV3R8BQUA4jqP9qcgl4nkVBITKZT8FBNqYdsa0rbSxgLBQpnlPnKgKCJdCQND6yr2AcM-0yWc5KGeZS_mWmNM3yaVsTJUl_lROm_yABARne2t6pZVyAkKz-_g8Us6pWieMuq-Y8sfLvx748vA_AAD__6BMcfE), a physician assistant from Austin, received $5, a cowboy hat, a year's supply of queso from Torchy’s Tacos, and a thumbs up from Glen Powell’s mom, who was among the crowd at the event. The real Glen Powell sent a video message congratulating the participants and offering a special prize: a cameo in his next movie for a family member of the winner. Powell is [currently working on](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS0Wd2BsBoYu3tK1owU5iE-COLJRnLx95e6dvuGTftL_5zpfAxd-3L9DTb698zqjQnMBuKCdKXD5zEaSj4ocyORh0GhRWavl4hX2mmLCYDSgctHd3IjkwphBZ0tKsj8xALQAOGrVOZN0Hk3se2vJjb0wKhG3devaklp6hz2Xz_pKW3dbqyx-ae25C_0lcBI4HcfRcaV4ngKnR6jpnAoG0A1G4CQ3T8-DS-HdDsKoew1c_qz2b9zL428AAAD__8ecTpc) a dystopian thriller called "The Running Man" and a comedy series called "Chad Powers."
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LGO8yAQBOCnwV0sWPAaFxS_FKXL316JcFjbSGBbQHzJ25-c_q7eT6uZ-brbuwsxrPN_l8jU17RZ4KAuQlwArXchvq1qvBm5H0RDRvQSEDiibBZDfBSKK9BDh6MADZN6cPKcRuh75FMTzPlMCEAhQEveDorkpNXYdYh-0B1TnHyoW27rQpVerkzxvR2U28eWmmiWWvfC5D8GNwa3sB5UalszHaG8S6VUTnce5e1Zky3bMz-IyatP-aOiW31Y593NxABPksiHZ2LyurtcV8plCbvQ_KJ4bz-lGWBdXaLyh7GiV1qj7hSqJhu_f4cYQ8GeKT4nF-Infv11z8PATwAAAP__3tp2Cg) **Tested Founder Tackles $505B Challenge** IPOs and acquisitions are perhaps the most coveted outcomes for founders and early investors. Why? _It’s how they cash in_. Well, John Webley’s already achieved each in prior ventures – for exits _totaling a combined $2.7 billion_. Now, he’s turned his full attention to [Trevi Systems](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LGO8yAQBOCnwV0sWPAaFxS_FKXL316JcFjbSGBbQHzJ25-c_q7eT6uZ-brbuwsxrPN_l8jU17RZ4KAuQlwArXchvq1qvBm5H0RDRvQSEDiibBZDfBSKK9BDh6MADZN6cPKcRuh75FMTzPlMCEAhQEveDorkpNXYdYh-0B1TnHyoW27rQpVerkzxvR2U28eWmmiWWvfC5D8GNwa3sB5UalszHaG8S6VUTnce5e1Zky3bMz-IyatP-aOiW31Y593NxABPksiHZ2LyurtcV8plCbvQ_KJ4bz-lGWBdXaLyh7GiV1qj7hSqJhu_f4cYQ8GeKT4nF-Infv11z8PATwAAAP__3tp2Cg) to address $505B worth of problems. Trevi’s patented water treatment tech purifies wastewater and seawater at half the energy cost and a third the thermal cost of traditional methods. It can even recover precious metals like lithium and nickel in the process. It’s no wonder why they’ve received 14 government grants, commercial deals to supply water in Oman and Kuwait, and a projected $8.7m in revenue this year. But that’s just the start. [Trevi has ambitious plans to _30X revenue by 2028_](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LGO8yAQBOCnwV0sWPAaFxS_FKXL316JcFjbSGBbQHzJ25-c_q7eT6uZ-brbuwsxrPN_l8jU17RZ4KAuQlwArXchvq1qvBm5H0RDRvQSEDiibBZDfBSKK9BDh6MADZN6cPKcRuh75FMTzPlMCEAhQEveDorkpNXYdYh-0B1TnHyoW27rQpVerkzxvR2U28eWmmiWWvfC5D8GNwa3sB5UalszHaG8S6VUTnce5e1Zky3bMz-IyatP-aOiW31Y593NxABPksiHZ2LyurtcV8plCbvQ_KJ4bz-lGWBdXaLyh7GiV1qj7hSqJhu_f4cYQ8GeKT4nF-Infv11z8PATwAAAP__3tp2Cg). Proven leadership, breakthrough tech, a detailed roadmap for success, and one of the least elastic markets around – opportunities like this don’t come often. [**Invest in Trevi and secure your stake in the future of water treatment.**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80LGO8yAQBOCnwV0sWPAaFxS_FKXL316JcFjbSGBbQHzJ25-c_q7eT6uZ-brbuwsxrPN_l8jU17RZ4KAuQlwArXchvq1qvBm5H0RDRvQSEDiibBZDfBSKK9BDh6MADZN6cPKcRuh75FMTzPlMCEAhQEveDorkpNXYdYh-0B1TnHyoW27rQpVerkzxvR2U28eWmmiWWvfC5D8GNwa3sB5UalszHaG8S6VUTnce5e1Zky3bMz-IyatP-aOiW31Y593NxABPksiHZ2LyurtcV8plCbvQ_KJ4bz-lGWBdXaLyh7GiV1qj7hSqJhu_f4cYQ8GeKT4nF-Infv11z8PATwAAAP__3tp2Cg)

**➤ Goldsmith:** Multiple fire departments responded to an explosion at a Phillips 66 gas plant on Saturday. It warns of severe economic consequences if legislators don’t provide additional funding to address the situation. | | | | | | Tuesday, November 26, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1835, Texan forces defeated a group of Mexican cavalrymen in the . Thinking that the cavalrymen might be carrying pay for the Mexican army, the Texans attacked them only to discover they were transporting grass for the army’s animals. If you prefer to let someone else bake your Thanksgiving pies, you might need to get in line now if you want one from . Did someone send this to you? Keep The Texas Flyover coming to your inbox by . We're sponsored today by , offering an investment opportunity you won't want to miss. Abilene ⛅ 64/34° | Amarillo 🌥️ 63/33° | Austin 🌤️ 68/48° | Brownsville ☁️ 78/66° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 72/59° | DFW ⛅ 62/40° | El Paso 🌥️ 76/46° | Houston ⛅ 70/52° | Lubbock 🌥️ 63/33° | San Antonio 🌥️ 69/49° | Texarkana 🌤️ 62/41° | State Wants More Control Over Crypto Mining The Public Utilities Commission of Texas (PUCT) has requiring cryptocurrency mining facilities operating on the Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) grid to register with the agency to ensure the grid’s reliability. Bitcoin mining has surged in Texas, particularly after China . However, it has drawn criticism for its high energy consumption and noise disruptions in local communities. As of 2023, five of the 10 largest Bitcoin mines were in Texas, using 1,212 megawatts of energy. According to estimates, crypto mining represents between 0.6% and 2.3% of total U.S. electricity consumption. President-elect Donald Trump has floated the idea of , and Sen. Ted Cruz has said he wants Texas to “be an oasis for Bitcoin.” The new rule requires crypto mining facilities to disclose their location, ownership, and electricity demands with the PUCT or . Report Highlights State's Water Woes A report by Rice University's Baker Institute highlights Texas' and deteriorating infrastructure. It warns of severe economic consequences if legislators don’t provide additional funding to address the situation. Commissioned by the nonpartisan advocacy group Texas 2036 , the predicts that if Texas experiences a drought similar to that of the 1950s, it could lead to reduced energy production, $160 billion in annual GDP losses, 800,000 lost jobs, and significant population declines by 2030. By 2070, the state’s water supply is projected to be nearly 6.9 million acre-feet less than needed, the amount of water required to supply as many as 20.7 million homes for a year. The report calls for in water supply, infrastructure repair, and wastewater systems over the next 50 years, with state and federal funding expected to cover $40-$45 billion of that amount. Glen Powell Look-alike Crowned A drew hundreds to Austin's Auditorium Shores on Sunday, celebrating the local actor who has starred in hits like Top Gun: Maverick , the romantic comedy Anyone But You , and the disaster film Twisters. The winner, , a physician assistant from Austin, received $5, a cowboy hat, a year's supply of queso from Torchy’s Tacos, and a thumbs up from Glen Powell’s mom, who was among the crowd at the event. The real Glen Powell sent a video message congratulating the participants and offering a special prize: a cameo in his next movie for a family member of the winner. Powell is a dystopian thriller called "The Running Man" and a comedy series called "Chad Powers." | Tested Founder Tackles $505B Challenge IPOs and acquisitions are perhaps the most coveted outcomes for founders and early investors. Why? It’s how they cash in. Well, John Webley’s already achieved each in prior ventures – for exits totaling a combined $2.7 billion. Now, he’s turned his full attention to to address $505B worth of problems. Trevi’s patented water treatment tech purifies wastewater and seawater at half the energy cost and a third the thermal cost of traditional methods. It can even recover precious metals like lithium and nickel in the process. It’s no wonder why they’ve received 14 government grants, commercial deals to supply water in Oman and Kuwait, and a projected $8.7m in revenue this year. But that’s just the start. . Proven leadership, breakthrough tech, a detailed roadmap for success, and one of the least elastic markets around – opportunities like this don’t come often. | ➤ Goldsmith: Multiple fire departments responded to an explosion at a Phillips 66 gas plant on Saturday. The cause of the explosion is unknown at this time, but it reportedly caused a shockwave that was felt several miles away in Odessa. () ➤ Austin native Baker Mayfield is suing his family’s company, Camwood Capital Management Group, seeking enforcement of a $12 million settlement for funds Mayfield alleged was improperly transferred to the company. () ➤ San Antonio: Hundreds of residents exchanged more than 550 guns for H-E-B gift cards at the Alamodome on Sunday. Event organizer Councilman John Courage called the exchange a matter of public safety, explaining that every gun collected would be destroyed. () ➤ A federal bankruptcy judge ordered a new hearing to determine if satirical news outlet The Onion should be allowed to buy Alex Jones’ Infowars website. Jones argued the Nov. 14 auction was not transparent and that it was marred by collusion. () ➤ Houston: Mayor John Whitmire announced a new $70 million initiative to get homeless people off city streets, clarifying that a previous proposal for a city-sponsored encampment had been scrapped. () ➤ Austin: Google is suing a former employee who worked in India and is now studying for his doctorate in electrical engineering at the University of Texas, alleging he posted photos of a yet-to-be-released Pixel smartphone on social media. | Peter – election season doesn’t end after a presidential race. We understand everyone is feeling a lot of different emotions after Trump winning back the White House a few weeks ago. However, we can’t back down from this fight for 3 reasons:
1. Elections across the country will take place in 2025.
2. These elections will be the first tests of Trump’s extremist MAGA policies.
3. State and local governments will be our main line of defense to stop the Trump circus.

In short, we have a lot more to fight for during these next 12 months. To stop the corruption and chaos, we need to become defenders of our democracy. [Blue Amp is working around the clock to support Democrats running for office in 2025, defend Democratic values, and hold Trump and his cronies accountable. But we need your help. If you can, please chip in any amount – $10, $20, whatever you can spare – to put democracy first and to build up our resources for 2025.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0a7d752-19c4-49f2-96b2-e38230119d19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2727851-70b6-4e7b-a314-109dc17417b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

body:
The Justice Department [dropped all charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvgzAQRn-N2YzuzgaawUMXtnTtiByfCZeaOMJuaP59Rfdun_RJ7-l9nqezlyT364dfo6tzngjIakRN_cRe0muyDbs5RoqmiQ4HQz3BCaFZHHQBCT1ZsEMIDAaBfc8ezJvpZouNuIOGSD2i6WBo_eVkTsBdAGP5EgZlIbLUvLW3LPe6xDm98jNubchrk9xS66Mo865oVDTu-976H8nleBWNB1vRiHjsTtF48-FLl1Xqouv2vT40Bx18iZqlrFJK5GZz_NglJSn9Ib-uXtKfrP4X_3T0GwAA__8wwVm2) against President-elect Donald Trump in the federal case charging him with conspiring to overturn the 2020 election.
