# Tuesday, November 26, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1922, British archaeologists Howard Carter and Lord Carnarvon opened [King Tutankhamen’s tomb](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFutDAQBOCngc7IXhv4r3DxN3SXNiUyeI03Mfhkbw7x9tFFaVN_0sxo3u_z3VGiY3tzO1oOeQYJRiglYJi9o3TNpvU2IALqFq0aNQwgb0q20UJY196MGqQ0Rpp_2I9KexWcDrJflG_JvtKUgkEp3cuxc8tN36TvV6mNX9axMRI9cS7dR6aDI4Z05SeWbs17m2xkftRG_29gamA6z7OLVDmX6-UNTBypCu8uQYf4lQYmV9boMKe8UeUq8GAsgvO-iBzEJx2b4C9ui_WPk1KiOrxmbLuj9FPLf93wtPAdAAD__0zyYLc) for the first time in over 3,000 years. In today's edition of _The Flyover_ , we tell you where to find the world's [best Christmas light displays](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGngc3Id3YgDB66sKVrR2TsA7s6cGS7QXn7Ks3c_a9PP31ft_lmI8dj-7Q7mbqmGSVqASCwn72N_Jx1681KhKRaMjAo7FGOINtgeqWxH5SmRTqNowLlAEY7enVZ_HW9ttG81gCwB1AXOXR2GdUo_cVJpf3ihkZL8rGm3H2neNRAKz_Tg3Ln0t6yCbXeS6M-GpwanM7z7NxRs30Qv5MGp80yU45UGpxQwpsOrzpQJlGTKETChRxL3W0RHLdQi7A5_Rxe1EDiTJl9m42_n5E5lv6l2nYb-U9R_3vlYfA3AAD__zfPY_M), the coziest city in the U.S., and the most festive train rides. Enjoy! Today's sponsor is [Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL2OqzAQhZ_GdEG2BwwuXFwpSpfbbokGPIBX_kG2k1XefkW23m1nPh2d73zcpzs67-L2HwOZuqZJctldhLhINVl0_jV1jTUrkSRoyIgBpJJcC97sxi5qnm0Heh3HkTqBvR60Qs3HGWYUsnHmTBNCKiGg50OLswbNbb9w6Oy8DKzjZF1Nuf1MLtadVv9KT8rtkkLjzV7rURj8Y_LG5M3FJ5XaHrhgSSdxnuH2qGEq6ZEXYnC1If_8PUbr4nbgRkyqkwlk3SMwuB6Ya6RcdneIkV-gh-nty6SqEQOVP5hJ8KEfAfjIdZONPb6c966o02QL6Py7ef1tyaeR3wEAAP__C-lzmA); be sure to invest with them before their share price changes on Dec. 5!

## Charges Against Trump Dropped
The Justice Department [dropped all charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvgzAQRn-N2YzuzgaawUMXtnTtiByfCZeaOMJuaP59Rfdun_RJ7-l9nqezlyT364dfo6tzngjIakRN_cRe0muyDbs5RoqmiQ4HQz3BCaFZHHQBCT1ZsEMIDAaBfc8ezJvpZouNuIOGSD2i6WBo_eVkTsBdAGP5EgZlIbLUvLW3LPe6xDm98jNubchrk9xS66Mo865oVDTu-976H8nleBWNB1vRiHjsTtF48-FLl1Xqouv2vT40Bx18iZqlrFJK5GZz_NglJSn9Ib-uXtKfrP4X_3T0GwAA__8wwVm2) against President-elect Donald Trump in the federal case, which charged him with conspiring to overturn the 2020 election. Special Counsel Jack Smith submitted a motion to dismiss the case, which was granted by Judge Tanya Chutkan. Trump was [indicted in 2023](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQBp8GOiN7TUwoXFxDl2uvRMa7hM0ZG9lOUN7-xPV_O5_0aTR_HvPDceD4_O12snVNM0johVICzIyOw3fuW7QrEZBuyapBgwE5KtluFu5ej6QG4wZcPd5AKQTZj3hfUbvFtGyvN6XAKKVvcujcMupR4s1L3ePih6aXhFxT7l6JY91oDd_0odz5tLfBbrUepdG_GpgamM7z7OLiI53l2huYjhS4si8NTK93qexJIB0u151ivaDzf0XZuW5i5UBFYE6HeLkojPCby88LpegCiprf-yGyj07dlTFDmy0eJ4fAxVyaz91x-K9Vf8r0sfAvAAD__7nna78) on four felony counts, including conspiracy to defraud the U.S., obstructing an official proceeding, and conspiracy against rights. Smith's filing [stated his request](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7-OhCAYBPCngW4NfCBoQXGN3V57peHPh7KHslGiu29_8frtJpnkN5mf-3i3Kad1-rYLmhrLCAzkjfMbqDHYlN-jpMFEREBB0XAtQAHrOaOzAR9t4JLJEL3ATnPFFIMuuKg7511Hk7k0zkFxLlqmG-t60bPQeiZkcF4TyTCkWrbmUdJaZ4z5XQ7cGl8Wms1c63Mn4ovAQGA4z7Nxzl8dgWHFcycw2K0mn_GKXk5H0L-v16MtdDPheaac066ulWmxKf-r9dPLw8BfAAAA__-ArFP8) aligned with the DOJ's stance that sitting presidents are immune from federal indictment and criminal prosecution. Trump [responded to the legal victory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFurDAQheGnMZ2RPcOau4WLK0V0G6VLiYw9LLOxMcLOrnj7iPSpj3T06f-8jTfHkdf7u0tk65xHUNBJrSWYMTiOx9g1wc5EQNiQ1T2CAXXVqlkseGP6yz_yCKbvcMJOeQoKeg-zmxAatueb1mC0xovqWzdd8arCxSvswuR70SkKXPPePjKvdaE5HvlJe-tzaqJdat2KwP8CBgGDm_xKr9Le8zkLGD5y5Mq-CBhCXl0Msu7faZM7lS2vociH81-yJK5LkSk_SQYuiUuRM8W8HgKGUvN-CBw4CHzT2oBGDdDsNmwvjpGLOY335Dj-mupfjZ4WfgIAAP__s9hpHA) on social media, describing the case as “empty and lawless” and saying he “persevered, against all odds, and WON.”
## Israel-Hezbollah Near Cease-Fire Deal
A cease-fire deal [to end the Israel-Hezbollah](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvWFxhwPJwNDFW7p2tDAcMdXZRIBipb--cvduT_qk956-r_t8d4nT_vh0G9kW84wSRwEgUM_BJX7PYx9sJEJSPVkwCjXKG8h-tUgYjFZyuXjlzVXqSGQINBryY6SlT_ZsA0ANoC7SDG65qZsMFy_VGBZvulFSSC2X4Tunva0U-Z1fVAaft57t2tqzduqjw6nD6TiOYV_8Tkc9eYfTGU-QC4cOp1SLIxYr_SyZ2a1iyy8SnnOlIjy5SiKmQqL43cEVtIK-2PA8EnOq-jzz2Fziv_H2n4yXxd8AAAD___PTYiw) conflict was imminent on Monday, according to senior Biden administration officials. National security [spokesperson John Kirby](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8GOiIYsBMXFK9xl9duaWEYh1kRiIDE8t-vvP3WVzr36Hzdl7ujRPnx3z3R9q0sIMEIpQSMS3CUjsXwYDdEQM3RqquGEeSkJI8WDMIg1wGnddN-BDms2ulgpFHuZtTEyZ40pWBUSg_yenHrpCcZBi-1Cau_MiMxUC_18l0o94hbOsoH68WXJ0829v5qTP9jMDOYe8RIKZ0bgznj3hL2jrUxmANumBuK7DqV7JJo6N-V-sFgHuTpexMeXcONKgqfSkNBWSRcXS5Z7JE6iljeDUVzx0nk1YbXTilRG0_Px9PR7zfvf3X6WPgJAAD__1boa0o) didn't release details of the deal, saying it was close to completion. Israeli officials said Prime Minister Netanyahu’s security Cabinet will meet today to discuss the proposal, [though key issues](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ8GOkfetQG7cPE36fK3V6KFXQefDI7ASpR7-hPprxyNNPrm-7qNN0o5bff_tEqosYyo0SoAhf3IlPJ7tC2HKIJiWgkwGOxRe9DtEpDjRNE4MB5g8DIPTOTAaNc7C1NsUzjXALAHMJ0eLjR54zV3szaWp3lorBZOteyX75K2ukjM7_KU_TKXtc1hqfVxNOZfg9cGr_TY5HWc1Rn2muYsDV7TsZNktdBKh1rkZyo506IyVTmqwk5t5SnrJLv6XOuxY0S2Pjob0Vpkx54FXUfgDEO7B368Us7p6E---0opf3jqX36eAX8DAAD__0-sZTU), such as Israel’s right to respond to potential Hezbollah violations, remain unresolved. If signed, the deal would also [establish a five-nation monitoring](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn8N3ojgsHEyMHRhS9eO1tmcw1XEWIBipb--cvdun_RJT0_v6z7dkRNvj098kmtrnkBBL7WWYKeAnN5T3wW3EgGZjpweDVhQN6266ExQCsJVXde5D2jsotDqdbTzcKURe9WxO2lag9XaDGq84HwzNxWGRZk-zMsoekWBWy6X78xbi7Smd35RuSz52SUXW9urMB8CvAC_vfdc23kJ8CdYgNf63IMAf-SSgtzoqAI814KUZKSfOaeEUS6EleTKhWQgTPLgFnmThXCJstCeSxPgu-LCfnBKXO3p9ngipz-X9l-bl4PfAAAA__98d2VX) committee, led by the U.S., to oversee the border and facilitate the return of displaced people in Israel and Lebanon after a year of fighting.
## List: Thanksgiving Dinner Costs by State
A ranking of the 50 states by the prices of a [Thanksgiving dinner for 10 people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ_GdFiwgJ0UFH_jLn97pbUBbO8dgZxZxcrbn3z9laORZj59H7f5hpSprP_xkTwvdQYFVmotYZgjUn7PVkS_pATJiOT1aGAAddVKbF6ZFNA6OxpnQoAFLqjdOLgL2nhBDIL8uaY1DFobp8Ye71dzVdEFZWy8h7GzKkXiuveflQpvacnv-kp7H-pDZL8xP1tn_nUwdTAdx9EXbBG_z7qDCXemkFPrYAq1sdxqYyqr5A3LV1vpdYZIpaRdYs7SKdkYOTWx-_g8KGdqw8mwPpDy7yf_5eDl4ScAAP__X8BfmQ) shows that Georgia is the least expensive at $58 and Hawaii the priciest at $80. Nationally, the average price for a holiday dinner for 10 is up nearly 20% from five years ago, though down about 5% from last year. Key decreases include the prices of turkey, sweet potatoes, and whole milk, while processed items like dinner rolls and cubed stuffing saw the largest increases. See the cost of [Thanksgiving dinner in your state here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ_GdFiwgJ0UFH_jLn97pbUBbO8dgZxZxcrbn3z9laORZj59H7f5hpSprP_xkTwvdQYFVmotYZgjUn7PVkS_pATJiOT1aGAAddVKbF6ZFNA6OxpnQoAFLqjdOLgL2nhBDIL8uaY1DFobp8Ye71dzVdEFZWy8h7GzKkXiuveflQpvacnv-kp7H-pDZL8xP1tn_nUwdTAdx9EXbBG_z7qDCXemkFPrYAq1sdxqYyqr5A3LV1vpdYZIpaRdYs7SKdkYOTWx-_g8KGdqw8mwPpDy7yf_5eDl4ScAAP__X8BfmQ).

body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.

| | |

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuadq0o95a937kbonpsv2kp0m4l69180qp2nmc2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdj69pb4c5h2bs)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk2kirip6khnegrd3cucajs97n66nt7aqakm2a5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdj69pb4c5h2bs)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zldurg19tbstjo2p1qudacft3me8fha7f0870u7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdj69pb4c5h2bs) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo8rq1bekd1ndiijqeif74mhp522negc688lom18_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdj69pb4c5h2bs)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---

Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgij1usp6gtdv48lih9o5ntl9p3k94ga76l4hbt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdj69pb4c5h2bs)**

name: History Facts
subject: The chord that changed Western music forever
body:
Even if you haven’t heard of the Tristan chord, you’ve likely heard the sound itself. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68c760oy3g2gk084xarplqouqg6ypectfue49cp8eab3y80oygw8ih7jzgvyogput1lfuhm9led44v2mdw1lxwz6etaicrto9ukmm0mdwq46znvt28q13o4kv7aqaunh3312fwq9ogobcipbs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [In 1865, a single chord changed Western music forever.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| E ven if you haven’t heard _of_ the Tristan chord, you’ve likely heard the [sound itself](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). It was introduced to audiences on June 10, 1865, when Richard Wagner’s opera _Tristan und Isolde_ premiered at the National Theatre in Munich, Germany, and its unconventional tonality went on to[ transform](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Western music.
---
The augmented sixth chord (F, B, D#, G#) is fairly simple in and of itself, but subverted the long-standing musical tradition of a dissonant chord quickly being [resolved](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). In the case of _Tristan und Isolde_ , a tragedy about two doomed lovers, that would have been too easy. Instead, the unresolved tension of the chord reflects the sense of longing and yearning seen throughout the plot. The tonally ambiguous chord opens the opera, and it isn’t resolved until the end of the nearly four-hour performance, when the sad story itself concludes.
To call this [groundbreaking](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) would be putting it lightly. The augmented sixth chord had been used by such luminaries as Mozart and Beethoven before, but had always quickly been resolved. Wagner, in keeping with his characters’ deep pain, [chose to](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) delay that resolution. This influenced later composers such as Claude Debussy, Arnold Schoenberg, and Alexander Scriabin, all of whom went on to influence generations of composers themselves, and the Tristan chord is still being analyzed today.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Several performers and conductors have died while working on "Tristan und Isolde."
Despite (or perhaps because of) its brilliance, Wagner’s opera _Tristan und Isolde_ nearly didn’t make it to the stage. After more than 70 rehearsals for what was supposed to be its first performance, the opera was considered unperformable and canceled by the Vienna Court Opera. Ludwig Schnorr von Carolsfeld became the first singer to perform the title role, but died just weeks later following a fever and then a stroke; Wagner vowed not to perform the opera again after blaming himself for the physically demanding role, and indeed it was several years before another production was attempted. Conducting _Tristan und Isolde_ proved fatal for both Felix Mottl, who collapsed during his 100th performance of the opera in 1911 and died soon after, and Joseph Keilberth, who also collapsed while conducting the opera in 1968. A [study](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snk4ke&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) into the opera’s effects on its composers followed, but its results were never published. Both incidents occurred in the same place: Munich’s National Theatre, where _Tristan und Isolde_ premiered in 1865.

subject: Justice for All? Or just some?

Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vim/?__vbtrk=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vim/?__vbtrk=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vim/?__vbtrk=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9vim/?__vbtrk=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5sookcv9naq7iuttien9qm11u7hpbqfcgu87slg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm4oj4cth2bs)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkvhc5p6c7n7lhndldtiqkhm1h4vc78rpommkh8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm4oj4cth2bs)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zghrjkro4qikhpclrqi6gvapnhhl8eieffjmtpvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm4oj4cth2bs) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---

---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Olivia_Krolczyk=2C_Leadership_Institute=C2=A0?=
subject: Stand bravely with me and Riley
body:
Women and girls have a right to compete fairly, and to private locker rooms.
| Friend, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e575db5f3584404d84d4a311fe3a3934&_e=tdrlV88cBjhRD0JKvEZQuzZALT2bvFOIdJS482DJLbipTmF8_fr2_-xyO5Y1UKV6b19FG56xfRxLn8xqTI4BlpTKWoja2q-O1qD5bnKcrc8j8zVfKgSJLZ1KneHspZdxkf-nZvXOLYwtSEBYux1g2NqDsflfFisHH0VcWmrl4nfh97skn9JJ3iM3_XIyAX0toxq-2_DMdr10uFOwaUbY55C7pYtsaAZGoJMlMxfQrIZpvRqJfHubi41MJJRYVgK_8PJP-rPZuF1B73YgMKqRFMVg98LXhRgMr9xUQXoO0gRTv1gt6JSf4FzMpCC5gEk9xOhQvaZ13_zIJLwvtx-LQt8Z8KPr2Jh_UZi938KOkO9zOFsuTZ028F9fmU38q0qisagNrUQlmFiQOTwZDpORyw%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Friend, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? clean_body: Women and girls have a right to compete fairly, and to private locker rooms. | Friend, They failed me. Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write. Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for using the term “biological women.” The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler: 18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Friend, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000

name: TO: The Trump Family [Sent via Team Scalise]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Message: Happy Thanksgiving and God bless you!

| |
---
| | | **To:** The Trump Family
**From:** Friend
**Message:** Happy Thanksgiving and God bless you!
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb2ladkonff9gnrgejm2d022gu22gu5surnh7eb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34c5h2bs "Wish the Trump Family a Happy Thanksgiving!")
| | [SIGN OUR CARD FOR THE TRUMP FAMILY->](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrpprffp5ieg2kk8jo8nh79q28r0lep7jten4bug_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34c5h2bs "SIGN OUR CARD FOR THE TRUMP FAMILY→")
---

Friend -

Inauguration Day is right around the corner and we couldn't be more thankful to ring in another FOUR YEARS under President Donald J. Trump.

He - and his family - endured a politically-motivated FBI raid of their home, two sham impeachments, bogus indictments in four different jurisdictions, and an endless slog of Fake News hit pieces... _And yet they kept fighting for our country!_

**_[So- in the spirit of the holiday - we want to send President Trump a card to let the Trump Family know how thankful we are that they never gave up.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeo6u5a7oo867376ipiv9pb6svk7bonqd1cgfaoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34c5h2bs "So – in the spirit of the holiday – we want to send President Trump a card to let the Trump Family know how thankful we are that they never gave up. ")_**
| | [SIGN OUR CARD FOR THE TRUMP FAMILY->](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7kq0efo2thu6p60umhca0od670sn7c7sklo63a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34c5h2bs "SIGN OUR CARD FOR THE TRUMP FAMILY→")
---

We know you may be busy preparing to celebrate with family and friends, but this will take less than 30 seconds of your time.

**Will you add your name and wish the Trump Family a happy Thanksgiving?**

- Team Scalise

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z53b66mbmahd8o1027dnd5ohh5qedrfqa410anpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34c5h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zca05dtn4k5pgkv4j5spa2eullgk4464h0k6s8b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34c5h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Jeff Witt
subject: I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JEFF WITT FOR CONGRESS
body:
America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership. This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America. |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=51e8c028d981402bb275d8a32bd83b94&_e=4Qz7ges1NLKqCspbFvZU8qxpFzFjCd6O_7zPuCQF-5BoehTHR50VgxCpATvZ3OlALYgPYD3dG3iHUA0PMwhBXviY443tunQ98gEoNiP7HIy8M-W9lFD5YPkebL5Hj8RO3zpC1QCgF9nI43D24e_Hm_XZSe_jN4qlOyxw9od-4mipvHuwtnJVZTMF9DfbEoBJ2Okevj3wLvBB2kFr8fjGxE7sASBMUZ-JawtKB-maVKlWiXOeItZnYIGjGOQzkMqYchzyUjMW23N9EB00oQTX91y2l157vKlBOwrH3_jgy-K0jVQga_TVnYTVKSHN_3oZCr92Bs-Wjm2_a3OwWGIaVNAOewV_TVop16en1Rnw9v_YVs1CYRNSY1U9EgKQxDPWfe03tlsEDE4fOYmEI_ONIQ%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

When I was flying F-16s over hostile territory, protecting American lives and freedoms, I learned a lesson I'll never forget: _courage_ is what separates those who stand by from those who step up.

I was called to serve, and born to fight. Today, I'm stepping up again–this time to run for Congress in Florida's 1st Congressional District in the April 1st Special Election.

**I'm Jeff Witt.**

I'm not a politician. I'm a fighter pilot, a conservative, a businessman, and most importantly, a father and a husband, determined to protect the country my children will inherit. But the America I love–the one that values freedom, hard work, and opportunity–is slipping away under the radical left's control. The country we're living in today is barely recognizable, and I refuse to stand by and let them destroy it.

This isn't a political moment. Our country is at a breaking point.

America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership.**This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America.**

[**Will you help this campaign take flight as one of our very first donors?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=51e8c028d981402bb275d8a32bd83b94&_e=4Qz7ges1NLKqCspbFvZU8qxpFzFjCd6O_7zPuCQF-5BoehTHR50VgxCpATvZ3OlALYgPYD3dG3iHUA0PMwhBXviY443tunQ98gEoNiP7HIy8M-W9lFD5YPkebL5Hj8RO3zpC1QCgF9nI43D24e_Hm_XZSe_jN4qlOyxw9od-4mipvHuwtnJVZTMF9DfbEoBJ2Okevj3wLvBB2kFr8fjGxE7sASBMUZ-JawtKB-maVKlWiXOeItZnYIGjGOQzkMqYP0FOmzVpn0hUJ5IkOr5P2N1o0jY9VwwUPWHJHMxQgkw4pS7n7mqmOdknW1_-vd85r0vGtqqx2c_OMjj9JjSE5wVGTvI1GaYFl0auodB1cOQ8E32uBaAzI0fJyIySZJ78aCDk5HpKmF2A4E_v0Y8FKw%3D%3D)

clean_body: America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership. This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America. | Fellow American, When I was flying F-16s over hostile territory, protecting American lives and freedoms, I learned a lesson I'll never forget: courage is what separates those who stand by from those who step up. I was called to serve, and born to fight. Today, I'm stepping up again–this time to run for Congress in Florida's 1st Congressional District in the April 1st Special Election. I'm Jeff Witt. I'm not a politician. I'm a fighter pilot, a conservative, a businessman, and most importantly, a father and a husband, determined to protect the country my children will inherit. But the America I love–the one that values freedom, hard work, and opportunity–is slipping away under the radical left's control. The country we're living in today is barely recognizable, and I refuse to stand by and let them destroy it. This isn't a political moment. Our country is at a breaking point. America is in desperate need of bold, unflinching leadership.This is the new mission, and the directive is crystal clear: fight back, restore our values, and save America. I've been inspired by Republicans' historic sweep to take control of the House, Senate, and White House. I'm ready to join the ranks in Washington with relentless determination to secure our borders, stop the radical left's destructive agenda, and put America First. Time is short. And the stakes couldn't be higher. The April 1st Special Election is the first major test of 2025 for Republicans, and the entire country will be watching. For America, Jeff Witt Republican for Congress P.S. Be one of the FIRST DONORS to my campaign and help us take the fight to the radical left and the Washington establishment. Every dollar matters in this critical mission. | ★★★ "I have served my country in uniform for 14 years, and my dedication to service extends to the community in which my family and I live. name: The Babylon Bee
subject: An election smackdown
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsJdkVXWN_
Voters have made their voices heard.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osJdkVXWN_

Friend,
Voters
have made their voices heard.
Turns out
the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of
bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics.
For
years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their
woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. That all
changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.
The
absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a
sleeping giant.
Enter
Elon Musk.
Elon
purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a
revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's
frontlines.

Join The
Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee

But,
before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,
it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left's
suppression of thought.
Without
our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH
wouldn't have become such a major issue this election.
If you
appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and
join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free
exchange of ideas.

Yes, I'll
Stand With The Babylon Bee

The left
ignorantly believes that our subscribers - Americans who like to
laugh at the absurdity of our world - are "fringe."
President
Trump's landslide victory proves that there are MILLIONS of
people just like our subscribers - including unlikely Republican
voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan - who believe that free
speech is a critical pillar of our democracy.
While
liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you'll
become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls,
"a future where comedy is legal."
I'll
leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor,
the First Amendment, and America.

Join The
Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee

Thanks
for supporting free speech. We'll never give up the fight.
Seth
Dillon
CEO, The
Babylon Bee

Bee and Beeself

body:

| Peter, Apparently, many on the Left no longer see Thanksgiving as a time to come together, enjoy turkey and catch up with loved ones. Instead, it’s a toxic minefield of possible encounters with Trump-voting relatives that they must [avoid](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/e7a0dc433b247a203bdec81683b7c0f8/eJyNkEFPwzAMhf-Lz82qtkOM3qZpmqqOHRCcUWisLWrrRKm3UKb-d1xAcAGJo-3n7_n5CoykiSsDJbzyW54XkEDAxnqLxBtHrJuPaX6zzIosgc5Suwvu7KG8_rr8LZjbRXa7SoBHjyJ5fFhv6uqwe95Xh1qUXgfx-Cfn7oezvV9Xe5imP8HYW95ehD1AyeGMcyJjJRU_hU70J2Y_lGkaY1wQxiEitovG9Wl0PZJ6cWPjmC0dFZ80tcPRXubCONKdUULsvcJOcNaRkstWxTIXW-09kvn6WY3jp_n0DkF0dqw=) like the plague to [protect their fragile mental health](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/f89ec12df81e38b1a7e479e94f999c2e/eJyNUtFKwzAU_ZfAfFrXpG1cOxAZY8qY-iD6PLLkzkaXtCS31in7d2-n-KQghJBz7rknOZd8MASvPK4Mm7E3fM-ynI1ZAG1bCx4XjUelT9VMFiIXY7a3_uU6NF3LZh-_Nv8IBjoXJR8zPLRAkof7-WK9urve3Kzu1qRsVaA7_ulTlT8-y9v56oYdj38ag7O4fCXvyGYYOhgSGUup8DHsSV8jtnGWpm8T3bgUawhgTdNhGlFhF1NRSslldV7lhZRVxUvBLwPsNjHoC-xpH8kl7vrRdIG9Vq4dYA-A4LZgTixCcMT-YnQqPwUqwrTaSq1Lw8U0K7a5JNEOBDcAvNJQcLk1BsSXoW48tUSxORse0oX9xSnEKJ-Psitafd9PDqpumiESYQoPAZX1jk6EnyFGSHqFRMfENUPoxNho_atFiEltXcKLLC-mRSYnNbo9zVG1LXjz_QnWcPia5vETxMK2dw==) – or a chance to wage holy war against the threat of fascism as they pass the mashed potatoes. [Exhibit A](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/d454d11cd422bee61dc82cc3e1edd7ed/eJyNksFum0AQQP9lDz0ZGxYC2FIUYWRsYuwUCmrNBWFYYMMurGEB48j_XtJWkSK1Uo8z8-aNZjRvgKMqrridghW48huEMpiBBiWYYVRxs654nPyqwgdFkqUZILgqt03dMbB6-2vzB_CeliUdzgAfGZoQ3zPMvX3cRo593E8ki5tpxn96lvqHZ3MwbAfc7_8UI4r5pp_cLVjxpkPvG6V42ooHDZn4gnPWrhaLYRjmY1zU9Typ6YLgDLV8JGhRdO05rlIhiykmo9DXHKXCJKJMwFQQFVEVZSjCecEpecq7JKm7iqPmUfoyBShqUIaaZorjnScmu4PqjEs5lZMuhMs-hFfi0GN__qZ_pqMW54-GaxjGYV26aUSY17_KHuZf5d26D8JrlnavVncIvvt9i_Llzbi2xegKuRlQBW2MoC4vMYYMnwOLFPSy16CZ1Iaib8ws1aTR7p5VdpN1-6XMB4H01jY8hboovoT-84muu92pEEpXdYiuqVJkFVrP86HQrAJqWL8oquf67PbgC3qm20ffOiUjdX5Mx44ZQ1X651P2aPx98vtP0t3Jcw==) (a woman who can’t even look at her husband because *GASP* he dared vote for Trump) or [Exhibit B](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/4242254023148807251a281c915f17b6/eJyNUE1rwzAM_S8-x_HyMehyK6WUkK6HsZ2HSdRGNJaNoyTtSv77nG30tMEuOjw9vQ_dBANp4rIRhbjwR5pmIhIeanQIxBtLrOuvbfqYJ1kSiQ7pvPN2cKK4_Xp8JyxwlqzySPDVQaC8vqw3VXnYve_LQxWYTvvg8U-dp9VdZ_u8Lvdinv8UBoO8HYN2Lwr2AyyNGgyt-M13gd8yu75Qapqm2AFRhyPEtTWKYOpV-pDmKknU0V7kAsjW9txLY40cCGlEhoChkWwlt5rO_QlHpJNskAi81EcOM_gaJyekuGXThVDaBavm56MVXL-jzZ9pn4Gj) (Fox News’ Host Jesse Watters uninvited by his mother from Thanksgiving - ouch!). Yep, that’s crazy. It struck me, amidst the many people fretting about how the Left will get through Thanksgiving, no one has written a guide for us Common Sense folks to handle these crazies over the holidays! What do you do when your niece calls you a fascist, your cousin corrects your pronoun usage, or your uncle threatens to leave the country? But, you argue, we’re made of tougher stuff! No safe spaces needed! What’s this nonsense all about? Ok, so instead of a guide, how about a laugh... Top 6 Tips for Common Sense New Jerseyans to Thrive This Thanksgiving:
1. **Pull out your phone and start a GoFundMe** to cover your uncle’s one-way ticket to Norway, Australia, or some other socialist bastion where he can take refuge.
2. **Take a drink** every time you hear “fascist” or “misogynist” (...proceed with caution depending on how many Leftist Lunatics are around your table).
3. **Take a poll of your relatives** (serious poker face required). Exactly how many days (or hours? minutes?) will democracy stand after Trump takes the oath of office? What is appropriate attire for his coronation? Which department of government should be eliminated first? Be ready to whip out a pie, a coloring book, and a change of topics if someone has a meltdown.
4. **Lead the table in a mournful chorus** of Leonard Cohen’s Hallelujah – (a ‘la [SNL’s Hillary](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/5bfcaf6a85a6bfb2af40631670483655/eJyNkE1rg0AQhv_LnE1FTYsVQjE2WPHjUBIDuchGB7o03V3W2VIb_O9dk5BTAr3OPO8zvHMEQsEEZR1E8EO_vh-AAxpbrjgKSqQg1p62_uPcCzwHDlx8ploaBdHxZvgKTOPAC58coEGhRdbvcZJnVdoUWZVbUjFtb_zT8xxePasyzgoYx7ti_OK0-rbuHiLSBqdGHbetaKMPlv8gUn3kuoM0ZB726C7TWbN71dbWvvR88VZ7sqwb1m5lVfSpsUqmFIru8o8ch7N4_AMWgGhL) after 2016).
5. **Play Bingo** **using our special Leftist Lunatic Bingo card** – [**download our array here.**](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/cf4157094efdc89a6c26bdad6764daae/eJyNkMtOwzAQRf_F66hO7DS1s6uqqopSukCwRsYP1aKxLWeCKFX-nSlFsAGJ7cyZc3XnQsAGFaAzpCVv8M4YJwXJVvvkbYBNDKD055Yt64pXBTn58LLLcUqkvfx6_A1cx7wSoiBwThaRh_v1pu8Ou6d9d-iRTCpjxj898sezvVt3ezLPf4rt4GH7iu6RtJAne21kPLaCx3xC_giQxpbSW9bCBzeNPoYxOljoOFCVElWAzY8DSmhdyoYKyZ9XwrjaalZKp6UySy40a1zD6nLFMBbPbDBfP-vt-RY-fwBQ4HJ9)
6. **Chuckle and enjoy your dinner** – just like the good ole days.

---

| We are hard at work saving our state from Left Wing Lunacy, so saving Thanksgiving shouldn’t be too tall of an order for the Common Sense Majority! And remember, our relatives might be secretly thanking us next year when they have a higher paying job, cheaper gas, less crime, peace in the world, and democracy still standing strong. God bless America! As we head into the holiday, I hope you are experiencing all the joy and beauty of the season, loved ones, beloved traditions, and holiday spirit. We really are entering the most wonderful time of the year. Thankful for you all... For New Jersey,

subject: Official J6 Pardon Petition
body:
I need your name on this!

| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf4bl2eu5gjbbta84n12mqq52194i5f4ve9lidv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34clh2bs)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z964t9m6srqsg7m5kpsrdjlon88v5bjrsenmm7f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34clh2bs)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkmgj7vpqjadgmcnp1nt13m0s01oq2rd8163rjbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34clh2bs)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd8e8h88nrom05sgq6nvv53jkansub5343flenc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34clh2bs)_**_** _._**
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhojhq9o3glqf212dv8r9at0cg8ql2hq6h69et78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm2o34clh2bs)
Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!
_Yours Sincerely,_

# **The Calm Before The _Financial Storm_?**
---

---
| Things seem oddly calm right now, wouldn’t you agree?
---
* The bank failure crisis “seems” like its behind us.
* Inflation “seems” to be under control.
* And the stock market “seems” to be doing alright.

---
| | **But here’s what they’re NOT telling you...**
---
1. 81 countries recently met in Russia to potentially back their countries currencies in gold (and ditch the US dollar).
2. Commercial real estate defaults could ignite the next round of bank failures.
3. Our debt just ran past $35 trillion dollars and the cost to finance that debt is skyrocketing.

---
| | **What does this mean for your money and your retirement savings?**
---
**What does this mean for your money and your retirement savings?**

name: Steve Friend
subject: Thanks to Kash, I stood up to the Deep State
body:
Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job.

|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3jd3fqjakt8b8v9viv9g19qnsmp8rpckusoh4jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)
Friend,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies — both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI’s National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State’s actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu86m20n0dvk2ss2nm98l2dhobtal29vhhqmhn0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)
[Donate](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsh7htbhtg6omse8cd68fh8ts0hcvcu51lbh31e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)
I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI’s unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn’t take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl8eds0qqs8ecbf3ssocph8eplhlai287em0ffe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

**The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.**

Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State.
[Donate $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj2oe7g2fa8233huotp7kkalv0csge5ao38bta20_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsh3ari41mgh73nkcme8gn7flh63jgep9djtn8jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zat3si5t4r1gf2vnteg5hqfnpggcm9oku8c2auv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9cut2g8gj758e0mhjhumc5608ecjf83piant0to_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0veq29inl2um37m1vlm9n6c3l6eko138n8o85a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zad5anf0ptslh5ancm9aumfk47mk1lovrml8ipso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs)

[Donate Other](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsfi6o5qta6fj1nk2pvkis8e5g69sth128un88ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdgm6pr2cth2bs) Thank you,

Steve Friend

Historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has written an insightful eBook, _Victory and the Savior Generals_ , which you can download for free.

Throughout history, certain leaders have turned around seemingly hopeless situations with their unique vision and skills. These savior generals displayed exceptional leadership and strategic thinking.

In this eBook, you will explore the key traits that defined these generals, how they approached conflict, never accepted failure, and adapted out of necessity. You'll learn about their innovative ideas, bold decisions, and steadfast courage and how they turned the tide in critical moments.

Already downloaded by more than 30,000 people in the last 6 months, you don't want to miss your chance to learn from history's most influential leaders from one of our country's most esteemed historians.

This is one of our first opportunities to rally together as a team after the election and show how we are staying in the fight for fair maps. That will include working to ensure a fair count in the census. And it’ll mean enacting redistricting reforms so voters can choose their politicians instead of the other way around.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: I knew I had a duty to take action.
body:

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8546e77f1eb449e393b476bbe1f10cbb&_e=nH4QPZIKW11qyYdse0vTq8lhDynAyv2k0qqfYjc9B6O1d5Y0nH2NJ0NchlC8I8jO3yrQ_ticpfPCx20ChFrcQC_RwSE7IkQSEA-UweCVLtKs4F4znxoML_b6ti7j6yd7vBZCKVekh6BBvCmBR-BVj0dAkstcDxtyIVMm5ABR_IzxoflC-vS7sSHU5GhDzszC-DuCtTVRrVzGddj5YubqpEQjqDPmi0niNFdDS2hATSpvhz3nWq_GlKKHfj2VGBhM0JGrR-VRZK1-HzGWsdT9f8V4oFBpaAU0kH7THdg7aRfo77tPFgaOOaaKn-gGrXQZgGWXcc3ZACXAPTJrce_ITuJwB5cYHDfcUwFJik_tOpsq_4UGLhO7yED6yXh0-oK5tBCxF8rq7qHQe2kx5f6i3Q%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. clean_body: When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action.| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

| | Peter,

As we look ahead to 2025, it’s clear that our most critical battles will be fought at the state and local levels.

With a second Trump presidency looming on the horizon, we must build a robust network of state and local leaders who will guard our shared values, protect the heart of our communities, and build a promising future.

**This is more than a survey — it's a roadmap for progressive change.**

As The Collective PAC shifts our focus to prioritize these key races, [**we want to hear from you: Which state and local races are most important to you?**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38etALaB2A0_pShuGOpdyBt8EoshvprBzCLcqXBEO58ivsL08qEj3sYZNl8FGFx_7uqEi4HjIKVqO34pyEvkVtgmGJultFLuVEL4-_1YWcpfX0wlutBrfFNXmW8SbcK8KHalyfXfBM3aHSpbZS-S9bprL-foglR2UWOMVyS3qGWcW3GcCz5qonWVkGw_8nxvhw81YXbihslEz5LsNtdLHcdGTxIcFtSXXGndV8fnCejOzfdNDyqXjTY2gz_C-BSCOMTDT9mrOXwlKsNIIFS8aVi48l_uyKsMrTbRPt3cs17QX1vDK4FstKTNbk-CYPSS44JWKvah5eRvdyB0J49iOM0/4bs/EZNUfh8DReWs80ZD_U08Nw/h1/h001.hdex8r_WSChfyMZd5C4ZK3_H0H9uzp6fQevqNj-fva0) | | [Share your thoughts here→](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38etALaB2A0_pShuGOpdyBt8EoshvprBzCLcqXBEO58ivsL08qEj3sYZNl8FGFx_7uqEi4HjIKVqO34pyEvkVtgmGJultFLuVEL4-_1YWcpfX0wlutBrfFNXmW8SbcK8KHalyfXfBM3aHSpbZS-S9bpz46q2spUP-1lsEUjxnbuhLH8j0pPyBI2P-oeszMFSp5SIDlxiCwwrWtl6Omr8pcfqbaai19vNRuz13cIwYbKbawYz7hOKeVs6JpyyCHkNJ55kLz2-fy6LlgdYl33VIPq7lBJD9icAaIm_LFhs4sntZ8otjXTyFqPyqyueVFB78gk9ASv-RgGTYMshLVXl4x6/4bs/EZNUfh8DReWs80ZD_U08Nw/h2/h001.v4y-YQ8_Nsru_m1OMNTJXtDsad-Zb2xKz7LNVOMUjFs)

Together, we can continue to build Black political power, elect the leaders our communities deserve, and prepare for the years ahead.

— The Collective PAC
* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPo7KHQxuVFpYzPhN1nqqy6BA31hB-xmIoLo_9nX_9wdgxA4_cA39YIiAO9WRQGGBmvXSXDWxY5ZdHQX2YCuqUPTr6ODUuc3zJrmeugHstftFqPNXcjWmImD_6u_bQDqCIBB_X5IFD7cqVZiuaLzIA1S4s5wcv-m1iBIUBjPPeJmvRI7TmBJRicjjUihMJMMVLvoy9s6JAommuF7Mk2RcAE-i19XhQT0kt6c8nvf0cYwJ7IA09vRDPAdwi37aZWVYBZbvtee0CK20SseLZYyeRvFHESFb06bPlExLTSukSLlfeERMh2wn7l0bUT9zURDjrA/4bs/EZNUfh8DReWs80ZD_U08Nw/h3/h001.jVIwtn-djMcxlfgu-TB7d3FWVvMF5RMP04kT1pu_KXw) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

The anti-dollar drive spearheaded by China and Russia is spreading quickly. **Can this "Evil" plan be a threat to your wealth?** [**Learn More**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=53rc7snc83wn16whxuu0dd37ob5lsrc7f02g1ux29eabhorkkhfhg0q1yw8ucyoog37srack41jzzpl752c14rb8k7slhgom2iwtg5s438uxuvnykq4aj94jioqw0vfyaigagrb60xik3f5t3w7tnrj9p5tlgi21p2p0t7fzdxccpmco44o5fi7rqjtnyyohvi89m7spweittk4kgevl3ldf48w5uss10qm11szk4cd0ybcinyh8leo33qh74ewhvm1xatdv157m5k1g9z59afx6yvgqqioincxe&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)

* * *
**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwixlsguv3v7elzmaweipjc3agrr38q73fnkulg0x0ys78z6qt888crjwzk2lhj5jb98m2rcsu1lgs0ux95zmhntjq1vszk1bn6ifnpluufofa5iz3s1qv43dk3sqyb1t0w0aa5104fw3zqobwy292if9h2dceswv497q7j777pssxbeqgtlxn2lpd56dl95zueihlp5spv5f62t8sol9b20ibxi2cz1y60dd2rcxifbf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwixlaqswajx2pqd17uqewpkq0ybjzgqb04h37x852xr4yqb3mxy1t5otl6lwgo7zn31db2syx8egll3roo8oshjaq2a5ev51aqk1kltyxadb2s1fhjy4bt9lxz3xvsrx7vthmydfz79sgc5dnazcbg3l1obrwow4pu5mfcl2605kn4rwq8ypmfhqetapuzj1gxrdmkjwsa4dst26ed8xn5i2wkfrc4zxnuyuvmkfrg5s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwixlhkqymnknd67pg7j771f36g0e3mym6jdzrorb4wq2067e3klg7gdrmri5ed9oiih9nb6earxhvja9rufq2sprq3egj48q1ylmywlcaw6wsc70ar6ghgs796ces7fbqul1j4uz5wkg21kf2d98odqa7yz4o8vbyd37rwcj4yhs0v2bjl95mwdrfg5l22as6pkyywbavf3bchz555tij9d8snceby9wt0tm0670kgxk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)** [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwiy03uozhcnx4jzcsjrxfbzep1nyucfhpca7z3z96volpjcsjopykw6oxaecd6n2ucacknikdyqi3i93ubqra0f6q4jw1bncqh0vm6tgdrxrh0o7sidx27yqicplol7fxus8vy9szka79pdgffgblabppiwf44vmi0141que39wjbjbhtbhjmnzsh6zwxtrgu6ttk6teyk2a1m83tvd8vpyqnaa5b3hvyuo1t1r8th1r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h) For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwiy0n2mbt4agub433yk0sputv8ysk71swvwdgggf8unidb95cbdrb9x9ijbnbxoe4wu8wkz4gf7izgfjxhlt9x8jq6296mr2e31djdlkgn0n9mtq9qon8weywm169cxjetjr640m6opwsbwiwis7yy02w6uti0ui58l0z8mz1imrrop11subm2vtiv564i78fl0p9e9ic31ynaf1fk0w5ttw71xuaxtue06ejizs0ht9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwiy0uy8d2v23iswrcosr31p6brjnpz91doto2y2pmtmg5sdgw358rl0786xia0qtcqnc7xpmk00j7fqdb2wuh5aaq76kmhur5n30xpu2j6r6zwyx1hj1qjkg7fap6u01ltqxexd3ac2ja1pknl1b9vmdcss6ziutqtij922u0ulj4d06x75t9frujhydamkz5dv8xq20f80wy3q06o9hdxoc2quha33tju1wqdhzvhjm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwiy0c66ezjrpm80ep1kfbb7hhz85f3syk5pimp9jos9dv8mvpsv16ar4vrutyrs7o857g83t16fjddlxe95wsc4rq8nzrsxduv498l0701g21gddgptdxn51hpnw39q66sher3tj73emhp7031z6isxsicphreu2zcgfghgol5bqg5zo4je99wnvl84p7bc1tw23ilg4ioluitkkucv7pb7hjds8zwbt2linhz3h2ipi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. That is why we are giving you the[**free Wealth Education Guide**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwiy0jc4g9neyzlt4ldt8op2x1gv08va84kmsu4ttqr8ailf86fifjpg1gar2wgtik1kbsgfz4pykncwrhrcy2mw6q9sow1b3hd5tiwun2j8js4ikyh2tdan9uikd00empsol1x8cbtta2b01g48avpi630nw7atzilecsby7jeqivwmtaar19n7x0wxkd4trfowl8xy8ltkt6ivih4eulf31f4pxz2ns8td3ouo2xifl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h), in addition to **FREE $250** worth of silver with any qualified purchase above $10,000.

This guide is a valuable resource that shows you how to navigate these turbulent times and make informed decisions about your financial future. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwiy15m2hgc5i1cjtyslyl0jm81fgzlhfnd70bhb1sq7ymdnj07mya38l5jnzv9vyvhe73tvf7wrkhb59kynzzgljqmx1ayes8l6cw60r5ezegr25roz7k1tt6sxjie6qwrg5a2lw7h71m0f3x6g66n6h9m98lwt968cz2vq2ir4q8kjz8r1f923y1j3wmv8g553gw7qp2yjrtn4h7v1gxik7atmkyvjrplxgfpwm4j9e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)** [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=1b9gpd5x3dst5zotvhasup82alaplnwiy1og0js4v5rupg96u1xadlq94b3s3quw3wjyixup6vaugxfwarqezit688taxo5bxac49lmd8lrzc41eib9rraqnbcf7hey77l7duv8a2a8b7o7g7k4qzag094fvwudrnomwcpc8iqtoy5o9rzf8twrw6jdssgrtavap5jh1fhkpwee5ax8elz39x5fk08sjybhf6t5dipdbbfvjn680fpvg8ny1vqvtsym8etzjbp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkart&__onlt=h)

body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0e100cebf5d246298aa859a7149c3ebd&_e=MZWp9czbb9KssDBxsXBYTxPeBk2K5K8qjJ3mvnwHetky-BirB2jVDQ4vvd2zHovRM7sCqZuZGUd5mrYv0wtWOEpaKuCI77tjmkMUj3MYz5-r-vIggPNjU9HSodo0sFFuYS1_yUpsn-nG-uUkc8RxpdeIihtFzkS6urydTuuycLh7qYntm2vgKezOJxgspot6Mt0ANiANcTe1H2RLunRhpw%3D%3D)

## Trial Testimony Highlights Fraught DEI Issues at Naval Academy
Can the U.S. Naval Academy continue to use race and ethnicity in admissions decisions, even though the U.S. Supreme Court expressly forbade the use of race in college admissions last year in Students for Fair Admissions v. Harvard and Students for Fair Admissions v. UNC? name: Steve Friend
subject: From Special Agent to FBI Whistleblower
body:
My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath. However, it nearly cost me everything.

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn0qfoj8mco1j7lm81eec6492sn91beio1urtkbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)
Friend,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies — both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI’s National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State’s actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z13fin8o8e1m30kc63l5ehpvhmv51duo2al1jerg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ac5e2kp5d8u33rn1o6cpna4gvh9un73h1gd8ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)
I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI’s unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn’t take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo5u1o9hmib5h845ilm644a0qtfk6h9mmc86es88_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

**The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.**

Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State.
[Donate $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zserg75cpbm6e7lruk0jmq25skrgju96k916j7i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8000uchkoqlhd2egrtluc8a0toapa0f4lb24hqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3921k128vmonsnao4c975pjaeklo5686spq8t8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvkbdkl37to9tjvl5j9k5via3ni2l3b1lvejvq5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjg91esm6hd4ghc1obp4m6q4toa4omorr6uucen8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2q9sldcj38jpm21oeo73edntaem9cie5pgkepgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs)

[Donate Other](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlqbdqofoig51n850pfd13d9mgjij22fe68q3r4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim0pj2cjh2bs) Thank you,

Steve Friend
