**Bridgeport and Westport have very little in common except how they voted in the 2024 Presidential Election!!**
In the 2024 Presidential election, 72.75% of the voters in Bridgeport voted for Harris and 26.15% voted for Trump. In Westport, 71.41% voted for Harris and 27.16% voted for Trump. _**These results are nearly identical.**_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/39550a91-c5f0-4bff-90d1-41b74c36c273?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Marek Studzinski](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9ea1481a-5a5a-46dd-ac56-3d840d8a161c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3dad2d30-bb15-442e-a0fc-7db6b08f454a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for reading Michael's Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..6_d_cir8XbvO6RvEQieOYm0CH7kGvbm4qhiens-N6LY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151873742)
In New Canaan, which is socioeconomically similar to Westport, 55.76% voted for Harris and 42.16% voted for Trump. This is approximately a 15% difference in favor of Trump between Westport and New Canaan. In the middle-class/working class towns of Shelton and Oxford the numbers shift more in Trump's favor. Trump garnered over 58% of the votes and over 60% in Oxford.
The Congressional race results were very similar with a few exceptions. In Bridgeport, incumbent Jim Himes outperformed Harris by almost 3% and in New Canaan, Dr. Michael Goldstein outperformed Trump by 4.4%. Beyond that the results were almost the same.
A previous article, "[Democrats Have Abandoned Working Class Americans](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/98f16616-ba80-48b3-bbe7-4e83a7153f7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" offers some insight that explains the results of the election.
The Democrat party is controlled by the Brahmin Left a group of highly educated progressive left thinking individuals.
"According to Thomas Pikkety a French economist, the Democrat party has been a party that has shifted its base from the party of slavery and the party of poor whites, and has evolved through the party of the New Deal and to its current state of being the party of intellectual elites and minorities alike. (see [Article](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/98f16616-ba80-48b3-bbe7-4e83a7153f7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
One group that has been excluded from and overlooked by this new Democrat party is the working class. They get up every day and go to work earn a pay check usually at a job that they cannot zoom into and watch their purchasing power shrink daily from rampant inflation. **The shift in votes across the country (except CT) were a referendum to the abandoned working class.**
The Green energy policies that were on this "elitist" agenda of the Green New Deal was also destructive to the working class that actually have to pay for their energy consumption.
**Westport Has Gone Left**
Westport, based on the data, has become a town of Brahmin Left voters. The demographic is comprised of highly educated progressive left thinking voters who voted for Harris and subscribe to the progressive left's thinking ideology. _**Per capita income in Westport ($131,155) is over four times that of Bridgeport (**_**$30,251)**_**. The poverty rate in Bridgeport is almost four times that of Westport.**_
Yet, for Bridgeport, a mostly minority and diverse ethnic community that is significantly poorer, the city votes just like Westport. This is despite the fact that Bridgeport is negatively impacted by the consequences of the liberal policies of the progressive left.
In **Westport** , the economic consequences of progressive liberal policies that have resulted in higher energy costs, inflation, massive illegal immigration and rising crime have not impacted the Westport voters to make any changes in local or federal leadership.
In **Bridgeport** , higher energy costs, inflation, increased crime and massive illegal immigration and one of the worst school districts in the state all has a direct impact to the citizens of Bridgeport. However, because their ideology is so linked to the Democrat party, most Bridgeport residents have ignored or overlooked these adverse consequences and still vote Democrat. We saw it at the polls - the party machine had their printed palm cards for Row A and the cheering section at the polls.
In **New Canaan** , which is socioeconomically affluent but not as wealthy as Westport, there is a mixture of Brahmin Left progressives and highly educated conservative voters. This resulted in shifting the vote by approximately 15% in favor of the Republicans. _**However the Brahmin Left does outnumber their more conservative counterparts by 13.6%.**_
The more working class and middle class towns of Shelton and Oxford are adversely affected by the policies of the Brahmin Left including inflation, with higher energy prices. _**They do not support the social policies of the progressives which include the Public Benefit charge of 29% that is being added to their monthly utility bill. Many of these voters supported Trump because of the impact that Progressive Left policies had on them directly.**_
The harmful policies of the Progressive Left in Connecticut will be defeated when voters in cities like Bridgeport realize that it is time to change course and vote for candidates who will reverse the economic harm of the Progressive Left. The hope is that they will see a direct improvement in their lives with a Republican controlled federal government and make course corrections as early as next year's local races throughout the state.
**The Brahmin Left of Westport is unlikely to change**. Economic success under the Trump Administration will hopefully wake up the middle of the road voters who vote Democrat and lead to turning Connecticut from a blue state to a purple, red state in the midterms.
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein

Judge grants Jack Smith's request to dismiss Jan. 6 charges against Trump, appeal dropped in Florida docs case

"The American People re-elected President Trump with an overwhelming mandate to Make America Great Again. Today’s decision by the DOJ ends the unconstitutional federal cases against President Trump, and is a major victory for the rule of law," Trump spokesman and incoming White House communications director Steven Cheung said in a statement.

"The American People and President Trump want an immediate end to the political weaponization of our justice system and we look forward to uniting our country."

Special Counsel Jack Smith's federal Trump cases cost taxpayers more than $50 million, financials show

Special Counsel Jack Smith's investigations into Donald Trump over the last two years – which he opted to dismiss this week – have likely cost U.S. taxpayers more than $50 million, according to Department of Justice expenditure reports.

Trump called the probes against him 'empty and lawless' in response to the decision to drop the charges.

name: Samuel L. Jackson
subject: Join me in honoring our heroes in uniform.
body:
Please, sign the card.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
I've played tough guys on screen, but nothing compares to the toughness, bravery and sacrifice of the heroes who step up to serve our country every day.
**That 's why I'm partnering with the USO to collect 100,000 signatures before Thanksgiving to thank our brave service members around the world who always stand ready to defend us and our freedoms. ****[Will you join me in your show of support for those service members who can't be home with their families this Thanksgiving and add your name to our card?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-ehpLyAbsx/bDIvd1BSSGFlNVhRckhQbGZCSzhMWG56U1l4YWlDaUZUazlETTFWMUtDbXNDcUZJdWZxVkszNzVpbzFZb2ZFRkZ3dmdZS2VwTUJBcHI1SFNhaEJvdHlqdnB1S3UrQVVMT2VvdTdiY1BYL0E9S0/V2crdUFFYUxGVFluN1daQ21zS1lzQlhPWHVFMHprQkM1OTFPK1IrNGFhcTNWNDFxeURhdHh2NW12L2EyVFN3TXZLa1BtS2lnOGk5djB0YWNLZG5CTHVGamNWdUpnY00vS0)
---
Most of us only ever encounter villains at the movies because there are active-duty service members around the globe who are always there for us to face the worst threats to our safety and security.
And when our heroes are deployed far from home in difficult, dangerous or even hostile conditions, a note of appreciation and gratitude signed by Americans from across the country goes a long way in letting them know that their service and sacrifices do not go unnoticed.
**[So please, join me in signing the USO's Thanksgiving card so that we can reach our 100,000-signature goal.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-ehpLyAbsx/bDIvd1BSSGFlNVhRckhQbGZCSzhMWG56U1l4YWlDaUZUazlETTFWMUtDbXNDcUZJdWZxVkszNzVpbzFZb2ZFRkZ3dmdZS2VwTUJBcHI1SFNhaEJvdHlqdnB1S3UrQVVMT2VvdTdiY1BYL0E9S0/V2crdUFFYUxGVFluN1daQ21zS1lzQlhPWHVFMHprQkM1OTFPK1IrNGFhcTNWNDFxeURhdHh2NW12L2EyVFN3TXZLa1BtS2lnOGk5djB0YWNLZG5CTHVGamNWdUpnY00vS0)
---
These heroes defend our freedoms daily. Let's remind them that America stands with them, today and every day.
Add your name next to mine now. Thank you.
**-- Samuel L. Jackson**

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: America’s diet stands alone in the world
body:
Thom Nickels | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Thom Nickels_ : First-world diets_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a2600768cb&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| “While traveling with fellow journalists several years ago in the Middle East, one thing became apparent to me: most of the writers on the trip had food issues.

One writer claimed she could only eat gluten-free food; another writer ate only kosher foods while a third was an orthodox vegan. The food issues surfaced from our very first meal when the gluten free scribe began bombarding the waiter with questions: Would he list all the menu items that were gluten-free? When the waiter rattled off a number of dishes, the scribe then had him go to the appetizer and salad items until much of the menu was critiqued and analyzed.

Although this particular writer was one of the most delightful people on the trip, when it came to food she became the culinary version of Joseph Stalin...."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0c98d30056&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## About Thom Nickels:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a438a4ecb6&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Thom Nickels is a Philadelphia-based journalist/columnist and the 2005 recipient of the AIA Lewis Mumford Award for Architectural Journalism. He writes for City Journal, New York, and Frontpage Magazine. Thom Nickels is the author of fifteen books, including “[Literary Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0cb83562f1&e=b7b3eddce2)” and ”[From Mother Divine to the Corner Swami: Religious Cults in Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=22b610bb40&e=b7b3eddce2).” His latest is “[Death in Philadelphia: The Murder of Kimberly Ernest](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3ab846031e&e=b7b3eddce2).” He is currently at work on “The Last Romanian Princess and Her World Legacy,” about the life of Princess Ileana of Romania.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/26/2024
body:
Colorado Springs has ‘a hometown Jussie Smollett situation’. A look at a mayor’s alleged deception
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
I hope you're having a great start to this wonderful Thanksgiving week! We'll likely slow down the newsletter in the next couple of days as we give our team some time to be present with their families. However, if there's breaking news, you'll be hearing from us here in the newsletter or over on social media. In the world of politics, you never know what could happen!
Here's what you can expect from today's Mountain Minute:
**Here in Colorado...** Colorado Springs finds itself at the center of controversy as allegations surface that its mayor misled federal investigators in a [hate crime hoax investigation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, Denver faces significant backlash as its [mayor doubles down on sanctuary city policies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), vowing to resist federal immigration enforcement despite concerns about the strain on local resources and safety.
Also, a [new plan to conserve mountain lions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) while addressing human-wildlife conflicts was approved by the Colorado Wildlife Commission, [Casa Bonita’s employees are unionizing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Cañon City voted to build a new swimming pool, but [not to fund it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
On the national stage, Trump pledged to [charge Canada and Mexico 25% tariffs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as one of his “many first Executive Orders”.
**An update on President-elect Trump's latest key appointments...** Brooke Rollins as [Secretary of Agriculture](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Sebastian Gorka appointed [White House Senior counterterrorism adviser](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Scott Bessent as [treasury secretary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Russ Vought to lead [budget office](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Dr. Marty Makary, chosen as [FDA Commissioner](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to address healthcare transparency and chronic disease. Here's an interesting take by Vince Bzdek on all of [Trump's recent cabinet picks](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and what they mean for his upcoming presidency. Meanwhile, developments in the legal and political landscape feature Special Counsel Jack Smith seeking to [dismiss Trump’s January 6 case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, November 26, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado Springs has ‘a hometown Jussie Smollett situation’. A look at a mayor’s alleged deception](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado Springs is dealing with “a hometown Jussie Smollett situation.”
That’s how Todd Watkins, vice chair of the El Paso County Republican Party, described the hate crime hoax involving Mayor Yemi Mobolade. Watkins, a former U.S. Customs and Border Protection official and U.S. Army analyst, says political violence in El Paso County has risen during the last nine years.
His remarks highlight the seriousness of the allegations of an alleged hate crime that may have impacted the outcome of a municipal election.
Three individuals have been indicted for their roles in the hoax. But the DOJ has reportedly declined to charge Mobolade despite evidence of false statements. The FBI found that Mobolade allegedly denied contact with one of the indicted individuals, despite evidence of texts and a phone call.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Canada, Mexico to face 25% tariffs, China 10% until borders are secure, drug importation stops, Trump says](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President-elect Donald Trump has announced plans to impose 25% tariffs on imports from Canada and Mexico unless they strengthen border controls and curb drug trafficking, particularly of fentanyl.
* A 10% tariff will also be applied to imports from China until measures are taken to halt the flow of fentanyl precursors and other illicit drugs into the United States.
* The move underscores the administration's focus on combating the escalating opioid crisis, highlighted by a significant increase in fentanyl-related deaths in the U.S. over the past decade.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Amid opposition to newly approved mountain lion plan, CPW commission urges respect for employees](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Parks and Wildlife (CPW) approved an updated East Slope Mountain Lion Management Plan, shifting focus from population suppression to stabilization and reducing hunting quotas by 23% in 2025-26 and 25% in 2026-27 while setting a 22% limit on adult female mortality to maintain stable populations.
* The plan, which consolidates six management units into one, faced significant public opposition, particularly against hound-assisted hunting, with critics accusing CPW of favoring hunting groups over conservation.
* CPW emphasized the scientific basis for the new plan and urged respect for its employees amid claims of misleading the public, highlighting the complexity of balancing conservation and recreational interests.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Casa Bonita’s employees are unionizing. What are they hoping to gain?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Employees at Denver's iconic Casa Bonita restaurant, including performers and backstage crew, have voted unanimously to unionize, seeking improved safety measures, fair wages, and better communication with management.
* Entertainment workers such as cliff divers and magicians will be represented by the Actors' Equity Association, while behind-the-scenes crew will be part of IATSE Local 7.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Cañon City voted to build a new swimming pool, but not to fund it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Cañon City residents approved the construction of a new $24.8 million pool but failed to pass a mill levy to fund its operations, leaving a $330,000 annual funding shortfall.
* Despite financial uncertainties, local leaders and residents are determined to proceed with construction, emphasizing the project's importance to community morale and regional economic health.
* The Recreation District plans to seek additional operational funding in a future ballot measure while navigating financial risks, such as potential higher construction costs and impacts on bond ratings.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Kalam: Denver Mayor Mike Johnston’s insurrection rhetoric](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY AHNAF KALAM, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_In the wake of the recent electoral landslide — a decisive repudiation of unchecked illegal immigration and the catastrophic security failures at America’s borders — one might have expected local leaders to reconsider their stances on sanctuary city policies._
_Yet, in Denver, Mayor Mike Johnston has chosen defiance over reason, doubling down on policies that disregard the will of his constituents and the authority of the federal government. His response to President-elect Trump’s nomination of Tom Homan as “border czar” is nothing short of insurrectionary._ ___Mayor Johnston took to social media to unveil a bold, but deeply troubling plan to block any federal efforts to deport illegal immigrants in Denver. He went so far as to claim that, if federal agents attempted to enforce immigration laws, not only would local authorities intervene, but 50,000 Denverites would also rise in opposition. Such rhetoric not only signals a direct challenge to the rule of law but also exposes an astonishing disregard for the legitimate concerns of Denver’s citizens._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Devotional: Wisdom and understanding are essential to living a life of celebration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 23** _Do you have the capacity to truly enjoy life? Not just parts of it, but all of it — every role and responsibility: personally, in partnership, parenting, professionally, and even planetarily (globally). Can you find joy regardless of the circumstances, situations, or people involved?_
**[Two more elementaries to close in Western Slope district, school board unanimously decides](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 23** _A special board meeting for Mesa County Valley School District 51 on Friday evening led to a 5-0 vote to close Clifton and Scenic Elementary Schools._
[**Graham: White liberal women are ‘The Mean Girls’**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY JEN SCHUMANN | COMMENTARY |****NOVEMBER 20** _Why do other women keep telling me they’ve been unfriended for voting for Trump? Why is this a thing?_ _Having been through it myself, my pulse quickens and suddenly I’m in junior high and there they are. The mean girls. Today they are white, liberal, women, living in self-reflecting vacuums and their entitlement runs deep._
__

name: The Forward Party
subject: What Went Wrong?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A lot...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=1)
---
Tuesday, November 26, 2024 | Peter -- Yesterday, we wrote to sum up how truly crazy the 2024 election season was. It’s easy to normalize experiences that you live through, but, when you see them all laid out like that, it’s **hard to believe what our political system has become**. In a functional democracy, getting elected (or reelected) requires you delivering solutions to the people who are voting for you. But, because of the _**slow corruption** _of our political system by the legacy parties, that’s no longer necessary. How did they do this? First, they have made it increasingly hard for independent and new party candidates to even get their names on the ballot, let alone truly compete. With only two options on the ballot, it’s now a matter of just being better than your opponent. Then, they have _**gerrymandered**_ districts so that fleetingly few significant elected positions are truly competitive - by some measures, fewer than 10% of them. They’ve driven so many people out of each party by their actions and statements that an increasingly large plurality of the electorate no longer belongs to a party. This trend has happened despite many states featuring closed party primaries, not allowing these independents to vote in any primary. The only people left to select the Party candidates are the most partisan among the parties. So, in short, the legacy parties have ensured they’re the only ones on the ballot. They split up the country, gerrymandering districts so that there isn’t real competition. Then, they drove anyone not bought into their agenda out of the party so that they can’t vote in primaries, ensuring party control over all aspects of our election process. **The two legacy parties have corrupted our electoral system so that it’s focused more on their maintenance of power** than on delivering solutions to American voters. It seems a lot harder than just listening to voters and solving their problems, but here we are. Addressing these structural issues is one approach to solving the problem, but, as we’ve seen, there are powerful interests aligned against them, and the two parties fight back every chance they get. They can spend millions to fight against ballot initiatives. They can pass legislation raising the bar for even getting the initiative on the ballot. What they can’t do, however, is stop you from ** _voting for better people_.** And so that’s what we are doing here at Forward \- building the infrastructure so that better people, those who want to listen to you and your community and deliver real solutions for them - can win in this system. How? Look for an answer tomorrow, **Lindsey Williams Drath, CEO** **Matt Shinners, CSOO** [](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=2)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=3)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=4)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_went_wrong&n=9) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Thank You!
body:
I want to wish you and all those close to you a very happy and blessed Thanksgiving!

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I want to wish you and all those close to you a very happy and blessed Thanksgiving...
...and I want to **thank you** for the interest you have shown in Judicial Watch!
Today, as we anticipate big changes in Washington, DC, I would like to ask you to consider making a special contribution to help us fight **_for_** the rule of law and **_against_** public corruption.
We could not have undertaken the many investigations and lawsuits that have had such an impact on fighting secretive bureaucrats and defending the America people’s “right to know” what their government is doing without the support of our members.
[And we could not be as effective as we are working through the legal system and the courts without your help!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71278&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71278&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Now, our work is more urgently needed than ever before!

_With your help,_ Judicial Watch will keep fighting as America's indispensable, independent watchdog...

_With your help_ we will be working closely with President Trump to deliver on the promises he made to the American to undertake _all legal means to end illegal immigration_!

_With your help,_ we will continue to be the national leader in forcing states to clean their voter rolls... _the single best defense against voter fraud_.

_And With your help_ , every day we will keep suing the federal government to release public documents that "we the people" have a right to see!

**_In short, with your help we will keep fighting every day for the rule of law and for accountability in government_****!**

But the challenges facing us will only increase in the months ahead.

[And I would be very grateful if you can help us today with a special gift so we can keep fighting for you!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71278&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71278&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Please accept best wishes from our entire Judicial Watch team...we hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday...

**AND I AM EAGER TO WELCOME YOU TO OUR FAMILY OF MEMBERS!**

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

clean_body: I want to wish you and all those close to you a very happy and blessed Thanksgiving! | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I want to wish you and all those close to you a very happy and blessed Thanksgiving... ...and I want to thank you for the interest you have shown in Judicial Watch! Today, as we anticipate big changes in Washington, DC, I would like to ask you to consider making a special contribution to help us fight for the rule of law and against public corruption. We could not have undertaken the many investigations and lawsuits that have had such an impact on fighting secretive bureaucrats and defending the America people’s “right to know” what their government is doing without the support of our members. | Now, our work is more urgently needed than ever before! With your help, Judicial Watch will keep fighting as America's indispensable, independent watchdog... With your help we will be working closely with President Trump to deliver on the promises he made to the American to undertake all legal means to end illegal immigration! With your help, we will continue to be the national leader in forcing states to clean their voter rolls... the single best defense against voter fraud. And With your help , every day we will keep suing the federal government to release public documents that "we the people" have a right to see! In short, with your help we will keep fighting every day for the rule of law and for accountability in government! But the challenges facing us will only increase in the months ahead. Please accept best wishes from our entire Judicial Watch team...we hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday... AND I AM EAGER TO WELCOME YOU TO OUR FAMILY OF MEMBERS! Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2024, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

name: Steve Friend
subject: From Special Agent to FBI Whistleblower
body:
My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath. However, it nearly cost me everything.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhhd155n0p4pgtbgdcmif0sp1tlicd8h77mtpiio_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)
Friend,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies — both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI’s National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State’s actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd2sr11365evtm2nh4t65hbvhlck0b64r7tf662g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztsls22bii242jsjvt9flne7logjqiumiajmf3d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)
I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI’s unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn’t take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4ns4aklsbsj62mp4r3poitrcf6tejj2fiadqsno_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

**The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.**

Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State.
[Donate $10](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5f88j8j0na7rt35726fkv865fa9sq9vpn54ujfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zodim56dtjecet8oqib9f3g2ma1somnf2dra7frg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrqqi3dsotsem2hprcafsa13h6076g1pqojh1k9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z07878ra5s2hbs6opc0efsu25c37e6qok12n8e6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7p8hak60joe30ccbthlq4dst094fnrjdsbshq8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd05g0uijkeh5eqmqe8senrjtnnbrcuf1c96vsbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs)

[Donate Other](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0dcdt9aqkit1bgjbsmv3im0pls3omdto7dkk5o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cdim8oj4cph2bs) Thank you,

Steve Friend

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my
freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice,
and rights of every U.S. citizen.

body:
| |

| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNjIxOTM5MDk1Nzg1NDQ1NjgxJmM9ZzZhMyZlPTAmYj0xMzg5MzE2MTEyJmQ9cjZzM2U3Zw==.d7g-YFsYy0xzI-HkFS8Z8qyQu1QXdu-Jq8DxwYyZmhw)
| | |

| As Texans gather together with loved ones this Thanksgiving, we at TFVC want to take a moment to express our **heartfelt gratitude for you**. This year, thanks to your unwavering support, we’ve made incredible strides in the fight for medical liberty and vaccine choice. We have pushed back against mandates, empowered communities, and **stood strong for the rights that matter most**. We have also seen massive electoral victories that give us immense hope for the future of vaccine choice in our great state and across the nation. Your dedication is what makes this movement so powerful, and **we are thankful to have you alongside us every step of the way**. This week, let’s take time to be thankful for our **health, our freedoms, and the future** we are building together. From all of us at Texans for Vaccine Choice, **we wish you and your loved ones a joyful, blessed, and healthy Thanksgiving.
**

---
| TFVC In Action
---
---
| |
---
| **Dr. Aaron Kheriaty, MD**
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| TFVC President Rebecca Hardy was recently invited to an evening featuring Dr. Aaron Kheriaty. A now former Professor of Psychiatry and Director of the Medical Ethics Program at UCI, Dr. Kheriaty was **terminated for advising the university against mandates** during the rollout of the COVID jabs. He is a plaintiff in the **landmark free speech case** Missouri v. Biden challenging government censorship on social media. His story was inspiring, and his humbleness, love for country, and faith in God **shined with his every word**. His suit jacket lining features the names of **fellow doctors and scientists** who also had their views on COVID-19 censored by the Biden administration and social media platforms.
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | As Texans gather together with loved ones this Thanksgiving, we at TFVC want to take a moment to express our heartfelt gratitude for you. This year, thanks to your unwavering support, we’ve made incredible strides in the fight for medical liberty and vaccine choice. We have pushed back against mandates, empowered communities, and stood strong for the rights that matter most. We have also seen massive electoral victories that give us immense hope for the future of vaccine choice in our great state and across the nation. Your dedication is what makes this movement so powerful, and we are thankful to have you alongside us every step of the way. This week, let’s take time to be thankful for our health, our freedoms, and the future we are building together. From all of us at Texans for Vaccine Choice, we wish you and your loved ones a joyful, blessed, and healthy Thanksgiving. | | | | | | | | Have you been looking for a way to get engaged with the TFVC mission? With just 8 hours per month, you can join the best team in Texas...Team TFVC! Apply today to be a TFVC Outreach Coordinator. Our next round of training is in January! | | | | News | | | | | , Dr. Ashley Prince of Prince Health and Wellness went all in on educating and empowering her patients to live their healthiest lives. | | | | | | Representative-elect Andy Hopper (HD 64) pre-filed HJR 91 that proposes an amendment to the state constitution establishing a right to refuse vaccinations. | | | | | | TFVC OG and Blaze Media darling Sara Gonzales broke down Rep-elect Hopper's HJR 91 proposal and the state of vaccine choice in Texas in the of Come and Take It , her podcast with Texas Scorecard. | | | | TFVC In Action | | | Dr. Aaron Kheriaty, MD | | | | | | TFVC President Rebecca Hardy was recently invited to an evening featuring Dr. Aaron Kheriaty. A now former Professor of Psychiatry and Director of the Medical Ethics Program at UCI, Dr. Kheriaty was terminated for advising the university against mandates during the rollout of the COVID jabs. He is a plaintiff in the landmark free speech case Missouri v. Biden challenging government censorship on social media. His story was inspiring, and his humbleness, love for country, and faith in God shined with his every word. His suit jacket lining features the names of fellow doctors and scientists who also had their views on COVID-19 censored by the Biden administration and social media platforms. | | | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice | | 1540 Keller Parkway, Ste 108, #166, Keller TX 76248 United States | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- You received this email because you signed up or made a purchase from us.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Happy holidays from Team Sorensen!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/w47RGGuR88BUchknehc4cg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpKGrOP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZz_f5UVnlwpgKFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Hi Peter, I hope that you’re about to start a wonderful holiday season surrounded by friends and family. As I spend quality time with my family and loved ones, I can’t help but reflect on how grateful I am for everything you’ve done to re-elect me to represent Illinois’ 17th District. Together, we built a grassroots movement around our shared values, and we brought back the first-ever LGBTQ member of Congress from Illinois in a difficult climate. For that I thank each of you. I know that for me, I’m not really in the holiday spirit until my partner Shawn whips up his pumpkins bars! And as a small token of gratitude, I want to share my favorite recipe with you: [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/YU9DFO-0v6PPPGNaycnqLw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpKGrOP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_Y2l0eT1DcmVzY28mY291bnRyeT1VUyZlbWFpbD1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTQwZ21haWwuY29tJmZpcnN0bmFtZT1QZXRlciZsYXN0bmFtZT1XaWxsaXMmcGhvbmU9JTJCMSslMjg3MTclMjkrODY3LTUzMDkmcmVmY29kZT1lbS0xMS4yNS4yNC1hbGwtYSZyZWZjb2RlTm1yb0JtaWQ9NzkxMjc2NDc0JnN0YXRlPVBBJnppcD0xODMyNlcDc3BjQgpnP9_lRWeXCmAoUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~) Now if you’re like me, you probably can’t read that! And that’s because this is a family recipe, and the bakers know exactly what they’re doing. If you’d like to try these pumpkin bars yourself, you can find the actual recipe below. **_Are there any holiday recipes that you enjoy?_** Thank you again for being part of this movement. I’m grateful for your support and hopeful in what we can achieve in 2025. -Eric | **[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/YU9DFO-0v6PPPGNaycnqLw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpKGrOP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_Y2l0eT1DcmVzY28mY291bnRyeT1VUyZlbWFpbD1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTQwZ21haWwuY29tJmZpcnN0bmFtZT1QZXRlciZsYXN0bmFtZT1XaWxsaXMmcGhvbmU9JTJCMSslMjg3MTclMjkrODY3LTUzMDkmcmVmY29kZT1lbS0xMS4yNS4yNC1hbGwtYSZyZWZjb2RlTm1yb0JtaWQ9NzkxMjc2NDc0JnN0YXRlPVBBJnppcD0xODMyNlcDc3BjQgpnP9_lRWeXCmAoUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~)**
---
**Pumpkin Bars**
* 1 1⁄2 sticks of unsalted butter (softened)
* 1 15oz can of pumpkin
* 4 eggs
* 2 cups of sugar
* 2 cups of flour
* 2 tsp baking soda
* 1⁄2 tsp salt
* 2 tsp cinnamon
* 1 tsp nutmeg
* 1⁄2 tsp ground clove

1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
2. Cream butter and sugar till fluffy
3. Mix in eggs one at a time
4. Add can of pumpkin
5. Sift dry ingredients and add to wet ingredients
6. Mix till well combined
7. Bake in 9X13 Pyrex for 25 to 30 minutes or in muffin cups for 20 to 25 minutes
8. *if using a metal pan butter bottom and sides

**Cream Cheese Frosting**
* 1 stick of unsalted butter (softened)
* 1 8oz package of cream cheese (softened)
* 1 tsp vanilla extract
* 1 tsp almond extract
* 4 cups of powdered sugar sifted

1. Cream the butter, sugar, vanilla extract, and almond extract till light and fluffy
2. Add cream cheese till well incorporated and smooth

| Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=390371e05712408eb5f842a9b57a6d9e&_e=OTCOEHSpQOKLUcGRcFmMfMf7KMTgGj1yKZgZXF_gdYS4XxwWqbniGHLvIvDcikfAKKD3k3rn4ikoBxxEHMi0R98nM87e_ACI-XHMiATFe-CnoEhcBm5zs2rcq7R9gKwHVwK3KgQGfIrfAUbHPr2BKLJ3oL0gVkBB058g-Xq3VQB5ZOXqTC54LS5m27dN8dwMV-kKcOQ-MdMsJYQGUIjovoKhzMCajaz6isARQAKm9NN0triFIJO72CP-JsQFpEW2k19UjnI4_HbHxztquFTTbdjvlE1Lf9uOzlrxvuK2s0-wUCi8kT4HrAuUf4W0iq5HU755LF2zIBciyuZrN3NbkQTurLRc-WyloUteE-DmVYLHktxR5jV-bSIDykje4xpmsbdvmIAIxzE7A6RtB1sAbw%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=390371e05712408eb5f842a9b57a6d9e&_e=OTCOEHSpQOKLUcGRcFmMfMf7KMTgGj1yKZgZXF_gdYS4XxwWqbniGHLvIvDcikfAKKD3k3rn4ikoBxxEHMi0R98nM87e_ACI-XHMiATFe-CnoEhcBm5zs2rcq7R9gKwHVwK3KgQGfIrfAUbHPr2BKLJ3oL0gVkBB058g-Xq3VQB5ZOXqTC54LS5m27dN8dwMV-kKcOQ-MdMsJYQGUIjovoKhzMCajaz6isARQAKm9NNXGi5npvMHKTiL8E6VFTMqwuI2_fT4n13O7hdF03XPJZQ7Wxtt3FJrLVQ0aGjXIoaHq9xlNoXGdNquKuy_28hPxR_DZsgFjWAwmG1PjCvIOENd8YEOr40rX8Oh9J0dITbK2dfnk6EJJitg9NHd3kvokxy5-IC9uZTJKx_pJZHOpw%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=390371e05712408eb5f842a9b57a6d9e&_e=OTCOEHSpQOKLUcGRcFmMfMf7KMTgGj1yKZgZXF_gdYS4XxwWqbniGHLvIvDcikfAKKD3k3rn4ikoBxxEHMi0R98nM87e_ACI-XHMiATFe-CnoEhcBm5zs2rcq7R9gKwHVwK3KgQGfIrfAUbHPr2BKLJ3oL0gVkBB058g-Xq3VQB5ZOXqTC54LS5m27dN8dwMV-kKcOQ-MdMsJYQGUIjovoKhzMCajaz6isARQAKm9NMb7Ln5vpjWDbUorxOictwJHC1a2TYp0PgMo2GDzUM5zWRvvoE5PU15rBhWJ-wBkfLE1adMGB16BNvG1uF03n4Ia8XT37UChxXiQYsCAWvlgoi7Y6h6IyYGzfJKzNK0TZ8YwTVAENYxmNfzwQ0GNYC31kYKZ3OU3G1Bp6AaNYF3Mg%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=390371e05712408eb5f842a9b57a6d9e&_e=OTCOEHSpQOKLUcGRcFmMfMf7KMTgGj1yKZgZXF_gdYS4XxwWqbniGHLvIvDcikfAKKD3k3rn4ikoBxxEHMi0R98nM87e_ACI-XHMiATFe-CnoEhcBm5zs2rcq7R9gKwHVwK3KgQGfIrfAUbHPr2BKLJ3oL0gVkBB058g-Xq3VQB5ZOXqTC54LS5m27dN8dwMV-kKcOQ-MdMsJYQGUIjovoKhzMCajaz6isARQAKm9NMmYMo1eLLENMe5Vj4eDzq6wWhRy3nbQfBBc3AfZNkbOLzHf9-8AyvDpS0-DFzbhHWNBtX_avuNdMGJl0VKC--114aU4uIboPqNpgiZ1pj5GVVNyvj6giBdMa98W4_F24hnOpGFQUlZt_mInnBbNIO2ML55QcZVkvCPhKWN45NAKQ%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=390371e05712408eb5f842a9b57a6d9e&_e=OTCOEHSpQOKLUcGRcFmMfMf7KMTgGj1yKZgZXF_gdYS4XxwWqbniGHLvIvDcikfAKKD3k3rn4ikoBxxEHMi0R98nM87e_ACI-XHMiATFe-CnoEhcBm5zs2rcq7R9gKwHVwK3KgQGfIrfAUbHPr2BKLJ3oL0gVkBB058g-Xq3VQB5ZOXqTC54LS5m27dN8dwMV-kKcOQ-MdMsJYQGUIjovoKhzMCajaz6isARQAKm9NNyS42HKrhW3Kl4_fmWkMR4_if9VyYJa1BdBlZfYh-ddWD_-maExjcNEEB33G2_TzvLA5ZKI5QDmbzYe-fJMIxIK6BRqmpzPOgn2gDeiUySwbgTuYl7gUSGwYEinjXmdhJ2gxFrT-PkYPtznLTQCc8GEAFk3WXvVB6auSlV-x9rnA%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=390371e05712408eb5f842a9b57a6d9e&_e=OTCOEHSpQOKLUcGRcFmMfMf7KMTgGj1yKZgZXF_gdYS4XxwWqbniGHLvIvDcikfAKKD3k3rn4ikoBxxEHMi0R98nM87e_ACI-XHMiATFe-CnoEhcBm5zs2rcq7R9gKwHVwK3KgQGfIrfAUbHPr2BKLJ3oL0gVkBB058g-Xq3VQB5ZOXqTC54LS5m27dN8dwMV-kKcOQ-MdMsJYQGUIjovoKhzMCajaz6isARQAKm9NO-mGruzfqGBHHCCQ8rGR1OfLdR4vo8DjCDHdh8XFPMtE5GizNZgJXutx08cgve78n46Tg1QuowJz55YPCFhG1ol24GChdEoMvq4AC77Ezy8oeum-9NpEPwL7De3ELwfCPad0eIGTujBaSkQlXOF5adBduWOTEzEs4jJkWIder-bA%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=390371e05712408eb5f842a9b57a6d9e&_e=OTCOEHSpQOKLUcGRcFmMfMf7KMTgGj1yKZgZXF_gdYS4XxwWqbniGHLvIvDcikfAKKD3k3rn4ikoBxxEHMi0R98nM87e_ACI-XHMiATFe-CnoEhcBm5zs2rcq7R9gKwHVwK3KgQGfIrfAUbHPr2BKLJ3oL0gVkBB058g-Xq3VQB5ZOXqTC54LS5m27dN8dwMV-kKcOQ-MdMsJYQGUIjovoKhzMCajaz6isARQAKm9NMY58XGEu6eAh0nOSuiJc0hys79Wsw2h2Hqqe7cizgquMXydkl7e-Vom_s6o2qu8hBP8_ULHXaKS1vekdE3Wz-k47pJZtaGzuoYQTPYKekGBa2r3zFf3ybATAwRYCmVifJUYw55NvvJL6yXv5MLGbVXjb_TXnBWIKemCcAVA1q7ug%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.

Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

The result of this election at the top of the ticket doesn’t change Emerge’s work. Emerge women achieved an impressive 70% win rate overall! Alongside our alums, we will continue to fight for the rights of every American. Progress is not always easy, but at Emerge, we know what it takes: _**training to win.**_

As an organization that centers women of the New American Majority (NAM) in our training programs—Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women— Emerge alums are candidates of their communities, meaning that they are exactly the type of down-ballot candidates who drive change and fight back against the MAGA Republican agenda.

_**This Giving Tuesday is your opportunity to continue your support for Democratic women and contributing to Emerge is one of the best choices you can make!**_

Emerge women achieved an impressive 70% win rate overall! Alongside our alums, we will continue to fight for the rights of every American. Progress is not always easy, but at Emerge, we know what it takes: training to win. As an organization that centers women of the New American Majority (NAM) in our training programs—Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women— Emerge alums are candidates of their communities, meaning that they are exactly the type of down-ballot candidates who drive change and fight back against the MAGA Republican agenda. This Giving Tuesday is your opportunity to continue your support for Democratic women and contributing to Emerge is one of the best choices you can make! = | = Thank you, A’shanti F. Gholar President, Emerge = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States

body:

Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1a866b2056d242b5b2cdb5895d770d28&_e=e-y-ktmbobvpur82L_Nkp8VGD6uLWgINPcMS4UiXG69M_sIzy1FekHUHLzaOQttQMs1wzNbHBtYR3larLHA-NoWLOHKhJlZOiCSk6rTx_CVTRZlYS0wbiyq3gSt6snxw-iIMIaQPy483hiy-TjZzuqaLLsCMEjJN6FG1sp4qQRnRInwf0YKyOw9G05RhNK8-hYrSBSgNZCWf5xpr7mGmHnNfkVGkjxaRAYNnUPAo5wWPV0j4UldSmxzuDO6TG1KWtydgUtMm2IndTXK0ct7wPh1v7lvsRh54W1YrZr_NzomWMj5RlpW2-xhgSozdCAkA-Aoa9AWgZdodgfwly7CpImLhktSPVXu08GcFAncUnTpnQ6KUIYWc13myS3u8FV4bbsHiIdkxR0w1lRQBFfcq7oKXCWcb3Du7ug-Q2kUtuI3lrRCwM-ai5NH1AbdH6B76OWyAriyT7C_st3nOMVz_k0zJ9ue2hokVA8rd_SJAScTQKbNfy9wY1CTiZRZ3o7Mz)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=1a866b2056d242b5b2cdb5895d770d28&_e=e-y-ktmbobvpur82L_Nkp8VGD6uLWgINPcMS4UiXG69M_sIzy1FekHUHLzaOQttQMs1wzNbHBtYR3larLHA-NoWLOHKhJlZOiCSk6rTx_CVTRZlYS0wbiyq3gSt6snxw-iIMIaQPy483hiy-TjZzuqaLLsCMEjJN6FG1sp4qQRnRInwf0YKyOw9G05RhNK8-hYrSBSgNZCWf5xpr7mGmHnNfkVGkjxaRAYNnUPAo5wWPV0j4UldSmxzuDO6TG1KWtydgUtMm2IndTXK0ct7wPh1v7lvsRh54W1YrZr_NzomWMj5RlpW2-xhgSozdCAkA-Aoa9AWgZdodgfwly7CpIoG4gniVc5XKPtmsPmxErM8KuBzisgNZ3n0aqlY77FLYHaxEtsdIg2wNkH3wGQsAB6IuZkejwvKDPvvLIZPge5vlF9GaSbJIC1U1zA45_Ylfg8Pq031wmtPaogzAioU9IvzN5RRGKHeG08LMLiytwBuHHbh07FIvFw7YSPIvbqR-)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

subject: A War-Torn Holiday in Israel
body:
The holidays should be filled with joy, but for many in Israel, hunger looms... Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

The holidays should be filled with joy, but for many in Israel, hunger looms... | | | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo04iywgxkie4ea3nx8nnbqfqr1u6nrf4beqlucunsmo0l5wx4g3gabo6cgkuroy1srnvtv4k70f74v54du3emnzy0yu4lsm3pp7yg9zt54zsms2o6k18anlhuxp9n8dtifayvavd22ttad0u5vaciad0xlfhcoyqlo37xb9jy5i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkdol&__onlt=h)

---
| | | Every day, we hear from hurting families in Israel. They are struggling—exhausted by the constant threat of rocket fire, the fear of terrorism in their streets, and the hatred they see on the news. As if that was not heavy enough, so many **struggling families are unable to put food on their tables.** But right now, you have the opportunity to extend a loving Christian hand by providing a Holiday Care Package to a family that desperately needs it. Your support will make a real difference this holiday season. With your help, **we can provide food, gifts, and financial assistance to those who are suffering and in need with a Christmas or Hanukkah Care Package**. Imagine the relief and joy a family will feel as they sit down to a warm meal, knowing that they are not forgotten.
---
[GIVE A HOLIDAY CARE PACKAGE »](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo04iywgxkie4ea3nx8nnbqfqr2k6ad964uvv8wjv5m4rrmz0kmynduwfhk69nhqxgk5lqjl4r815yehgqwiq2ssye87uk0ljumybdc7mcfoiah04e1wgjvbdje9ydi49o8n0b86w78zmyaoxgtet59lbvn1wj68ji5kxccwv1by&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkdol&__onlt=h)
For over **40 years** , the **International Christian Embassy Jerusalem (ICEJ)** has stood as a beacon of Christian support for Israel, providing aid when it is most needed. Today, we are once again answering the call, but we cannot do it without your help. By partnering with ICEJ today, you are not just giving a gift—you are sharing Christian hope and love with those who need it most. [Please give right now](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo04iywgxkie4ea3nx8nnbqfqr3a6hql6fhxf3u54le0yzp68h0hwmj75ste4e4ei27x7pzq7vnz4hjd784makuh56127jnogwdo98st7vzbyi2t12xoa25wc5pbfu7ez1jy7dllkdfc73z0zakgo9wy1lkzrux27owimf97fdtn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkdol&__onlt=h) to ensure we can bless as many families as possible this holiday season!
[BLESS ISRAEL THIS HOLIDAY SEASON »](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo04iywgxkie4ea3nx8nnbqfqr4q722b7v8a2krocg9ifhrbsdd4egnft11q08q769t0roofmzr9452yw1zalgx9zvfiiixbdz81eb6d4ou2p39jjp54t6draol608vt0dyjqgdfpoqf3wxabvri7ph8qsy9m3lhselflhdh4t9x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snkdol&__onlt=h)

The **International Christian Embassy Jerusalem** was established in 1980 in recognition of the biblical significance of all of Jerusalem and its unique connection with the Jewish people. Today, it represents millions of Christians, churches, and denominations to the nation and people of Israel. Our goal is to stand with Israel in support and friendship, equip and teach the worldwide church regarding God’s purposes for Israel and the nations of the Middle East, be an active voice of reconciliation between Jews, Christians, and Arabs, and support the churches and congregations in the Holy Land. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: Thanks to pressure, 39 Democratic Representatives changed their votes last week
body:
We need to keep leaning into the bold progressive demands that people want and deserve. | | |
---
Friend, While this month’s elections brought many losses, especially at the federal level, people across the country voted for progressive candidates and policies at the state and local levels. In red states like Alaska and Missouri, **voters passed ballot measures to increase the minimum wage and expand paid sick leave** (which passed in Nebraska, too). In eight states, the majority of voters **voted to protect the statewide right to abortion, expanding abortion access for millions of people** —including states where Trump got a majority of votes such as Missouri, Montana, Nevada, Arizona, and Florida (though Florida didn’t reach the 60% threshold needed to pass).1 In many states where Trump got the majority of votes,**progressive state Supreme Court justices won against Republican opponents** , including Mississippi, Arkansas, Kentucky, Montana, and my home state of Michigan.2 The two judges I endorsed in Michigan won, expanding the left’s majority in our state Supreme Court and ensuring our state’s abortion rights stay protected. Many other progressive candidates I endorsed for November’s elections won, from school boards to State Houses in my state of Michigan to Florida to Delaware to New York and more. **We know that most people are with us** , and while many leftists are feeling sick of electoral politics, we cannot cede this realm of power to the far-right. We need to keep leaning into the bold progressive demands that people want and deserve, including clean air and water, reproductive justice, affordable housing and healthcare and childcare, and workers’ rights such as paid leave. I created the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to help elect everyday candidates who understand their neighbors’ struggles and will always put their communities’ needs first, prioritizing marginalized and working people. We can win at all levels of government, especially when progressive candidates stay engaged with voters and have the grassroots financial support they need to successfully take on candidates who are backed by billionaires. \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rashida Tlaib
Date: Mon, Nov 25, 2024
Subject: Thanks to pressure, 39 Democratic Representatives changed their votes last week
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
**Last week, the House of Representatives passed HR 9495, a dangerous and unconstitutional bill that would give presidential administrations unchecked power to shut down any nonprofit organizations they disagree with.** This attack on our right to dissent threatens the existence of groups like the NAACP, ACLU, Planned Parenthood, LGBTQ+ or environmental justice organizations, Palestinian human rights groups, or any nonprofit organization critical of government policy—including news outlets and schools.
Now we have to make sure this “nonprofit killer” bill doesn’t pass the Senate.
**Even while this bill passed the House, 39 Democratic Representatives changed their votes in just one week and voted against this assault on our civil liberties, thanks to their constituents reaching out to them** and pushing back on their previous “yes” votes.
This affirms that people have tremendous power to move their government representatives and reminds us how important it is to have elected officials who listen to their constituents.
Let’s keep this in mind come mid-January when Republicans control the White House, the House of Representatives, and the Senate: **People will still have power at the local, state, and federal levels.** Transformative change comes when the people demand it, and we cannot stop fighting for the society we need and deserve, where we all have equal rights and freedoms and everyone’s needs are met.
**We know that most people want progressive change and are with us** : In at least seven states where Trump got the majority of votes, the majority of voters passed ballot measures to increase the minimum wage, expand paid sick leave, or enshrine the right to abortion in their states’ constitutions.1 In at least five states where Trump got the majority of votes, progressive state Supreme Court justices won against Republican opponents—including two judges I endorsed in my home state of Michigan. This expanded the left’s majority on our state Supreme Court with justices who will enforce our state Constitution’s abortion protections.2
**I created the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to help elect progressive candidates with working class backgrounds who are rooted in their communities and understand their neighbors’ struggles.** These are folks who understand how urgently and desperately their constituents need change, and who aren’t afraid to push for bold progressive policies to make their neighbors’ lives better.

Thank you so much. And as a reminder: The presidential election was not a landslide. Even with $200 million from Elon Musk and roughly $2 billion from other far-right billionaires, Trump won less than 50% of the vote. There is no right-wing mandate, only the responsibility we all still have to each other to keep pushing for a better world.
People are understandably afraid about what’s coming with the upcoming presidential administration. I promise I will not back down when it comes to protecting our communities and making sure that our most vulnerable neighbors are safe, seen, and heard.
Always in service,
Rashida
