clean_body: We need to keep leaning into the bold progressive demands that people want and deserve. | | | Friend, While this month’s elections brought many losses, especially at the federal level, people across the country voted for progressive candidates and policies at the state and local levels. In red states like Alaska and Missouri, voters passed ballot measures to increase the minimum wage and expand paid sick leave (which passed in Nebraska, too). In eight states, the majority of voters voted to protect the statewide right to abortion, expanding abortion access for millions of people —including states where Trump got a majority of votes such as Missouri, Montana, Nevada, Arizona, and Florida (though Florida didn’t reach the 60% threshold needed to pass).1 In many states where Trump got the majority of votes,progressive state Supreme Court justices won against Republican opponents , including Mississippi, Arkansas, Kentucky, Montana, and my home state of Michigan.2 The two judges I endorsed in Michigan won, expanding the left’s majority in our state Supreme Court and ensuring our state’s abortion rights stay protected. Many other progressive candidates I endorsed for November’s elections won, from school boards to State Houses in my state of Michigan to Florida to Delaware to New York and more. We know that most people are with us , and while many leftists are feeling sick of electoral politics, we cannot cede this realm of power to the far-right. We need to keep leaning into the bold progressive demands that people want and deserve, including clean air and water, reproductive justice, affordable housing and healthcare and childcare, and workers’ rights such as paid leave. I created the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to help elect everyday candidates who understand their neighbors’ struggles and will always put their communities’ needs first, prioritizing marginalized and working people. We can win at all levels of government, especially when progressive candidates stay engaged with voters and have the grassroots financial support they need to successfully take on candidates who are backed by billionaires. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Together, we will keep building the bench of progressive candidates who understand the urgency and the speed at which we need to move in order to make people’s lives better. We will keep building the power of social movements for transformative change, to keep pushing government institutions and corporations and other entities. In my hometown of Detroit, we know that real power comes from people rising together, demanding what we deserve. I will keep advocating with and consistently showing up for the residents in my district, including workers like the Local 283 Teamsters who are still striking for better conditions at Marathon’s Detroit Refinery. Our team has been showing up to help striking workers with shifts, food, and water, and I will always stand with workers against corporate greed. In solidarity, Rashida 1\. 2\. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Mon, Nov 25, 2024 Subject: Thanks to pressure, 39 Democratic Representatives changed their votes last week To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Last week, the House of Representatives passed HR 9495, a dangerous and unconstitutional bill that would give presidential administrations unchecked power to shut down any nonprofit organizations they disagree with. This attack on our right to dissent threatens the existence of groups like the NAACP, ACLU, Planned Parenthood, LGBTQ+ or environmental justice organizations, Palestinian human rights groups, or any nonprofit organization critical of government policy—including news outlets and schools. Now we have to make sure this “nonprofit killer” bill doesn’t pass the Senate. Even while this bill passed the House, 39 Democratic Representatives changed their votes in just one week and voted against this assault on our civil liberties, thanks to their constituents reaching out to them and pushing back on their previous “yes” votes. This affirms that people have tremendous power to move their government representatives and reminds us how important it is to have elected officials who listen to their constituents. Let’s keep this in mind come mid-January when Republicans control the White House, the House of Representatives, and the Senate: People will still have power at the local, state, and federal levels. Transformative change comes when the people demand it, and we cannot stop fighting for the society we need and deserve, where we all have equal rights and freedoms and everyone’s needs are met. We know that most people want progressive change and are with us : In at least seven states where Trump got the majority of votes, the majority of voters passed ballot measures to increase the minimum wage, expand paid sick leave, or enshrine the right to abortion in their states’ constitutions.1 In at least five states where Trump got the majority of votes, progressive state Supreme Court justices won against Republican opponents—including two judges I endorsed in my home state of Michigan. This expanded the left’s majority on our state Supreme Court with justices who will enforce our state Constitution’s abortion protections.2 I created the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to help elect progressive candidates with working class backgrounds who are rooted in their communities and understand their neighbors’ struggles. These are folks who understand how urgently and desperately their constituents need change, and who aren’t afraid to push for bold progressive policies to make their neighbors’ lives better. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. And as a reminder: The presidential election was not a landslide. Even with $200 million from Elon Musk and roughly $2 billion from other far-right billionaires, Trump won less than 50% of the vote. There is no right-wing mandate, only the responsibility we all still have to each other to keep pushing for a better world. People are understandably afraid about what’s coming with the upcoming presidential administration. I promise I will not back down when it comes to protecting our communities and making sure that our most vulnerable neighbors are safe, seen, and heard. Always in service, Rashida 1\. 2\. | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . subject: First, Then, Now
body:
We’re prepared for the next Trump administration. | | | Peter, **_First_** : Donald Trump was elected in 2016 and got to work right away to destroy immigrants’ lives. He tried to revoke DACA, “build a wall,” dismantle our asylum system, separate families at the borders, and more. **_Then_** : UWDA sprung into action, fighting Trump every step of the way. We successfully defended DACA at the Supreme Court, held countless protests and actions, grew our community, and more. **_Now_** : We’re prepared for the next Trump administration. We’ve been gearing up to fight the incoming administration, and we will be doing everything in our power to protect immigrants every single day during the second Trump term. **[Peter, Giving Tuesday is a week away — but you don’t have to wait until then to support our essential work. name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES VOTER REGISTRATION RESULTS FOR 2024 CYCLE
body:
| | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 26 GREATER GEORGIA ANNOUNCES VOTER REGISTRATION RESULTS FOR 2024 CYCLE
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia announced that its 2024 pre-election voter registration campaign registered over 7,000 new conservative voters and re-engaged over 4,000 inactive conservative voters. Inactive voters are those who had not participated in an election for at least the last five years - in this case, since 2018.
"Greater Georgia has become the leading conservative voter registration group in our state - working year-round to expand the tent, rather than taking it down after every election," said Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "Since 2021, we have registered more than 55,000 new voters, who just became part of the landslide that elected President Trump. We've proved our thesis that we can keep Georgia red as long as we work year-round, every year, to grow the conservative movement. Today, as we prepare for the next election cycle starting with municipal elections in 2025, we can confidently say that the movement has never been stronger or more energized." Greater Georgia is the state's leading conservative voter registration organization. Since it was founded in 2021, the group has registered and re-engaged more than 55,000 voters. It has also worked to build diverse coalitions and advocate for election integrity.
In 2024, the group [invested](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AdC6ahwSDy3dHlzoTZEOn6PfgPOSR2wq-GE6-RyR3GQ3VdqlFqxEVbwkRVUrOrC9VmXKereHkAWobTBPsjg9_AtFhkC0QZYerwb_9pTMTXBVwVS4PIYzsudmtYN2Jks11aJOhgl5J60l0fIREwMGRAKFSRXFjSN0VDdIUryomWg6hG5SHBTP72ZUxTONq2Kb&c=lTXWmjCgfo_tjL6cOdfB8hZOv7m4oOxIljIM36TGryN95pv5p5k-cQ==&ch=qGQPNiaex4EGMcQemwvyQ_hTOb38Nx7pvfos6Lybdx0w-zLagKmpwA==) in multiple six-figure campaigns, including an 8-week voter registration campaign that ran from August to October, featuring digital ads, text messages, in-person voter registration drives, and over 115,000 phone calls to unregistered voters.
---
| Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity. ###
Media Contact: [press@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com)
---

subject: How do you think the Indiana Republican Party did in this election?

body:

Friend, it has been an incredible honor and privilege to chair the Indiana Republican Party during the 2024 Election. Thanks to the support of our party staff, grassroots volunteers, and nearly two million Hoosier voters, we secured historic victories for President Trump, Mike Braun, Jim Banks, and Todd Rokita. With this election in the books, your Republican Party is already looking forward to how we can improve our outreach and strategy for the next election. As one of the most engaged members of our party, I want to hear your thoughts and insight on how we can better reach Hoosiers in your community. **[Please take a few minutes to complete the Indiana GOP’s Post-Election Survey today.>>](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=b06059dcbdbf4b569267945728cbc3ef&_e=vgGBS75e5VFDvDRDhjLijVkBzJv_mffjbzh84QeS9PfrBazSvbj30bdNlKFVBRq5EMni2DECNbxLo2S_BbrbJPQ-7SwSnOHk1sHAb9pmLXvh2hHJhOoixToOjV3sYrtsNm0WwkkelTAzpA9XU4GOXhRcInZBtyCIlMS0k_Miqi3CVjDk9V7-Hq3dynIEgihP1Z5op3F51C7XLw2exB6ZwiPlROixH5M9B2wmhDe2aQFgCI5EDzydHgqURIS8KyKEa1VValEbcTdtUbyRNcu4N7kHk5cknZhGSyAqagdUGVOoJ9qElqqtjFr73rtWrK1cefUfK8ADUuXJ0avt9vl7xOfeYa3u6dwtklrN95mfiSlMQPxOxJx_1kQTPsclJmHaZKPiOMWJ6su_Gl4ShDhaTg%3D%3D)**

subject: Sign the petition: Block Musk’s DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Elon Musk’s personal PAC helped hand Trump back the presidency...and now
Trump is returning the favor.

Trump appointed Musk to co-chair a new “Department of Government
Efficiency” (DOGE), which Musk has said he’ll use to cut up to $2 TRILLION
from the federal budget — nearly a third of the entire government’s
spending.

An area that’s safe from the massive cuts coming? Musk’s billions in
federal contracts.

It reeks of corruption. But it's all part of Trump and Musk’s sinister
plan to privatize the federal government – and line their own pockets.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20592?source=email-11262024&t=1015&akid=7311%2E5885482%2E4tbamK ]We HAVE to stop these billionaires from getting away with destroying
our public services, but it’s going to take a MASSIVE public outcry from
all of us. Will you sign the petition to stop Musk’s DOGE in its tracks?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20592?source=email-11262024&t=1016&akid=7311%2E5885482%2E4tbamK ]ADD YOUR NAME

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20592?t=1017&akid=7311%2E5885482%2E4tbamK ][IMG]

Cuts as big as Musk is promising would threaten Social Security, Medicare,
and public services across the country. They would also mean cutting up to
1.5 MILLION government jobs, and, as Musk put it, creating “hardship” for
Americans across the country. And now Marjorie Taylor Greene has been
picked to lead a DOGE subcommittee in the House of Representatives.

But what’s shocking is that Trump and Musk think they can get away with
this while Musk’s companies continue to make billions in contracts with a
shocking 17 different federal agencies. His SpaceX has $3.6 billion in
contracts this year alone, including a new mega-deal to build a network of
hundreds of U.S. spy satellites.

And now his terrifying hold on our government is growing as quickly as his
billions.

We HAVE to stop Musk from this hostile takeover of our government – but to
do it, we’re going to have to mount a massive public outcry that can’t be
ignored.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20592?source=email-11262024&t=1018&akid=7311%2E5885482%2E4tbamK ]It starts now. Will you add your name to our petition to stop Musk NOW?

When we organize, we win.

An area that’s safe from the massive cuts coming? Musk’s billions in federal contracts. It reeks of corruption. But it's all part of Trump and Musk’s sinister plan to privatize the federal government – and line their own pockets. [ ]We HAVE to stop these billionaires from getting away with destroying our public services, but it’s going to take a MASSIVE public outcry from all of us. Will you sign the petition to stop Musk’s DOGE in its tracks? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME [ ][IMG] Cuts as big as Musk is promising would threaten Social Security, Medicare, and public services across the country. They would also mean cutting up to 1.5 MILLION government jobs, and, as Musk put it, creating “hardship” for Americans across the country. And now Marjorie Taylor Greene has been picked to lead a DOGE subcommittee in the House of Representatives. But what’s shocking is that Trump and Musk think they can get away with this while Musk’s companies continue to make billions in contracts with a shocking 17 different federal agencies. His SpaceX has $3.6 billion in contracts this year alone, including a new mega-deal to build a network of hundreds of U.S. spy satellites. And now his terrifying hold on our government is growing as quickly as his billions. We HAVE to stop Musk from this hostile takeover of our government – but to do it, we’re going to have to mount a massive public outcry that can’t be ignored. [ ]It starts now. Will you add your name to our petition to stop Musk NOW? When we organize, we win. name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: I never wrestled but...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| |
#
---
# I never wrestled but...
---
|
---
| | **We are on the verge of our public schools becoming professional wrestling rings.** The Trump administration has tapped yet another unqualified nominee—Linda McMahon—to lead the Department of Education. This absurd choice threatens to undermine our students, teachers, and schools. In Virginia, we know better. **When teachers do well, students do well. When students do well, our Commonwealth has a bright future.** As Chairman of the House Education Committee and a proud product of public schools, I understand that investing in public education isn’t a choice. **It’s a necessity.** That’s why we’re fighting to:
* **Protect funding** for our students, teachers, and schools.
* Ensure there is** zero tolerance **for discrimination of any kind.
* **Provide mental health resources** so every child has the support they need to succeed.
* **Stop book bans and divisive distractions** that harm learning and stoke fear.**

I’ll be on the ballot in 2025, and with the Democratic majority at stake, your support is critical. To safeguard the progress we’ve achieved and strengthen Virginia’s schools, I need your help. **[Your contribution will help us continue building strong, supportive schools for every student.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97694740/514274573/965072234?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWZhNWU4My0wZmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jb3KLlG6IgYLfCKXYgNXwfUl97Zd2b694RUHTIpPJEE=)**
---
[**Donate Now**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97694741/514274574/965072234?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWZhNWU4My0wZmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jb3KLlG6IgYLfCKXYgNXwfUl97Zd2b694RUHTIpPJEE=)
---
---
| | Thank you for believing in the power of public education and the potential of every child. This is about more than partisan politics—it’s about creating a future where our schools are places of hope, opportunity, and inspiration for all.

**[With your support](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97694742/514274575/965072234?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWZhNWU4My0wZmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jb3KLlG6IgYLfCKXYgNXwfUl97Zd2b694RUHTIpPJEE=)** , we can continue this important work and ensure that every student, teacher, and family has the resources they need to thrive. Together, we can make a difference. Thank you for standing with me,

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Olivia_Krolczyk=2C_Leadership_Institute=C2=A0?=
subject: They want to fail students
body:
Create campus leaders
| Friend, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8043bdb404f3478aaeb6816aec157113&_e=TKToDw-XQ9zj4dZlFX4Ai6NWgp4YUwDsax35duZdOOM9Q2wfmz8nsMuvdcCnJ_gVUQmjCq4e7grHiRDvl_v_eR6A2_wvPRjqzhVCXXbTlkkt-eKo7ttmV0Hh2soROWrX-W-lBVXakh_Aalh0L0U_wpolsR1gZDClEM5cksoKG6s_51lcBkSQWH1yhr5Vu_4ZsCLZZjE21DCah3om880qgv5BIkfHYKnejP0-JMIJxoC4_HIqnequJ4urpmupK9IZvvReNwynIF5QBTErVnGBiejHBwjxCzP0nwfD3BSbEk76_Ze6YrAY8RwE6AeU5cryD9cPSPFqEdTmzMBhd9JvQ-ED20uzViaH2ELC66-1rNtIpPqxYvtwd0Xy7fxlc2Y9WlNLTRPyHE3A0h7CWpWUQA%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Friend, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall. ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8043bdb404f3478aaeb6816aec157113&_e=TKToDw-XQ9zj4dZlFX4Ai6NWgp4YUwDsax35duZdOOM9Q2wfmz8nsMuvdcCnJ_gVUQmjCq4e7grHiRDvl_v_eR6A2_wvPRjqzhVCXXbTlkkt-eKo7ttmV0Hh2soROWrX-W-lBVXakh_Aalh0L0U_wpolsR1gZDClEM5cksoKG6s_51lcBkSQWH1yhr5Vu_4ZsCLZZjE21DCah3om880qgv5BIkfHYKnejP0-JMIJxoBlkp0aAPJFeDAhDf2St4y2QgtRlLcYvhLKOrWBSl5wqnktrsDwhXBVGVouN0mI0qfl3Sin6ZD7g_F9naBKdANzuAkeq4B5NH7qJ-QCDuJgQcLP2G1-iO_sm6819_fxSPT7qELloGksjcw3cjx3heJ9CBDiR6xtNAgNpGAatYcyMA%3D%3D) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley? ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8043bdb404f3478aaeb6816aec157113&_e=TKToDw-XQ9zj4dZlFX4Ai6NWgp4YUwDsax35duZdOOM9Q2wfmz8nsMuvdcCnJ_gVUQmjCq4e7grHiRDvl_v_eR6A2_wvPRjqzhVCXXbTlkkt-eKo7ttmV0Hh2soROWrX-W-lBVXakh_Aalh0L0U_wpolsR1gZDClEM5cksoKG6s_51lcBkSQWH1yhr5Vu_4ZsCLZZjE21DCah3om880qgv5BIkfHYKnejP0-JMIJxoCtfnrkOWGlmperxz37Fkl_-WpeBsNgXD7rdpDLcGG8Hd8JZBI_aMqt0Jd_agW8PP7q9GhMCJ-a-5QmclFmAGxh4VeYSfsrjoLymp2WL1QxMSsVS2GE9jGsVazpPl3z0gdb1TsiEIvC_nM63dPAn7Zg-pDNeftt3k97iTKFLdcQaQ%3D%3D) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
| [ **Stand with Riley Today ** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8043bdb404f3478aaeb6816aec157113&_e=TKToDw-XQ9zj4dZlFX4Ai6NWgp4YUwDsax35duZdOOM9Q2wfmz8nsMuvdcCnJ_gVUQmjCq4e7grHiRDvl_v_eR6A2_wvPRjqzhVCXXbTlkkt-eKo7ttmV0Hh2soROWrX-W-lBVXakh_Aalh0L0U_wpolsR1gZDClEM5cksoKG6s_51lcBkSQWH1yhr5Vu_4ZsCLZZjE21DCah3om880qgv5BIkfHYKnejP0-JMIJxoAxicQGz_VDlP8kittLcf6VUceFTf3rTx3dpTFk2HnlqPdzgRzZNuM4yO7yXrs--0w8yYPG4m-f6I7fKC2wkt-yRH4y5u9Hf2fmwH0lX09wU0lX4kq0evjeRZJ3jpZI0yo7R264UpW-VJesW4lzsL9APb5QcgnvpfaA48k-pnessw%3D%3D)

name: Tom Barrett
subject: Hitting the ground running
body:
Thank you for all your help | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6745f0c812d6645ca5bbd9bc&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67449bc2dafa4908229a65a9%26ss_email_id%3D6745f0c812d6645ca5bbd9bc%26ss_campaign_name%3DHitting%2Bthe%2Bground%2Brunning%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-26T16%253A02%253A47Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_67449bc2dafa4908229a65a9&l=en-US&s=sJ8pHqYj-QYx4zpiZ2Dbf8QsvqM%3D)
---
| **Thank you!** We did it. More than a year of hard work and prayers resulted in a great win on November 5th. Even though we were outspent by millions we won by nearly four points, 50.3 - 46.6%.I’m so proud of my family, our team, and the hundreds of supporters across the district, across Michigan, and across the nation, who helped our campaign. It was an awesome victory and I couldn’t have done it without you!
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6745f0c812d6645ca5bbd9bc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2Felections%2F2024%2F11%2F05%2Fcurtis-hertel-tom-barrett-michigans-7th-house-district-race%2F75908156007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_67449bc2dafa4908229a65a9&l=en-US&s=dD3VQE2PvWZZY5jf6l4P2s_Yu1Y%3D)
---
Only eight seats in the country flipped from Democrat to Republican, and with several Republican incumbents losing, we have just a 3-seat majority, with two vacancies to be filled by special elections.Without you, we might not have a majority.
---
|
---
| _Our traditional post-voting family photo after voting near our home on November 5th._
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6745f0c812d6645ca5bbd9bc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fthelivingstonpost.com%2Fbarrett-starts-congressional-career-in-great-grandfathers-office%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_67449bc2dafa4908229a65a9&l=en-US&s=yFH_sETRQr54EwrKkJdALtHvAB4%3D)
---
| _[Click here to watch me on Fox& Friends](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6745f0c812d6645ca5bbd9bc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fvideo%2F6365086940112&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_67449bc2dafa4908229a65a9&l=en-US&s=TrC5ccUrI_HPBQWKk8uUuAzVG0Y%3D)_
---
Immediately after the election, Ashley and I flew to Washington for freshman orientation. At the end of a long ten days of briefings, meetings, and interviews, I joined my freshman colleagues for the office lottery. Of the more than 50 new Members of Congress, I drew the 14th pick, and a bipartisan group of freshman allowed me to pick the office once used by my great grandfather, Congressman Louis Rabaut, who served in Congress for 24 years.I am grateful to my new colleagues for allowing me this honor and am excited to move in and get to work.Among my great grandfather’s accomplishments, was adding “Under God” to America’s Pledge of Allegiance, something my family and I are very proud of. This Thanksgiving, I will be with my extended family and hope to learn more about his time in Congress.
---
|
---
| _Me and Ashley at “freshman orientation” at the U.S. Capitol._
---
I will get sworn in to Congress on January 3, 2025, and will immediately get to work. I am excited about President-elect Trump’s cabinet picks and look forward to getting to work on the issues impacting the American people and their security.We have a lot to be thankful for this year, which will make this Thanksgiving very special. I hope you and your family do as well, and Ashley and I wish you the very best this holiday season.
---
|
---

clean_body: Thank you for all your help | | | | Thank you! We did it. More than a year of hard work and prayers resulted in a great win on November 5th. Even though we were outspent by millions we won by nearly four points, 50.3 - 46.6%.I’m so proud of my family, our team, and the hundreds of supporters across the district, across Michigan, and across the nation, who helped our campaign. It was an awesome victory and I couldn’t have done it without you! | Only eight seats in the country flipped from Democrat to Republican, and with several Republican incumbents losing, we have just a 3-seat majority, with two vacancies to be filled by special elections.Without you, we might not have a majority. | | Our traditional post-voting family photo after voting near our home on November 5th. | | Immediately after the election, Ashley and I flew to Washington for freshman orientation. At the end of a long ten days of briefings, meetings, and interviews, I joined my freshman colleagues for the office lottery. Of the more than 50 new Members of Congress, I drew the 14th pick, and a bipartisan group of freshman allowed me to pick the office once used by my great grandfather, Congressman Louis Rabaut, who served in Congress for 24 years.I am grateful to my new colleagues for allowing me this honor and am excited to move in and get to work.Among my great grandfather’s accomplishments, was adding “Under God” to America’s Pledge of Allegiance, something my family and I are very proud of. This Thanksgiving, I will be with my extended family and hope to learn more about his time in Congress. | | Me and Ashley at “freshman orientation” at the U.S. Capitol. I will get sworn in to Congress on January 3, 2025, and will immediately get to work. I am excited about President-elect Trump’s cabinet picks and look forward to getting to work on the issues impacting the American people and their security.We have a lot to be thankful for this year, which will make this Thanksgiving very special. I hope you and your family do as well, and Ashley and I wish you the very best this holiday season. | | | | | | | | | | mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

name: Moms for America
subject: Getting Along with Family After the Election

Our dogs are so much more than just a pet; for many, they are a beloved part of the family. In this economy, many families are
struggling to pay for their pets. Some have been abandoned or even mistreated.

The Moms for America Podcast welcomes Lauree Simmons, Founder and CEO of Big Dog Ranch Rescue, the largest cage-free, no-kill dog
rescue in the United States. Learn what you can do for the furry friends in your community! Like, share and subscribe.

Thanksgiving 2024 and the Election Season: Family Fun or Political Pain?

Thanksgiving may feel a little different this year if you are a family divided after the election. One group may be pumping their
arms in the now famous Trump dance, while others genuinely fear another four years of his policies. Will that make the tone of
your gathering more tense than thankful?

It's time to return to what this great American holiday is all about: giving thanks to God for our many, many blessings. Whether
your candidate won or lost – we all have much to be thankful for. Let's focus on faith, family, food, football, and fun this
Thanksgiving!

clean_body: Now that the election is over, holidays with family can be a source of friction. We have tips for navigating family togetherness! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] November 26, 2024 • Newsletter Big Dog Ranch Rescue Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Our dogs are so much more than just a pet; for many, they are a beloved part of the family. In this economy, many families are struggling to pay for their pets. Some have been abandoned or even mistreated. The Moms for America Podcast welcomes Lauree Simmons, Founder and CEO of Big Dog Ranch Rescue, the largest cage-free, no-kill dog rescue in the United States. Learn what you can do for the furry friends in your community! Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] Thanksgiving 2024 and the Election Season: Family Fun or Political Pain? Thanksgiving may feel a little different this year if you are a family divided after the election. One group may be pumping their arms in the now famous Trump dance, while others genuinely fear another four years of his policies. Will that make the tone of your gathering more tense than thankful? It's time to return to what this great American holiday is all about: giving thanks to God for our many, many blessings. Whether your candidate won or lost – we all have much to be thankful for. Let's focus on faith, family, food, football, and fun this Thanksgiving! Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2024 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

Friend, we’re in crunch mode before November comes to a close.
With a three-month-long fundraising freeze starting in January, we need to make sure that we hit **every single goal** we set. These funds are what allow us to keep marching forward.
Making this Maryland’s decade is more than just a vision, it’s a reality we can hit. We’ve accomplished so much, ranging from improving educational opportunities to opening up the economy for all Marylanders. We’re just getting started, friend.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Get these judges through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
These last few weeks are our last chance to appoint and confirm judges who will defend the role of law and our right to vote before opponents of voting rights take control again and target any vacancy they can.
Please -- sign on today to push the Senate forward on judicial confirmations and give us the judges we need to defend our democracy >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112624_1&amount=25]
Team,
With Donald Trump set to take office in January, the Senate must act swiftly to confirm President Biden’s judicial nominees.
Securing these appointments is one of the most productive actions supporters of voting rights can take to protect the judiciary from a right-wing shift and preserve progress on key issues like voting rights, reproductive rights, and environmental protections.
Currently, more than a dozen Biden judicial nominees are awaiting confirmation, including federal district and appeals court judges who are crucial to upholding constitutional rights and balanced justice . If these seats are left open, Trump will have the opportunity to pack the courts with judges who could dismantle decades of progress.
The time is now — let’s not lose this critical opportunity: Tell the Senate to confirm these judges now >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
Senator Elizabeth Warren put it bluntly in a recent op-ed: " [We] need to act like the clock is running out—because it is ."
We call on the Senate to immediately confirm all pending judicial nominees. This is our chance to protect the judiciary from an extremist shift and to ensure that our courts reflect the values of fairness, justice, and equality for all Americans.
Add your name to urge the Senate to prioritize judicial confirmations and stand firm for a fair and balanced judiciary >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112624_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112624_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112624_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112624_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Powered By People
subject: Will you help us keep the lights on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Unlike some other PACs that only work in election years, Powered by People operates year-round in order to fight for a brighter future for all Texans.
We’re invested in building community and long-lasting connections in Texas to improve voter registration and turn out and community building.
In February 2021, we organized thousands of volunteers to knock doors and made over 985,000 phone calls to senior citizens during the worst of the storm and power outages.
We need to be prepared for whatever Greg Abbott, Ted Cruz, or Donald Trump throw our way these next four years.
[**Will you help us keep the lights on in the off-year? We pledge to spend every dollar in the most effective way possible to fight for the future of our state.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241126.3cExjF&refcode=ema20241126-239902&t=1&akid=239902%2E444211%2EWvizhb)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241126.3cExjF&refcode=ema20241126-239902&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=239902%2E444211%2EWvizhb)**
We deeply appreciate you,
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20241126-239902-footer&t=21&refcode2=239902_444211_Wvizhb&akid=239902%2E444211%2EWvizhb)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239902%2E444211%2EWvizhb), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=239902%2E444211%2EWvizhb).

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e2cbb16e38c4caf9caa5fb3334c7ca8&_e=JDUDAWQEZqGjEixe2atOwdioxEDDDEfUKWRqQxEi0a90bxve0ivB5RHtB_Lfk3B7nPRd36oVYY2OjQtOwWKRmxilU6_ihi_SZhA9vsd8kXxbrBB1sehTFTddh3eRu1c4eHOF4Js339TCUlD7pnnr9MzzwtrDSyivl6MwD7KMYvDuyxSlU33cLk-0PchhWViT6UC1jYxWr0b_URZdpA2Zhp5dnRxWI8mxs1FtPjtlOfCCt0qLRlB63pZNkl7sa27_RrfKSg-k1GRDNGxMC21G9QgK5vjR83DSVfygFnVIDmdrGAnzQhp5od35jO3BJ0eKYkmJxincnGyPaFlTsxnZEDTs5ILVcrvwYUNniModI95xcCgQHKqHbMGVOt_hEVSiY12LoC79i0zk_eZN60YBstoayqrSpAmGed4YXMcK5jY%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e2cbb16e38c4caf9caa5fb3334c7ca8&_e=JDUDAWQEZqGjEixe2atOwdioxEDDDEfUKWRqQxEi0a90bxve0ivB5RHtB_Lfk3B7nPRd36oVYY2OjQtOwWKRmxilU6_ihi_SZhA9vsd8kXxbrBB1sehTFTddh3eRu1c4eHOF4Js339TCUlD7pnnr9MzzwtrDSyivl6MwD7KMYvDuyxSlU33cLk-0PchhWViT6UC1jYxWr0b_URZdpA2Zhp5dnRxWI8mxs1FtPjtlOfCCt0qLRlB63pZNkl7sa27_RrfKSg-k1GRDNGxMC21G9UrKHHZ1760BJ7PdsC1iv4eAx6ygp8vDNN00UiPezNXpAd60CU4Mx_523MAhgah3GhLczvHNsxCDL0K1Nn_c5Pl6eSMxWu6ekCJxmBV7VEP_nq9JK7V-hYOV9AKbapXUNx5guNEj9qzOfKO3Fyd1guw%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e2cbb16e38c4caf9caa5fb3334c7ca8&_e=JDUDAWQEZqGjEixe2atOwdioxEDDDEfUKWRqQxEi0a90bxve0ivB5RHtB_Lfk3B7nPRd36oVYY2OjQtOwWKRmxilU6_ihi_SZhA9vsd8kXxbrBB1sehTFTddh3eRu1c4eHOF4Js339TCUlD7pnnr9MzzwtrDSyivl6MwD7KMYvDuyxSlU33cLk-0PchhWViT6UC1jYxWr0b_URZdpA2Zhp5dnRxWI8mxs1FtPjtlOfCCt0qLRlB63pZNkl7sa27_RrfKSg-k1GRDNGxMC21G9Ub_xkyX3S3B9cL_k1rsBMdQRtQct70rz8DrEJWceNmAcjioncXyeAjMig_vMrFeSnd_WrKpTBZhO3_qUspEzvrtEpgaoNpCUNuTIHD6C-cLyb9E3HmTzHSbkNAiL0WvYsDWEo05s-pzzgcBCYCDJl0%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e2cbb16e38c4caf9caa5fb3334c7ca8&_e=JDUDAWQEZqGjEixe2atOwdioxEDDDEfUKWRqQxEi0a90bxve0ivB5RHtB_Lfk3B7nPRd36oVYY2OjQtOwWKRmxilU6_ihi_SZhA9vsd8kXxbrBB1sehTFTddh3eRu1c4eHOF4Js339TCUlD7pnnr9MzzwtrDSyivl6MwD7KMYvDuyxSlU33cLk-0PchhWViT6UC1jYxWr0b_URZdpA2Zhp5dnRxWI8mxs1FtPjtlOfCCt0qLRlB63pZNkl7sa27_RrfKSg-k1GRDNGxMC21G9dr2CUdq_Cv7g62z8qUbvI9ykLcwVGrjMvq76E_7pTbWYHxTN90wiCtwSD62Zb9plTwDqPqXT5Qe_Rx8F0YiKlZnB0HMW4ZO9mOtpZepYrQxTrdWh56dT7JlQ-WMhGOBkiMx907VOdU2NdhGupL-kJU%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. clean_body: Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. | | | | | | | From the Desk of | | | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. And he fights on. So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

He’s committed to supporting local businesses and investing in the next generation of Georgians through our public education system, and we are proud to have his voice in Congress for another term.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zVUjsBtAn4SxPq3ImxMTLw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpKJSEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNlcDc3BjQgpnPzT8RWeWgiQkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zVUjsBtAn4SxPq3ImxMTLw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpKJSEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNlcDc3BjQgpnPzT8RWeWgiQkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zVUjsBtAn4SxPq3ImxMTLw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpKJSEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNlcDc3BjQgpnPzT8RWeWgiQkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zVUjsBtAn4SxPq3ImxMTLw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpKJSEP0S4aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9icmF2ZS1ib29rcy80ZWIzOWNmZS00N2U0LTQwODQtYjBiZS05OWZkYzkxMjVkYjY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTE0X0JER19CUkFWRV9JR0dZMl9FTV9SRVZfUEEtUk9OJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNlcDc3BjQgpnPzT8RWeWgiQkUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/7Fdlz53XoypC9tNCVcH58w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpKIGvP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTEyNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9yZWludHJvZHVjdGlvbl9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0ycEROZHcwUjB0YTVWMUtVOFg1OUd1Q1dtU0omcmVmY29kZTI9MnBETmR3MFIwdGE1VjFLVThYNTlHdUNXbVNKJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJwRE5kdzBSMHRhNVYxS1U4WDU5R3VDV21TSlcDc3BjQgpnP6_8RWeVD0U1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

| | Peter, I’m an organizer at heart, so I’m not used to talking about myself when I _could_ be talking about the work at hand. But I want to take a minute and reintroduce myself. **I’m Maxwell Alejandro Frost – and damn proud to be.** You may have heard about me on the news as the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress, the first Gen Zer _re_ -elected to Congress, and _still_ the only Gen Zer in Congress. But before that, I was houseless and driving Ubers to pay the bills while I ran to represent my people. Before that, I was organizing with March for Our Lives, because kids _can’t_ keep dying from gun violence while NRA lobbyists get rich. And before that? I was an Afro-Latino kid from Florida, raised in a working-class family. Now, I’m making real change for young and working class folks. To legislate for justice. To build the world we deserve. I’ll never forget the people who believed in me before I “made it,” and helped me get here. **But that just makes it all the more clear how urgently I need to _stay_ here – especially given who _else_ is going back to Washington in January.** [**_Will you donate now to make an investment in the fight against the incoming fascist administration and help connect with Gen Z before the far right indoctrinates them? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/7Fdlz53XoypC9tNCVcH58w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpKIGvP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTEyNl9lbV9mcl9iMV9yZWludHJvZHVjdGlvbl9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0ycEROZHcwUjB0YTVWMUtVOFg1OUd1Q1dtU0omcmVmY29kZTI9MnBETmR3MFIwdGE1VjFLVThYNTlHdUNXbVNKJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJwRE5kdzBSMHRhNVYxS1U4WDU5R3VDV21TSlcDc3BjQgpnP6_8RWeVD0U1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/kcvNW14tnkJYq2e6AzEnaw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpKIGvP0TiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_YW1vdW50PTEwJnJlZmNvZGU9MjAyNDExMjZfZW1fZnJfYjFfcmVpbnRyb2R1Y3Rpb25fZW4mZXhwcmVzc19sYW5lPXRydWUmY2RtYz0ycEROZHcwUjB0YTVWMUtVOFg1OUd1Q1dtU0omcmVmY29kZTI9MnBETmR3MFIwdGE1VjFLVThYNTlHdUNXbVNKJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJwRE5kdzBSMHRhNVYxS1U4WDU5R3VDV21TSlcDc3BjQgpnP6_8RWeVD0U1UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | ~~ | | Peter, I’m an organizer at heart, so I’m not used to talking about myself when I could be talking about the work at hand. But I want to take a minute and reintroduce myself. I’m Maxwell Alejandro Frost – and damn proud to be. You may have heard about me on the news as the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress, the first Gen Zer re -elected to Congress, and still the only Gen Zer in Congress. But before that, I was houseless and driving Ubers to pay the bills while I ran to represent my people. Before that, I was organizing with March for Our Lives, because kids can’t keep dying from gun violence while NRA lobbyists get rich. And before that? I was an Afro-Latino kid from Florida, raised in a working-class family. Now, I’m making real change for young and working class folks. To legislate for justice. To build the world we deserve. I’ll never forget the people who believed in me before I “made it,” and helped me get here. But that just makes it all the more clear how urgently I need to stay here – especially given who else is going back to Washington in January. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~ | ~ | Thanks for believing in what we’re building together. \- Maxwell Frost | ~~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: Olivia Krolczyk, Leadership Institute
subject: They want to fail students
body:
Sports leagues like the NCAA let men into women’s sports.
| Peter, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae90499912104a9dade366438b46fb88&_e=ULr0ShEsliJMiTSTPUtVeTGNFQXd6nxjo6tDGCmXyipeC5oBKQkupxsVsx7-Q1_IiuSjMw1btvBPi_U8-YT46ZSdnHzdnwW0B46qTWcsAUpYjI-68xO_5UaHJS0USTPSeXyuBVFyJcWamHYVdRYwP614NEJSoyTKdS9TREifGzuj7h5DXA_D6EuM9ahpgCUaNiKlr5sw2rulZ3ACFYTMhr90Rf8ZWMKUpcFOLV7KkuzrDnr5TDAA0yJyWRCM47zTRDVIiYIL3tJZimhABaQAEdOEg9Xn6DjYSISTjvsvJt_LIDNkhysTsyGC67GLNqNBCp904BXmDnta8d214JnuAzKZAi-V0pfbNDo52Hh3tvc82cxnAtQH-vuCR4VMWnrm_fODqrdR-x3So2pSvlMPRw%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Peter, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall. ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae90499912104a9dade366438b46fb88&_e=ULr0ShEsliJMiTSTPUtVeTGNFQXd6nxjo6tDGCmXyipeC5oBKQkupxsVsx7-Q1_IiuSjMw1btvBPi_U8-YT46ZSdnHzdnwW0B46qTWcsAUpYjI-68xO_5UaHJS0USTPSeXyuBVFyJcWamHYVdRYwP614NEJSoyTKdS9TREifGzuj7h5DXA_D6EuM9ahpgCUaNiKlr5sw2rulZ3ACFYTMhr90Rf8ZWMKUpcFOLV7KkuxddF7jrxO6tcqKoURHvW4kanaMgpiPzGH89f0y0ri-2BKhI13o9kzzKCkwvCR8lE_DPEquntp28vTtOt_OrVR21ZMtmA6kxGqZdUqR9dNlznpmXDkFRWgA9yowinyDtpVWx28AE3-0lYHpDO5LBkBVI8zV-cJUWHC-MB5x5BMQfw%3D%3D) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. [Will you stand bravely with me and Riley? ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae90499912104a9dade366438b46fb88&_e=ULr0ShEsliJMiTSTPUtVeTGNFQXd6nxjo6tDGCmXyipeC5oBKQkupxsVsx7-Q1_IiuSjMw1btvBPi_U8-YT46ZSdnHzdnwW0B46qTWcsAUpYjI-68xO_5UaHJS0USTPSeXyuBVFyJcWamHYVdRYwP614NEJSoyTKdS9TREifGzuj7h5DXA_D6EuM9ahpgCUaNiKlr5sw2rulZ3ACFYTMhr90Rf8ZWMKUpcFOLV7Kkuw3EMcld2sMzcF56AORp_8Y6RVfYwG1fOKjNYY9JRsIhucB68-J_PTEDYzY_z_8ktE60hO4Q-R5xkfkAHlK_wIG-oi7p5WgKVM4MSO-_EqQxlYj0FAClf4LBKtjwqBd7d3rAsGuDzI1v8D7j8St2kflesIpCxEOJ0Oo2KetuHx2hw%3D%3D) Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
| [ **Stand with Riley Today ** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ae90499912104a9dade366438b46fb88&_e=ULr0ShEsliJMiTSTPUtVeTGNFQXd6nxjo6tDGCmXyipeC5oBKQkupxsVsx7-Q1_IiuSjMw1btvBPi_U8-YT46ZSdnHzdnwW0B46qTWcsAUpYjI-68xO_5UaHJS0USTPSeXyuBVFyJcWamHYVdRYwP614NEJSoyTKdS9TREifGzuj7h5DXA_D6EuM9ahpgCUaNiKlr5sw2rulZ3ACFYTMhr90Rf8ZWMKUpcFOLV7KkuwVe6Nm7Zru0m7nAPKDyjHCW0hurki071O3dKNTvIRyGvAgbkKc9uYhc43hMrKfBIFafntd-gN8qdOpMViVo_sQbDDENeTe6D_PMCO0bnMrbY9H7gj8vaKipKVnLUuIOYV1jzGVZDR6GDFBfvgpI5j___VLcqMPUZkUyK84THvqfw%3D%3D)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97702414/514296482/158001685?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmNiN2E4YTUtMThhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bshltoiblWdKsQ9vGaQjjhsU-cidRNLAe8UtGrowbTQ=) Friend, I wanted to send a quick note to all of our incredible supporters to let you know how grateful I am for all you continue to do. Whether you read our emails, donate, volunteer, or offer words of encouragement, your support truly means so much. It is a gift to represent a country and district I love, especially when there is so much to fight for. Our democracy has proven both fragile and resilient, and this past election promises another test – but one I believe we are up for. I am eternally thankful for the support our community has shown by trusting me to fight to make our state a better place for us all to call home. May you have a few days of solitude and joy with your loved ones. Thank you, friend, and Happy Thanksgiving. Laura

In just the past week Trump has picked an elite team to get his plan on DAY ONE! And they’re already putting it into action. Right now they’re drafting plans to get his agenda done. That means CLOSING THE BORDER! LOWERING TAXES! SENDING BIDENS MIGRANTS HOME! AND ENDING THE CRIME WAVE! With the House, Senate, and Supreme Court behind him, there’s nothing Trump can’t do. But the Left has one trick left up their sleeve. FAKE REPUBLICANS. Our majority has never been thinner. It would take less than 10 Republicans to keep Congress in a deadlock. So we need to remind them who sent them there: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE! The same American people that elected Trump to MAGA. And if they don’t work with him to get the job done then THEY’RE GONE! Hi team,
We’re still here — and we’re not giving up.
The outcome of this election was not what we wanted or worked for. Donald Trump's hatred and corruption go against our core values, and it’s terrifying to imagine what the next four years may bring.
But Colorado stood out nationally, shifting to the left while much of the country moved to the right. The energy and enthusiasm shown by voters in our incredible state is still a victory, no matter what.
We’ve taken some time to rest and reflect on the election — and we hope you have, too. Now, we want to hear from you.
Looking back, what do you wish had been done differently? Moving forward, what policies do you want to see Michael and Democrats in Congress fight for?
Your voice is more important than ever. Will you share your thoughts by filling out our post-election survey here? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/postelection-priorities-survey-2024]

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Life in prison for saving a cop’s life
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg52KjVKYrFq86-RtHMikt6XvMqym6fPM_uV6KOBxCkVHnM1zIsUwRkMUg81EdrZdS7rHMdiL-mEohJCibCPlS-tjjFHSe43RM_qRbdtE8G77As211q001Hk6oGIARb_7E3Wpy6EBt0PmSXx74zI8hUibG8WIrvVdam9QTdSUvRplnYHz6yxM8Bo7qIp40BCGJaohMkBKHD-fjTKH8oi5EX0XHbbFxNvn2YyVLuPAfdXnpChl9pnRGJ7CUyawJJCz6_OxvEJBLgkytOsCBP_nEgZeSrAVGngTt1JiguyoSgK6Az67VgLvPTld2VhSp3dgBHG76bBHuKW0zba74G75K1g8WJmEBRYlUFKubPS01gSMzWRmHFyxHXQ4MaDrLdsNs8Q%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg52KjVKYrFq86-RtHMikt6XvMqym6fPM_uV6KOBxCkVHnM1zIsUwRkMUg81EdrZdS7rHMdiL-mEohJCibCPlS-tjjFHSe43RM_qRbdtE8G77As211q001Hk6oGIARb_7E3Wpy6EBt0PmSXx74zI8hUibG8WIrvVdam9QTdSUvRplnYHz6yxM8Bo7qIp40BCGJaohMkBKHD-fjTKH8oi5EX0X9evDDotjVCE1dDvA7v9Sp529gMmfzsxNWlFH41ZjjPjEvmiuJAy_RKgYY-GZ4XuEa9lkSIyDJz5Uq-snjo6Izl3kuycWQYkUvYsnWiQu1tmlyDsz-VnohYn9ram51yndhLwycWfUq-ULsu9tatYpBGxsRW3dF7o7uTx03GY-0ug%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg52KjVKYrFq86-RtHMikt6XvMqym6fPM_uV6KOBxCkVHnM1zIsUwRkMUg81EdrZdS7rHMdiL-mEohJCibCPlS-tjjFHSe43RM_qRbdtE8G77As211q001Hk6oGIARb_7E3Wpy6EBt0PmSXx74zI8hUibG8WIrvVdam9QTdSUvRplnYHz6yxM8Bo7qIp40BCGJaohMkBKHD-fjTKH8oi5EX0UuCbYqoZJtZMls_xq7j0DvlRG7YTM8zPHuuF3UCpJpqCftEVXaZcBVx9WlvxbYUz0Bt4mOiAVZN0zQlWp30FDy37GnVouh-BWDfiFOxbKtQqjnCVsyiv_UhKHXfCosRCxbT5FwqXpooAvIrrgTN0F4HsnFCwxqbQhjvKc6EkshZA%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg52KjVKYrFq86-RtHMikt6XvMqym6fPM_uV6KOBxCkVHnM1zIsUwRkMUg81EdrZdS7rHMdiL-mEohJCibCPlS-tjjFHSe43RM_qRbdtE8G77As211q001Hk6oGIARb_7E3Wpy6EBt0PmSXx74zI8hUibG8WIrvVdam9QTdSUvRplnYHz6yxM8Bo7qIp40BCGJaohMkBKHD-fjTKH8oi5EX0Wpmb_1W4bBU3gr6pjYRJUYflvb6kYM-d9itdtcu3sI2OyCBPWWDWpAo-AkFrfEWdPOJRUlS2kDOOfXHlnlGCXDeM_PcAeTpbG2hQwzzN0bGoRhyv5Xd0vnnxQJuMrC0Xvjrj1eQoqUaM0z720MU8O6gm_Io6iGCuPsfQGf8Zl0Lg%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg52KjVKYrFq86-RtHMikt6XvMqym6fPM_uV6KOBxCkVHnM1zIsUwRkMUg81EdrZdS7rHMdiL-mEohJCibCPlS-tjjFHSe43RM_qRbdtE8G77As211q001Hk6oGIARb_7E3Wpy6EBt0PmSXx74zI8hUibG8WIrvVdam9QTdSUvRplnYHz6yxM8Bo7qIp40BCGJaohMkBKHD-fjTKH8oi5EX0UZDUtR10_qqVhFcQiQsIVpJoXSUx7JpW_c3r0x7caH_2vYlDnTWVmu1YiUE8vAPXdLjqftf3DRXWHIVlv1FDNfFTCi3Fe6wpxbnsJCXdKhS5CFFuT4lzKvk_t4jt9jiI7tUTNThQBficowfAhKiDT1P0Zoheb58vv4xA5sAYc85A%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg52KjVKYrFq86-RtHMikt6XvMqym6fPM_uV6KOBxCkVHnM1zIsUwRkMUg81EdrZdS7rHMdiL-mEohJCibCPlS-tjjFHSe43RM_qRbdtE8G77As211q001Hk6oGIARb_7E3Wpy6EBt0PmSXx74zI8hUibG8WIrvVdam9QTdSUvRplnYHz6yxM8Bo7qIp40BCGJaohMkBKHD-fjTKH8oi5EX0UfBt-YWuS4bviKwKXC1JKLI5elvKr-ks1ryLUeaqMgloFSNbjZQMEVV7Iqk5hn0AwWJh7ApfftlFNT_1IQVycbRVrApDURIIUmrXF-Q04YN96BS98sQdd8Xg_jkJjCbY-_TkNWHdbRvl2qSHtwuoIcibE1Bbrgro9u2_hXN_O26A%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg52KjVKYrFq86-RtHMikt6XvMqym6fPM_uV6KOBxCkVHnM1zIsUwRkMUg81EdrZdS7rHMdiL-mEohJCibCPlS-tjjFHSe43RM_qRbdtE8G77As211q001Hk6oGIARb_7E3Wpy6EBt0PmSXx74zI8hUibG8WIrvVdam9QTdSUvRplnYHz6yxM8Bo7qIp40BCGJaohMkBKHD-fjTKH8oi5EX0UEhwk7Ychg6lioByfoV_AN63ghj_-Fr1_o_I96yHnB8X_SQRG_5JzKlNbZGwqmdu9KPXDZOJlOwEba4mMB_xTXtpCEHuy4ly686WJdR2sTOA8DXLW8MyYPXZlpCny3k3eDNjcBII1tj1eKUcQXxdn6Km7wyv8YhoKy0vW_cYQA7g%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=467d97eccccc428a9a3870a7079ef17d&_e=2aKmu5ObvQ0BAtW8OVtg5-zd162ruwfLGu93uDxlmKfYanUA4qW_GIFQF_4gW6u2QiWx3S3_Urdi5qudZVvJ77p8HZSRBcC0chaGuDzFhjpB4TavWkxEajRuB8ZXFdKAXICO070WUPP-AHeETjDcjZgC9Z7SmACe5MF3hPLsXtPqLAl496zxvID0EECbfMFEEjZMoB10aYqcv1jI40mKSA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_
