Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click to unsubscribe

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.
subject: Peter, it’s a disgrace.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
You can be sure that if I still served in uniform, Trump’s Purity Board would slate me for separation, to be replaced by someone unwaveringly loyal to Trump above all else.
#
Paul Eaton here.
Purity Boards to purge the United States Armed Forces.
I never thought I’d see the day.
But now, with Trump set to retake office, that is the reality we face. It is a disgrace.
Trump aims to destroy the apolitical nature of the Military, purge our most seasoned and effective officers, and replace them with loyalists who will follow his every command — whether they are Constitutionally legal or not. And remember - the Supreme Court of our country granted him immunity for actions he may take as President. Something not granted to our military. Also useful to recall Stalin’s purge of the Soviet Army early during WWII. The Russian Army never recovered as the effects are still playing out in their invasion of Ukraine.
I served for over 33 years in the United States Army on Active Duty and retired as a Major General. I deployed around the world in defense of our nation. I upheld my oath to support and defend the Constitution.
You can be sure that if I still served, Trump’s Purity Board would slate me for relief, to be replaced by someone who demonstrates fealty to Trump above all else.
I will not sit idly by as Trump readies a purge of good, decent, honorable leaders from the Military. We may not be able to stop him, but we will not be silent.
[**Join me, join VoteVets, and join the thousands of others who have already added their voice to speak out against Trump’s Purity Boards and his purge of the United States Military. Add your name here, and then tell everyone you know that Trump is deadset on destroying our Military and making each of us less safe.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241126-1-30&akid=33994%2E3013755%2EkymsJ5)**
| [ADD YOUR VOICE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241126-1-30&akid=33994%2E3013755%2EkymsJ5)
---
These next four years will not be easy. But together, we will do everything we can to defend our democracy.
Thank you for joining us.
Very respectfully,
Paul Eaton
Senior Advisor, VoteVets
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

subject: Thank President Biden for his leadership >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, with Election Day behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency.**

So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country.

[**We need 20,000 good Democrats to sign it with us — read below and sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85182?t=6&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85182?t=7&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85182?t=8&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: Thank you.

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

You capped prices on prescription drugs.

You protected good-paying union jobs.

You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: _You will go down as a truly GREAT American President._

**I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do.**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85182?t=9&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85182?t=10&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18102%2E878179%2ERvqbWG)

body:

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=264e99198ce94a829546d8b84358710f&_e=zmQ-HKDI7m8e2-hNOA6dpwgUie44ZLvJDjJWgMVOBhR33wQg1xO4XN5kiJc40jtJwJbkQgY3hX5VQGvVx_dt1eg_AOsljnipL6MFCxTJF_xrd39lsrdjGuQmuA-xmz_jbgJSaLbOZig94QovY09xnNiy8xroiMU5anJ77CB2umKLbBsJAit08sWdY2FSfVKP6sS9FUJZ3NHn605_kh24YGXOHUGoEM20yEAzjb6HUHCK5giAvOlu9jEJt6SdLbfxFkWEzoU5txM9wR5jcJ1IuxW53tLtsCCLaowQOTAQeK8cDYqwAqOjzzBtyxOXk85P-jQ5tqD8mN71GSQjPF5Iszkah90ENg8BugmlhBKHkEz_KJNW9EkjcfKv7aZpGZXLFc5ryG0xMGkMv3ukSUla-DIsY70Kr-_c4vyMxcgI6ho%3D)**

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=264e99198ce94a829546d8b84358710f&_e=zmQ-HKDI7m8e2-hNOA6dpwgUie44ZLvJDjJWgMVOBhR33wQg1xO4XN5kiJc40jtJwJbkQgY3hX5VQGvVx_dt1eg_AOsljnipL6MFCxTJF_xrd39lsrdjGuQmuA-xmz_jbgJSaLbOZig94QovY09xnNiy8xroiMU5anJ77CB2umKLbBsJAit08sWdY2FSfVKP6sS9FUJZ3NHn605_kh24YGXOHUGoEM20yEAzjb6HUHCK5giAvOlu9jEJt6SdLbfxFkWEzoU5txM9wR5jcJ1Iu7i4UywdmSJuyYBEOG_doYGygOHIprHMpLVKCYnFZEG_OynPDELZoap0fUduTU0KaLMnyzh-HrM6xMVlw9-X9Kc79ZiVaXwShP1hNEtL2aJG1XeK1lGjtSQ40GA-ozkHwR23_W18BSULtzqVsM3cRd8%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=264e99198ce94a829546d8b84358710f&_e=zmQ-HKDI7m8e2-hNOA6dpwgUie44ZLvJDjJWgMVOBhR33wQg1xO4XN5kiJc40jtJwJbkQgY3hX5VQGvVx_dt1eg_AOsljnipL6MFCxTJF_xrd39lsrdjGuQmuA-xmz_jbgJSaLbOZig94QovY09xnNiy8xroiMU5anJ77CB2umKLbBsJAit08sWdY2FSfVKP6sS9FUJZ3NHn605_kh24YGXOHUGoEM20yEAzjb6HUHCK5giAvOlu9jEJt6SdLbfxFkWEzoU5txM9wR5jcJ1Iu5ZF8SVAmJCOsVcf5Xho-Z-dfTDqEJhmb440zEIohWB6Dtny1apL3PXruj7gulqAzF3kzK2HxaAj0zwHapq0rDQr3ywil5g_GIvOBrLrHnY1UQnlBvuW6Mn9GUllMov9q_jqELVULUd1ySskMmBvLwk%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=264e99198ce94a829546d8b84358710f&_e=zmQ-HKDI7m8e2-hNOA6dpwgUie44ZLvJDjJWgMVOBhR33wQg1xO4XN5kiJc40jtJwJbkQgY3hX5VQGvVx_dt1eg_AOsljnipL6MFCxTJF_xrd39lsrdjGuQmuA-xmz_jbgJSaLbOZig94QovY09xnNiy8xroiMU5anJ77CB2umKLbBsJAit08sWdY2FSfVKP6sS9FUJZ3NHn605_kh24YGXOHUGoEM20yEAzjb6HUHCK5giAvOlu9jEJt6SdLbfxFkWEzoU5txM9wR5jcJ1Iu9Au6iUiclaJ8lPjJZUHxVOwNT1DQAo8Kcb0DiW3x8bwOnm0hdPAPWGucXZx4_aZBc2ss1Y9DWAyFOW_EGQH_8fZ-dO5yCvpR7EMs-JCLv02grRmz9Nh0EfHWS0eQbc540rZdMs8SwXAZN6kVU6yXs4%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---

Kari Lake

"Wish the Trump Family a Happy Thanksgiving!" | | "SIGN OUR CARD FOR THE TRUMP FAMILY→" Friend - Inauguration Day is right around the corner and we couldn't be more thankful to ring in another FOUR YEARS under President Donald J. Trump. He - and his family - endured a politically-motivated FBI raid of their home, two sham impeachments, bogus indictments in four different jurisdictions, and an endless slog of Fake News hit pieces... And yet they kept fighting for our country! "So – in the spirit of the holiday – we want to send President Trump a card to let the Trump Family know how thankful we are that they never gave up. " | | "SIGN OUR CARD FOR THE TRUMP FAMILY→" We know you may be busy preparing to celebrate with family and friends, but this will take less than 30 seconds of your time. I need your name on this!

| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e75a4c38b5b478b8de04ca4a410e322&_e=I2wbwhvLI4Ar2cItYLvgn2qEbu98XYG7zsor9nQJqNBilge0gDWfntkSKevatbLp0hLossiBGR_aSw2Kma4EcRT7H3kc4-x8E2aSY2mh0EpwUlASQGGPVjMgQhKwuNgWHxBU05AHnw5seEOgc6vumNbg6Qnn-6PZXS-cd4yFkmWXYd9m6VXUrlAdXyZ1CtiU54vkKDn5Hri55taVSeX_fzLfq7IODV6RRGJbyEQDve1e0Ouc8tD1XlVDnPUfgVTXeE_nrg3ShYA8QB63IrpgFxSKaHxtqLXXJ816d_TXVCIVnY8Ti8pHyn8e98T6mBPDNGVHihcObMq9x6JGIoL71A%3D%3D)
---
Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e75a4c38b5b478b8de04ca4a410e322&_e=I2wbwhvLI4Ar2cItYLvgn2qEbu98XYG7zsor9nQJqNBilge0gDWfntkSKevatbLp0hLossiBGR_aSw2Kma4EcRT7H3kc4-x8E2aSY2mh0EpwUlASQGGPVjMgQhKwuNgWHxBU05AHnw5seEOgc6vumNbg6Qnn-6PZXS-cd4yFkmWXYd9m6VXUrlAdXyZ1CtiUC7FwO1kbDZbrM1axhtI2xg1mXhJn03FpOprfi72PqFhoAvw65Ln5LOjmlv3bTleNaVZjIt_4ZN5aU-PphbfmVqpDj62S_lWRs1sUcMF-wvE7MFmDytSryd5Kl7YItESRNAc4nWmu0uTf6JRBL8qbGw%3D%3D)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e75a4c38b5b478b8de04ca4a410e322&_e=I2wbwhvLI4Ar2cItYLvgn2qEbu98XYG7zsor9nQJqNBilge0gDWfntkSKevatbLp0hLossiBGR_aSw2Kma4EcRT7H3kc4-x8E2aSY2mh0EpwUlASQGGPVjMgQhKwuNgWHxBU05AHnw5seEOgc6vumNbg6Qnn-6PZXS-cd4yFkmWXYd9m6VXUrlAdXyZ1CtiUC7k_SZoZh3LOVXTBt2PVLZEf5uWBxne28o5YBhrCswHdRpmGRxbH8CdR7DlRW6H1bQOb1xufZf4U58eMRAM0mRdZY6Yi_5O4HebnKZi61NIuAipZAr2RepFPHZb9FlNABcHhR0yNLFY0zHDoOzWcqg%3D%3D)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e75a4c38b5b478b8de04ca4a410e322&_e=I2wbwhvLI4Ar2cItYLvgn2qEbu98XYG7zsor9nQJqNBilge0gDWfntkSKevatbLp0hLossiBGR_aSw2Kma4EcRT7H3kc4-x8E2aSY2mh0EpwUlASQGGPVjMgQhKwuNgWHxBU05AHnw5seEOgc6vumNbg6Qnn-6PZXS-cd4yFkmWXYd9m6VXUrlAdXyZ1CtiUYhKzSug2Bl0z3oi7oVop1x4rDeGXmR5IbELME6_RwX1GyhektFiyWBB3dGYOuIzP2KJ_8BRT3geH3TfIdHvPy_VKXk3WlbCMiC480QBQfkyE3nykbHxIoVoQBbvkkZgKTP2Bm4lqpALgdAEv33Z-kw%3D%3D)_**_** _._**
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e75a4c38b5b478b8de04ca4a410e322&_e=I2wbwhvLI4Ar2cItYLvgn2qEbu98XYG7zsor9nQJqNBilge0gDWfntkSKevatbLp0hLossiBGR_aSw2Kma4EcRT7H3kc4-x8E2aSY2mh0EpwUlASQGGPVjMgQhKwuNgWHxBU05AHnw5seEOgc6vumNbg6Qnn-6PZXS-cd4yFkmWXYd9m6VXUrlAdXyZ1CtiUxfNvE6yduk6ANTGFV7o0C2RYY-e6dpWtCcJg3y3H6za1-2eSRu1EeR1UYOY1IMOBhwheF7cvdKkQf78retDMUi8o7FDZXM3CFsBHHYhDxPyNd_CMqg6LAHBlF5buRxEEescW33L2CJdIl8myqSlrqA%3D%3D)
Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!
_Yours Sincerely,_

clean_body: I need your name on this! | | | | Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive landslide victory this country has seen in decades. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action. That’s why I’m pushing to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government. On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – a building they own – to peacefully, and patriotically protest discrepancies in an Election... Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: and they deserve better. This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this. Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours. Will you answer the call? . Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us! Yours Sincerely, Marjorie Taylor Greene | | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Team WFP
subject: None of us have all the answers right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
While others might be busy pointing fingers, we're busy gearing up for the fight ahead. | | | Peter, There’s been a whirlwind on social media from pundits and political commentators in the three weeks since the election — all as Republicans plot to divide working people and enrich their billionaire allies under a second Trump administration. **While others might be busy pointing fingers, we're busy gearing up for the fight ahead. Because once Trump is inaugurated on January 20th, we know we'll have our work cut out for us.** This fall, WFP members and organizers knocked on more than 1.6 million doors across six swing states. And one thing we heard over and over is that a lot of working people don’t feel represented by either of the two major parties, both of whom they feel are beholden to billionaire donors. This fight ahead of us is not simply left vs. right. It’s not just red vs. blue. **It’s about the ultra-wealthy vs. everyone else.** And we know the same playbook from 2016 will NOT give us the adequate tools to win it. We’re only three weeks past Election Day. None of us have all the answers right now. As we move forward, we are doing so with humility — **but also with confidence that the values and mission of the Working Families Party will be more important over the next few years than ever before.** We need to be smart about taking on the authoritarian threat and stopping Republicans from implementing their Project 2025 masterplan. But that can’t be _all_ we do. We also need to build independent political power outside of the two-party system. Made up of working people, fighting _for_ working people. Not just at the federal level, but in towns, cities, and municipalities — securing victories that people can see and feel, and meeting them where they are to make sure they know about it. And we need to start planning now to win back power in 2026 and 2028 — and win back working class voters who may have gone a different way this year by showing them what a different kind of politics can look like. Our mission is to give working people a real reason to re-engage in the political process, and vote in ways that benefit all of our communities. **[If you’re looking for your political home, you can become a dues-paying member by starting a recurring monthly donation of $10 or more here. Our multiracial working class movement is stronger with you in it, Peter.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvWFGVwfoZo8BR_MKq4-IhekPMCF0pmAnsmxAaQXToH6Y0KhqHwSos0RgGeptKn_Rh97y2dlOtXMj_u7oeM5v0aEcR58ViQ_ufipaQ8ZxXiDWCLVlfWn42Db6zsz9S57DVZdLbDYC22M26ZgKA9DoSj3diqdT3A4kA2UXlkqmFOAUx2ykMHmpi9zrwJvAjgtS2mrBiso3UwyhIac9zP7BiZCt4GiE4oSc3Tu5T2awhfge8n_LNPWwNXvI1G5ExRhVwngVhB4Y9hLrJUtPIQIgFckXkf5DRu_YxCUPDljlcHBi1jCGOo9BBL44RDGsu65W3ludQEoYI_3NuxGa0KJTcrNQfaCzSc8ke1l-IahsaJ1BusPSQby04Ww_S893zB_FBt6bME4m3VSUA4-oVP-Kyd/4bs/7zlgI0EPQ_uHVdNuby-0lg/h0/h001.lsHGxa12Jm6R8j_bcZEJ6hdymGzZKs6SZ_aGf6dLk0s)** clean_body: While others might be busy pointing fingers, we're busy gearing up for the fight ahead. | | | Peter, There’s been a whirlwind on social media from pundits and political commentators in the three weeks since the election — all as Republicans plot to divide working people and enrich their billionaire allies under a second Trump administration. While others might be busy pointing fingers, we're busy gearing up for the fight ahead. Because once Trump is inaugurated on January 20th, we know we'll have our work cut out for us. This fall, WFP members and organizers knocked on more than 1.6 million doors across six swing states. And one thing we heard over and over is that a lot of working people don’t feel represented by either of the two major parties, both of whom they feel are beholden to billionaire donors. This fight ahead of us is not simply left vs. right. It’s not just red vs. blue. It’s about the ultra-wealthy vs. everyone else. And we know the same playbook from 2016 will NOT give us the adequate tools to win it. We’re only three weeks past Election Day. None of us have all the answers right now. As we move forward, we are doing so with humility — but also with confidence that the values and mission of the Working Families Party will be more important over the next few years than ever before. We need to be smart about taking on the authoritarian threat and stopping Republicans from implementing their Project 2025 masterplan. But that can’t be all we do. We also need to build independent political power outside of the two-party system. Made up of working people, fighting for working people. Not just at the federal level, but in towns, cities, and municipalities — securing victories that people can see and feel, and meeting them where they are to make sure they know about it. And we need to start planning now to win back power in 2026 and 2028 — and win back working class voters who may have gone a different way this year by showing them what a different kind of politics can look like. Our mission is to give working people a real reason to re-engage in the political process, and vote in ways that benefit all of our communities. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Friend -

Inauguration Day is right around the corner and we couldn't be more thankful to ring in another FOUR YEARS under President Donald J. Trump.

He - and his family - endured a politically-motivated FBI raid of their home, two sham impeachments, bogus indictments in four different jurisdictions, and an endless slog of Fake News hit pieces... _And yet they kept fighting for our country!_

**_[So- in the spirit of the holiday - we want to send President Trump a card to let the Trump Family know how thankful we are that they never gave up.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Q_oV_7W4Sf33_FZVAl2nOA~~/AARclAA~~~ "So – in the spirit of the holiday – we want to send President Trump a card to let the Trump Family know how thankful we are that they never gave up. - Team Scalise

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
Reserve your DVD box set

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=648c349b054c44449cc056db509cace8&_e=6KeApWTErIyrboIbKkYtvf0IKUUgG05TXzOeNJ-FzGy3gHjz3Nu_R2P26etnpKAV51E06P_js691VyincRnTFKBY-ruG1DCZIaamz7oIYpbgNan3JmwdhxnxQ49dHgL-Rr31LWiuUBmLpWDKQ3qJcZBVukZvftfWECcA7NQz9r1bSJ9JbBMcXsFbQqRBfz8-BduIKXUqLcjsVMPUEZTHGZMiiCxfTfXy1y-9Eq1yrIlA-vrMAaOlapKjpgwneudtpArpS8x0wyW5SYQLEiYJJpLBAxFl--aIA64fKl8epkEatqkb_uGpwfGcbfx_6-vBniqJrKx7hA8TuAc7JOkDTqWlqEOQABV_Wr5EQLKzausir6QoZfoszZMm3pqljCdOe0XJKDDw49_SNh9WCoJsJo5aWAttewsERmSRvkPHvnPxotXhGHSyeF_l6hAlsolV)

| | Dear Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=648c349b054c44449cc056db509cace8&_e=6KeApWTErIyrboIbKkYtvf0IKUUgG05TXzOeNJ-FzGy3gHjz3Nu_R2P26etnpKAV51E06P_js691VyincRnTFKBY-ruG1DCZIaamz7oIYpbgNan3JmwdhxnxQ49dHgL-Rr31LWiuUBmLpWDKQ3qJcZBVukZvftfWECcA7NQz9r1bSJ9JbBMcXsFbQqRBfz8-BduIKXUqLcjsVMPUEZTHGZMiiCxfTfXy1y-9Eq1yrIlA-vrMAaOlapKjpgwneudtpArpS8x0wyW5SYQLEiYJJm09HW90VzWMH2ZM2Jplzpyuh6396kgNH_UCAWwHMf5NoK8XUEbLkWcTKDOMqaTuoGWtMDT_A64X-4rzRg-J0l7lA3VF1t1YUws5s3RJM-TKag4Wd8A3tVCmVKO6h_-_SjQ3WrXi6Zbv-PfggsXAWxHvu5ClAbfBgwxDN0V7OfHC)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=648c349b054c44449cc056db509cace8&_e=6KeApWTErIyrboIbKkYtvf0IKUUgG05TXzOeNJ-FzGy3gHjz3Nu_R2P26etnpKAV51E06P_js691VyincRnTFKBY-ruG1DCZIaamz7oIYpbgNan3JmwdhxnxQ49dHgL-Rr31LWiuUBmLpWDKQ3qJcZBVukZvftfWECcA7NQz9r1bSJ9JbBMcXsFbQqRBfz8-BduIKXUqLcjsVMPUEZTHGZMiiCxfTfXy1y-9Eq1yrIlA-vrMAaOlapKjpgwneudtpArpS8x0wyW5SYQLEiYJJoOfJO6turWkQcXIgees21ZeXX3K-z91hv4GkLj_9FJndWJc747nRtSrUcuwGyyV5TGDh35lTjBlQyclCWQhT2kQN-qK9FQvxw029WYpSgY-T09zgFAP1STCiBSRu0GgzbfPx5L6b4xxq52SShCdQn2M9Iv1SjihnUbXP-ERmJSs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=648c349b054c44449cc056db509cace8&_e=6KeApWTErIyrboIbKkYtvf0IKUUgG05TXzOeNJ-FzGy3gHjz3Nu_R2P26etnpKAV51E06P_js691VyincRnTFKBY-ruG1DCZIaamz7oIYpbgNan3JmwdhxnxQ49dHgL-Rr31LWiuUBmLpWDKQ3qJcZBVukZvftfWECcA7NQz9r1bSJ9JbBMcXsFbQqRBfz8-BduIKXUqLcjsVMPUEZTHGZMiiCxfTfXy1y-9Eq1yrIlA-vrMAaOlapKjpgwneudtpArpS8x0wyW5SYQLEiYJJkGX75lkjKwC_lzEPSAkt1TrlFYCzKILrBCUFL6btav7pSbVmlzI4T1fbzSkReEw9yHAMMIviNaTZ8fOGgyfKvV91ty4WcA_GtbexXwL2-X4U_k1rDVCCtdJqRz4kuzg-vEbR70WgSUMnuP_ikIYfr_1qtpN8GrUjQW0nPhpJD3i).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=648c349b054c44449cc056db509cace8&_t=8EbgszZCqamLGslGEREwHePyNi0p1g1aLpy1otZzMk-kDXKUeTfWaTlIQNpYvx4U-lfW6rDC7jTRLo6QQvEnuMhS8zpLoKZ1A8aB1zPY4-Kjol0ZossoOzsTrIOMXDPs)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Warrior Money on Yahoo Finance & The Warrior Class at Army-Navy
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Listen/Watch Warrior Money Friday's at 12:30PM
Check out our new podcast, Warrior Money , hosted on Yahoo Finance by myself and Co-Host Dan Kunze. A show that supports and offers financial advice to the veteran community.
Hi Peter,
I'm excited to announce the launch of our new podcast: Warrior Money . Myself and my co-host Dan Kunze have teamed up with Yahoo Finance to bring our listeners a show that supports service members throughout their service life cycle by providing unmatched personal finance and career advice to the veteran community through our expert guests.
Our first episode is a conversation with Admiral William McRaven. Admiral William H. McRaven is a retired U.S. Navy SEAL and led the daring raid that brought Osama bin Laden to justice. With 37 years of military service, McRaven's leadership lessons transcend the battlefield, inspiring teams in business, education, and public service.
A #1 New York Times bestselling author and sought-after speaker, Admiral McRaven shares practical wisdom on overcoming adversity and achieving greatness. His iconic "Make Your Bed" commencement speech has motivated millions to take on life’s toughest challenges, one small step at a time.
Don’t miss the opportunity to learn from a modern legend in leadership and resilience.
Please watch, review, and share the first episode which can be found on YouTube here [https://youtu.be/X4mKM6CkS3g?si=mcrSwNfOwBJqdel1] , and can be listened to anywhere you get your podcasts.
In addition to the launch of Warrior Money , I'm equally excited to announce the 3rd edition of The Warrior Class Army-Navy Conference. Having previously been hosted at the Wharton School of Business and MIT's Sloan School of Management, The Warrior Class is coming to Georgetown University.
On Friday, December 13th from 12:30pm - 5:30pm, The Warrior Class will be held in Georgetown's Lohrfink Auditorium featuring panels on veterans in finance, healthcare, entrepreneurship and public service. The event is a partnership with Georgetown's McDonough Military Association and Sitreps2steercos that brings together veterans of all stripes to address each field's most pressing challenges with the expertise of members of The Warrior Class
Reserve your spot at the conference here [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/the-warrior-class-army-navy-conference-2024-at-georgetown-university-tickets-1077667796389?aff=oddtdtcreator] .
Hope to see you there.
Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Undersecretary of the Army
Former Congressman
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

body:
Wow, Peter!

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy with the NEW **Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E.)** have some **BIG CUTS** to make, starting with:

_$20K for drag shows in Ecuador?
$450K to find out if dinosaurs could sing?
$549K for cat experiments?
$630K paying for 'Social Media Likes?'
$817K for studying MONKEY drool?
$2.5 million for a Super Bowl ad?
$3 MILLION to keep SHADY doctors in business?
**[$3.5 MILLION study"Proving That Fear of Pain Is Why You're Afraid of the Dentist?"](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=40ba6d0a65254144900e90d109216296&_e=icv7qIp0G-grbAoMO1x3cYRb5FPxPkm9rh6oWJUvCG49hIhd1bqPR4nx77CvEHwdQv8fqoPPV2izxq8jRoat8kHEJlUotsdB7IDUMEoU0bjXPB1FuzJGt0YJhH7MfOOalpb0F17yX3A23LnbOaIN8F3jJ9SQnYi5nh8gfmyi3EuGdlLGg2pGZR9kxqgVfCWQiVB9GraUw_vJpxvkuYKGtFxTK9EggoqcFexwfy97NDPigrnO-MqrgZ2KjICp8fHyWJf-Vu4a0NnRO9MAw_yOMmTcSP3Fr99m5w9by1JRM7LrNACMhSV4EnG2DGRnHPjL77OP1K_7BXYukBagVRpTRWJ_x-Yn8hBMpSvW03B4cotC8x26IEMccyn2MM2A1ZJR95ofRtfRzMevBO6S3QxiZD8_R5bpqtlfZOC4gvfZE0a1I_bD0STbkHKmaxjo6xyMmiD6Cd4gMlRZ0xZOQjyt3qer8gELP3dBkxvmCS11Q4WpJweMlC1ezc4jWkRR4KKX)**_

name: David Hogg
subject: Playing the long game
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We elected six young leaders this year – and we’re just getting started.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241126-1&t=1&akid=1480%2E587540%2EZ8AYsY)
Peter, one of the key aspects that sets Leaders We Deserve apart is that we're playing the long game. I've said this over and over because it's super important:
**Democrats need to build our bench with young progressive leaders TODAY so they can lead our country tomorrow.** A young candidate we’re electing to a state legislature right now could very well be the future President of the United States.
**[We elected six young leaders to state legislatures and Congress this year — and Peter, we're just getting started. Pitch in $5 and help keep up the fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241126-1?refcode=em20241126-1480&amount=5&refcode2=1480_587540_Z8AYsY&akid=1480%2E587540%2EZ8AYsY)**
In college, I studied the way conservative political movements built their power over the past 30 years, winning control of state legislatures and appointing a ton of far-right judges to advance their agenda. It didn’t happen out of nowhere – conservatives and Republicans worked tirelessly to get to where they are now.
It was a major wake-up call for me – and one of the reasons I helped start Leaders We Deserve. We have a generation of young people who are ready to step up and lead. These are the progressive leaders who will write the future of this country, who will fight for our values and create the progress that we need to see. But they need our support today to win their elections and start building those movements.
I know the results of the presidential election were extremely disappointing. Like you, I’m worried about what the future holds under a second Trump administration.
But the work we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve was always much bigger than the presidential election. I take comfort in the fact that we elected six new young people across the country – and that we’ll continue to grow that number year after year, cycle after cycle. We are building a solid foundation for a progressive future.
**[Peter, can we count on you to play the long game with us? Donate $5 now to power our work electing the next generation of progressive leaders.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241126-1?refcode=em20241126-1480&amount=5&refcode2=1480_587540_Z8AYsY&akid=1480%2E587540%2EZ8AYsY)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241126-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241126-1480&refcode2=1480_587540_Z8AYsY&akid=1480%2E587540%2EZ8AYsY)**
Thank you!!
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241126-1&t=2&refcode2=1480_587540_Z8AYsY&akid=1480%2E587540%2EZ8AYsY)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1480%2E587540%2EZ8AYsY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1480%2E587540%2EZ8AYsY)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Jack Smith ends his "prosecution" of Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
The "Prosecution" was nothing more than persecution. | | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=685bae8c5c3c498c86147f48889a67a0&_e=JgVWz3ixBbShGKEKwg7lMLPLvWGA_BwJnHNaASqnGe_s-tP92SA7sHgfVwmJLEYNW7M1kO8ROlGlirWusNIMrFJOnP3n2zF41ahnhNx77mJlFtIBWMxIKonGd8uyvt6bXtb4tUrnNVWKvoqM73obHviMugBX9K-EZDgEv-Z2MNGDOvyfSdTDIgparPbEObPYyRmQ_ZhhjQjB7BIA-gjOCIWcBN5YOKmFTzGSJU4j8Htu9zluy6EHU1PrILSRirrR_UIAgTGr2XWeXq35fuD_gBZ6nujzIeT4Ihi9HKb8Hxbs5sPZkbF5-poH20sm5w7zCvKx6T2yLWeDDuvV5htYNkxTPcWGTsuOziZ80s42JcWTeWrbmzOQHNmUwWHby59cnDBEvsCWD3UJD7vKMc1X8g%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
The prosecution of Donald Trump was a farce. I knew it, you knew it, Donald Trump knew it, and the Democrats knew it. The left pulled out every dirty trick in their playbook and still failed.

Right now, we are the _only state_ in the Southeast without an abortion ban or extreme restrictions. But that safety net only exists because of our Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate. The Sonoma Coast Redwoods property is home to some of California’s oldest second growth redwoods as well as some redwoods that are up to 1,000 years old! The land has a rich cultural history as the ancestral territory of the Kashia Band of Pomo Indians, and its forests are of the highest conservation priority due to their incredible carbon-storage potential.
This land has so much history, connecting us to the past – and, if we can protect it, connecting us to a brighter, greener future!
This Giving TREESday, you can help us achieve something incredible and preserve this iconic California landscape. clean_body: Protect Sonoma Coast Redwoods. Forever. Dear Peter, The history, biodiversity, and untamed beauty of Sonoma Coast Redwoods is simply unmatched – and it deserves to be protected. Today, tomorrow, forever. We have an incredible chance to save Sonoma Coast Redwoods, but we need your help. That’s why we’re launching our Giving TREEsday campaign a week early! Thanks to an additional $100,000 match from Mathias Blume! This triple match is a true WIN-WIN-WIN scenario: | WIN: | You can get your gift in early before the flurry of Giving Tuesday emails hits your inbox. ---|--- WIN: | Every dollar of your gift will be matched, tripling your impact. WIN: | You will help the League acquire and protect 1,600+ acres of land that includes breathtaking and breath-giving redwood forests. The Sonoma Coast Redwoods property is home to some of California’s oldest second growth redwoods as well as some redwoods that are up to 1,000 years old! The land has a rich cultural history as the ancestral territory of the Kashia Band of Pomo Indians, and its forests are of the highest conservation priority due to their incredible carbon-storage potential. This land has so much history, connecting us to the past – and, if we can protect it, connecting us to a brighter, greener future! This Giving TREESday, you can help us achieve something incredible and preserve this iconic California landscape. Let’s get this done! | Tim Whalen Chief Development Officer ---|--- P.S. This triple match won’t last forever, so , before the deadline next week! | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- |

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: REMINDER: TODAY at 3PM, Senator Hughes Will Discuss Project 2025 and Your Healthcare
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100168989.172896.590&gen=1).

#
# [**Register HERE**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168989.172896.590&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12457)
# [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168989.172896.590&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12459)
[Join Senator Hughes and Andrea Ducas](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168989.172896.590&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12457), VP of Health Policy at the Center for American Progress, for an online town hall about how healthcare access and costs could be impacted by plans from Project 2025. This will be an interactive discussion. Senator Hughes and Andrea will discuss what Pennsylvanians can expect from the Project 2025 agenda and take questions from attendees. Please share this invitation with any friends and family who have questions about Project 2025 and the future of their healthcare. All are welcome!

body:
I need your name on this!

| | | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkL-OtCAUR58GO4wXFbWg-JKJyVfMNlNsSRCuDBP5E8Cd19-Y7PZb3-Tcc36fd3lX7nDBfiiPwpUic5Fv5ZX01dIXp0llE4NkHRsoAGVcQmPEyGDe5wYFTD3jI8ACzVPAvCvoNJ9g6bZem04PeuunDcy-LdM2Nk5cHADGYR6msWtxUAamfVvUshiNQIbuTEZVbF0ozmDRMaYUD1edLm3MtjnEs9ZUSP-PsJWwtaA-M7ZvFzKaVkdP2OpVfsXskNqMGJDuMVMdg81YynWuVl5NKSYlMUtv6UsFfpX_6LGL3a9n9bJq0t_-Px7015wwnq-f2QVL-lvNJzZZmPR2x-EKn8jQWa_ccbk09a-Tfgn2HQAA__9M-39E)

Friend – President Trump just won the most decisive **landslide victory** this country has seen in **decades**. The people have spoken, and they want action—real action.
That’s why I’m pushing __**[the Official January 6th Pardon Petition](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkL-OtCAUR58GO4wXFbWg-JKJyVfMNlNsSRCuDBP5E8Cd19-Y7PZb3-Tcc36fd3lX7nDBfiiPwpUic5Fv5ZX01dIXp0llE4NkHRsoAGVcQmPEyGDe5wYFTD3jI8ACzVPAvCvoNJ9g6bZem04PeuunDcy-LdM2Nk5cHADGYR6msWtxUAamfVvUshiNQIbuTEZVbF0ozmDRMaYUD1edLm3MtjnEs9ZUSP-PsJWwtaA-M7ZvFzKaVkdP2OpVfsXskNqMGJDuMVMdg81YynWuVl5NKSYlMUtv6UsFfpX_6LGL3a9n9bJq0t_-Px7015wwnq-f2QVL-lvNJzZZmPR2x-EKn8jQWa_ccbk09a-Tfgn2HQAA__9M-39E)**__ to the frontlines, demanding a full pardon for every patriotic American who stood up on that historic day—prosecuted by a corrupt DOJ hellbent on silencing us, and crushing the people it should be working for under the weight of a filthy, weaponized government.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkL-OtCAUR58GO4wXFbWg-JKJyVfMNlNsSRCuDBP5E8Cd19-Y7PZb3-Tcc36fd3lX7nDBfiiPwpUic5Fv5ZX01dIXp0llE4NkHRsoAGVcQmPEyGDe5wYFTD3jI8ACzVPAvCvoNJ9g6bZem04PeuunDcy-LdM2Nk5cHADGYR6msWtxUAamfVvUshiNQIbuTEZVbF0ozmDRMaYUD1edLm3MtjnEs9ZUSP-PsJWwtaA-M7ZvFzKaVkdP2OpVfsXskNqMGJDuMVMdg81YynWuVl5NKSYlMUtv6UsFfpX_6LGL3a9n9bJq0t_-Px7015wwnq-f2QVL-lvNJzZZmPR2x-EKn8jQWa_ccbk09a-Tfgn2HQAA__9M-39E)
On January 6th, 2021, thousands of patriotic Americans gathered at the United States Capitol – __a building they own__ – to _**peacefully, and patriotically**_ protest discrepancies in an Election...
Since then, they’ve had their rights and dignities stripped: _**and they deserve better.**_
This isn’t just a petition; it’s a rallying cry. Every true American who believes in freedom, faith, and a country worth fighting for needs to put their name on this.
Friend — Sign NOW and show the deep state we won’t back down. This is our moment to stand together and reclaim what’s ours.
Will you answer the call? _**_[Add your name now](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkL-OtCAUR58GO4wXFbWg-JKJyVfMNlNsSRCuDBP5E8Cd19-Y7PZb3-Tcc36fd3lX7nDBfiiPwpUic5Fv5ZX01dIXp0llE4NkHRsoAGVcQmPEyGDe5wYFTD3jI8ACzVPAvCvoNJ9g6bZem04PeuunDcy-LdM2Nk5cHADGYR6msWtxUAamfVvUshiNQIbuTEZVbF0ozmDRMaYUD1edLm3MtjnEs9ZUSP-PsJWwtaA-M7ZvFzKaVkdP2OpVfsXskNqMGJDuMVMdg81YynWuVl5NKSYlMUtv6UsFfpX_6LGL3a9n9bJq0t_-Px7015wwnq-f2QVL-lvNJzZZmPR2x-EKn8jQWa_ccbk09a-Tfgn2HQAA__9M-39E)_**_** _._**
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkL-OtCAUR58GO4wXFbWg-JKJyVfMNlNsSRCuDBP5E8Cd19-Y7PZb3-Tcc36fd3lX7nDBfiiPwpUic5Fv5ZX01dIXp0llE4NkHRsoAGVcQmPEyGDe5wYFTD3jI8ACzVPAvCvoNJ9g6bZem04PeuunDcy-LdM2Nk5cHADGYR6msWtxUAamfVvUshiNQIbuTEZVbF0ozmDRMaYUD1edLm3MtjnEs9ZUSP-PsJWwtaA-M7ZvFzKaVkdP2OpVfsXskNqMGJDuMVMdg81YynWuVl5NKSYlMUtv6UsFfpX_6LGL3a9n9bJq0t_-Px7015wwnq-f2QVL-lvNJzZZmPR2x-EKn8jQWa_ccbk09a-Tfgn2HQAA__9M-39E)
Thank you for joining us on this journey, and thank you for celebrating with us!

body:
Data continues to show that a steady majority of Americans support stronger gun laws.
#

Take a look at this new data from Gallup:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov24.MBs8nS&refcode=em241126-1-30&t=1&akid=9506%2E3935704%2EgC4N99)
**A strong and steady majority of Americans continue to support stronger gun laws.**
We won’t try to sugarcoat it: the challenges we are about to face are going to be difficult. Donald Trump has made his allegiance to the gun lobby well-known, and so have his allies in the new Congress.
But we can’t let that deter us.
This data makes it abundantly clear: gun safety remains top of mind for the majority of Americans. Lawmakers have a duty to listen to the will of the American people and act, no matter what political party they’re in.
It’s going to be up to us to keep Trump and the MAGA-right in line next year and beyond. That’s how we’ll keep saving lives from preventable gun violence.

name: Steve Friend
subject: From Special Agent to FBI Whistleblower
body:
My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath. However, it nearly cost me everything.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47d963d74ef34ebb80d10b62bb6ec8fc&_e=BBDdKii_MSagsg_3P-jl8NyXIZ_KsSeVKbft2QqF-G40t51haNP6uZpPodn-emDeAvA6dnDaoM1_sE1CjqDwhQU2bSrE9V1O_n2wJUMsLBnve9dLurZeGzbDKPMU0xT9LLzwXhNwq8wUrTz70Dw0YWMVAC_wW9M7oagHNzzBWNzGzyCh3yXJeI3ZuaICg2aOqw8puiutxcJ06SF-yIZtBzJGwe1vsAb085gf9a24-c3EOUIRlHC1Rq_mWJQDqDXbn17e6wxUjNsTMO7Y4zENXqFJRiunvniE5QT9z6ZSSMwOTv_VxL7UnrJLUTXw1m9Uct9QvyJiacclI7ufuvCn7UHi5enHCEg4PkibMaY8Upk%3D)
Friend,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies — both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI’s National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State’s actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

It didn’t take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.

He had a productive week at Orientation, getting a full lay of the land in D.C., along with connecting with voters and helping Northeastern Pennsylvanians back at home. He went to Wilkes-Barre, Milford, Pittston, and donated his time to help give away turkeys and prepare meals in Scranton and Dupont, as well as helping his family business get power back up and running after the snow storm!

It’s an honor to have you on our team

|

| | | **We are SO proud to have YOU on our team!**

There aren't enough words to describe the extraordinary impact you have had on the House Republicans team throughout the years. **That 's why we are OFFICIALLY recognizing your devotion with the prestigious Golden Gavel Award!**

Congratulations, Friend!

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: what I said on Morning Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97712238/514326331/-491556796?refcode=241126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA2MmJkYS0yOGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=75Z_inwamrn4bi8AwwZ9m7Yxh0gD7uucHZIRb18L38A=)
---
Last week, I joined Morning Joe to discuss Trump’s selection of Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97712241/514326343/-2101623703?refcode=241126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA2MmJkYS0yOGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=75Z_inwamrn4bi8AwwZ9m7Yxh0gD7uucHZIRb18L38A=) As a former CIA case officer and Member of Congress, I’ve taken an oath to defend the U.S. Constitution. I also know that the DNI role is not something to take lightly – especially as the U.S. faces threats from adversaries around the world. Tulsi Gabbard is not only unprepared and unqualified for this role, but she has spread conspiracy theories, doubted the credibility of the U.S. intelligence community, and cozied up with dictators like Vladimir Putin and Bashar al-Assad. I’m not speaking out because of my political party — I’m speaking out on behalf of America’s national security. Throughout my life in service, I have dedicated myself to safeguarding our country, its principles, and its Constitution. As Governor of Virginia, I pledge to continue protecting our democracy, preserving our fundamental rights, and never wavering in the defense of our freedoms. [**I hope that you’ll support my efforts with a split contribution between my campaign and Serve America as I continue to serve out my term in Congress and as I continue this work as Governor of Virginia:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97712242/514326345/-2101623703?refcode=241126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA2MmJkYS0yOGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=75Z_inwamrn4bi8AwwZ9m7Yxh0gD7uucHZIRb18L38A=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97712243/514326349/-1451023484?refcode=241126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzA2MmJkYS0yOGFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=75Z_inwamrn4bi8AwwZ9m7Yxh0gD7uucHZIRb18L38A=) Thank you,

clean_body: | = Last week, I joined Morning Joe to discuss Trump’s selection of Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence: = As a former CIA case officer and Member of Congress, I’ve taken an oath to defend the U.S. Constitution. I also know that the DNI role is not something to take lightly – especially as the U.S. faces threats from adversaries around the world. Tulsi Gabbard is not only unprepared and unqualified for this role, but she has spread conspiracy theories, doubted the credibility of the U.S. intelligence community, and cozied up with dictators like Vladimir Putin and Bashar al-Assad. I’m not speaking out because of my political party — I’m speaking out on behalf of America’s national security. Throughout my life in service, I have dedicated myself to safeguarding our country, its principles, and its Constitution. As Governor of Virginia, I pledge to continue protecting our democracy, preserving our fundamental rights, and never wavering in the defense of our freedoms. = = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger = = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Serve America PAC

name: Democrats.org
subject: Less than 50 percent
body:
Here’s where things stand:
---
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?refcode=em_20241126_2351_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2356_22930333_UjC2mW&akid=2356%2E22930333%2EUjC2mW) We know you’re probably getting ready to log off for Thanksgiving, so this will only take 60 seconds, Derek (we promise). Here’s where things stand: We know the outcome of the presidential race was not the one we wanted, and you’re likely exhausted, frustrated, or both. But as more votes are counted, they show Trump has now won less than 50 percent of the popular vote. That’s the narrowest popular vote victory margin in decades. It’s clear: There are millions of voters all over the country who are not going to let Trump and a Republican Congress do whatever they want without a fight. We can -- and will -- channel that energy into fighting back against Trump and his allies’ Project 2025 agenda. But to do that, we’ll need a strong and robust Democratic Party to organize and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party under Trump’s control. [**If holding Trump accountable and electing Democrats at all levels of government matters to you, we’re asking you to chip in $3 to help us keep building the strong Democratic Party we’ll need:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241126_2351_fr&refcode2=2356_22930333_UjC2mW&akid=2356%2E22930333%2EUjC2mW) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241126_2351_fr&refcode2=2356_22930333_UjC2mW&akid=2356%2E22930333%2EUjC2mW)**

clean_body: Together, we can accomplish ALL of these priorities. | = Peter, Last week, we sent out two surveys asking our supporters what they want to see from the Democratic Party going forward and what role EMILYs List should play in its future. Because right now, this pro-choice community has an exciting opportunity to help write the next chapter of American politics — and we want to hear from you directly as we chart our path forward. Thousands of you filled out our surveys. Here's what you had to say: = Peter, thank you for sharing your ideas and priorities for the future. This thoughtful, dedicated pro-choice community is our greatest strength, and we couldn't be more grateful for your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks again, \- the EMILYs List team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Friend: GOP Leader Mike Johnson is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. He was recently reelected Speaker after securing Donald Trump's support, promising to push through his radical Project 2025/Agenda 47 plans to reshape our country.
This comes after he fought the Biden administration tooth and nail, green-lighting congressional investigations into President Biden's family members and killing potential bipartisan deals on issues like immigration reform.
We're looking to see how our members feel about the job he's done. Please take our quick survey:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112624_2&amount=25]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor

Trump isn’t backing down from his plans to revive Schedule F – a dangerous policy from his last term focused on firing nonpartisan federal workers and replacing them with partisan loyalists.

| **Trump isn’t backing down from his plans to revive Schedule F – a dangerous policy from his last term focused on firing nonpartisan federal workers and replacing them with partisan loyalists.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97713746/514330059/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzVkNGUyOTgtMmRhYy1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dLKBtUqV5vdya9H-qLcw5CYjqghRNj9dcOHjDCd6exs=)
If Trump’s cabinet is any indication, instead of hiring and appointing experienced professionals, the president-elect has nominated unqualified partisans who put loyalty to him above all else.

**Trump’s policies are a direct threat to Virginia jobs and Virginia’s economy. Virginia has one of the largest populations of federal workers in the country.**

We can’t let this happen. We need leadership that will put Virginians first – not partisan politics. That’s why I’m running for Governor – to fight for fair, transparent policies that keep Virginia’s economy strong and our government accountable to the people.

But I can’t do this alone. I need your support to keep pushing forward and stop Trump’s dangerous agenda in its tracks. Together, we can protect the hardworking Virginians who depend on a fair and functional government to thrive.

name: Suozzi for Congress
subject: Thank You!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/786da08aa9a3/suozzi-volunteer-newsletter-issue-12710690?e=2d63ff009b)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| Dear Team Suozzi,
Happy Thanksgiving!
I am so grateful for all of your help this past year!
When I ran in the special election in February, it was the most intense campaign experience of my career. Millions of dollars were spent trying to attack my record. Special elections are notorious for low turnout. It seemed like we were running sprints every day for three months. There were some who doubted I could win, but they underestimated my secret weapon.
YOU!
And you did it again on November 5th.
Simply put, I would not be in the United States Congress or able to help the people I have been able to help, and will help, were it not for you and all of your hard work.
Helene and I, along with our children, Caroline, Joe, and Michael, are so grateful to have you on our team.
I will always do my best to make you happy and to never regret that you put in the effort to help me win.
Again, have a healthy and happy Thanksgiving, and from the bottom of my heart...Thank you!!
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://suozziforcongress2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c0ad4a8bbd8df94a8b1718e5&id=ce255243cd&e=2d63ff009b)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Team Suozzi, Happy Thanksgiving! I am so grateful for all of your help this past year! When I ran in the special election in February, it was the most intense campaign experience of my career. Millions of dollars were spent trying to attack my record. Special elections are notorious for low turnout. It seemed like we were running sprints every day for three months. There were some who doubted I could win, but they underestimated my secret weapon. YOU! And you did it again on November 5th. Simply put, I would not be in the United States Congress or able to help the people I have been able to help, and will help, were it not for you and all of your hard work. Helene and I, along with our children, Caroline, Joe, and Michael, are so grateful to have you on our team. I will always do my best to make you happy and to never regret that you put in the effort to help me win. Again, have a healthy and happy Thanksgiving, and from the bottom of my heart...Thank you!! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Suozzi for CongressPO Box 669Glen Cove, NY 11542United States Please do not press unsubscribe if this email was forwarded to you, as it will unsubscribe the original recipient.If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: My husband, Andy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people.

| Hi Peter, it’s Sarah McBride.

**I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use.** I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them.

**People like my husband, Andy.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97713879/514330487/-50313941?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhZjk1MjI5LTJlYWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1PJaKCJIcHqcc3PfbCkmO27_o8Hbk25vvZ3oojW76eE=)
When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed, and in the end, holding his hand as he passed away.

I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky.

Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him.

Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs.

My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities.

But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country.

That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate.

[_**I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people. If you’re with me, please split a $25 contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97713880/514330488/-50313941?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhZjk1MjI5LTJlYWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1PJaKCJIcHqcc3PfbCkmO27_o8Hbk25vvZ3oojW76eE=)

Thank you,

Sarah McBride
Delaware’s Congresswoman-elect

* * *
| | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97713881/514330489/1995195851?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-11-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhZjk1MjI5LTJlYWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1PJaKCJIcHqcc3PfbCkmO27_o8Hbk25vvZ3oojW76eE=)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=b944903750a54f6394f8348cd1f043eb&_t=ZlehyDND7PiKdr5rbpoHiTHACHHofJ_o4P1zu_OwVLprh3NO7tiH38_-ve0iXMbl5XdHFtiUmXpGERtt8vc8lOGOxdA2OYOOLWwAIWRcpyrU9xaBv6-77v3oIU3nmqyX)_
---
---
| | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=b944903750a54f6394f8348cd1f043eb&_e=LtZtSvenMmsZxPJ7iRJsrjR5V0dh_8yfZHl8XgRuNnalgcfmPTWbV1GI_5-wlu_GeeBAW4ygLYrzS1g_7yidXjwbHEPgTdwDwbmNT31iTzeHw_nqhc_CEOijPlrrI3XtC29-0PM8zLZMxMAwUk8KgNGIESEwjkyhegEw_7jrWA7J7ZaGwjtmz3xop13arDxIdwXbsL0vv6-HcEz9JIdsE-ssYhEu16bzEIlvAP0Ep4vT9BryaooLNomF5z8YF5GbaRBw-Qb6SwEo4shBYJuWcrgA2p2hNS0QZbEi_AXvDO99EJUBYjbeub51K0YVpEklqX9gtodEAFE5E9RGkOThy31-wg72SDTCP8Xxnt6C21YljUioTcKDw3hhLQ8l8FtHWbtLjDY7dr8fz3Xal6L1SgF3QNhde4MzOHHRPiES6sE%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life.

Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal.

Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=b944903750a54f6394f8348cd1f043eb&_e=LtZtSvenMmsZxPJ7iRJsrjR5V0dh_8yfZHl8XgRuNnalgcfmPTWbV1GI_5-wlu_GeeBAW4ygLYrzS1g_7yidXjwbHEPgTdwDwbmNT31iTzeHw_nqhc_CEOijPlrrI3XtC29-0PM8zLZMxMAwUk8KgNGIESEwjkyhegEw_7jrWA7J7ZaGwjtmz3xop13arDxIdwXbsL0vv6-HcEz9JIdsE-ssYhEu16bzEIlvAP0Ep4vT9BryaooLNomF5z8YF5GbMGq5r8BRGktDrqJbokkbVm71DjlrS5cSmEFPFhdsr2No1I5L56DlF-ukDz2ZsXj9VLutUc9F_Qs_h21tMHSJns8KMV-rV-oQfFsBdZm7HDIDPSGguYdGyrDuitD8c98lTpCl5AZpYgaA7H7doitSNtfEX21MnaADWXMiZ74cGEw%3D) **
As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.**

Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him.

I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief.

I believe that you believe that too.

I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment.

The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=b944903750a54f6394f8348cd1f043eb&_e=LtZtSvenMmsZxPJ7iRJsrjR5V0dh_8yfZHl8XgRuNnalgcfmPTWbV1GI_5-wlu_GeeBAW4ygLYrzS1g_7yidXjwbHEPgTdwDwbmNT31iTzeHw_nqhc_CEOijPlrrI3XtC29-0PM8zLZMxMAwUk8KgNGIESEwjkyhegEw_7jrWA7J7ZaGwjtmz3xop13arDxIdwXbsL0vv6-HcEz9JIdsE-ssYhEu16bzEIlvAP0Ep4vT9BryaooLNomF5z8YF5GbrVIkO_dttknsBB0DVNg-oFf2uPfFkekXwnrFXcD1G1uLmc-J7k40336bSuUpm3qwEdSG8-jpfamP5pBdrNo9C9I17m3y-Iu5rgzyT0CRZT73zTHdyLjEFx3XHw9DZZEe6aoMTUTjIIfkz7C1H2Uxo-S1MEd1OYCWhwqm4ShY-KM%3D)

I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn?

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=b944903750a54f6394f8348cd1f043eb&_e=LtZtSvenMmsZxPJ7iRJsrjR5V0dh_8yfZHl8XgRuNnalgcfmPTWbV1GI_5-wlu_GeeBAW4ygLYrzS1g_7yidXjwbHEPgTdwDwbmNT31iTzeHw_nqhc_CEOijPlrrI3XtC29-0PM8zLZMxMAwUk8KgNGIESEwjkyhegEw_7jrWA7J7ZaGwjtmz3xop13arDxIdwXbsL0vv6-HcEz9JIdsE-ssYhEu16bzEIlvAP0Ep4vT9BryaooLNomF5z8YF5GbZNJcpFwysio_WvjZibZ-sRkugmMBWv5UFODwscSvTESE8SZG1-MxaDi7FPHJtJD62-_WHp5Fqdj0xnVbc7lBLIGZbJTZhHbhjmtOhNABNMUtAEct5LxktR_gtyJF81cBVIoREMeSiJgIGDhhodcTq9GkPAByy8xd6kSLeuJLUxk%3D)

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=b944903750a54f6394f8348cd1f043eb&_t=ZlehyDND7PiKdr5rbpoHiTHACHHofJ_o4P1zu_OwVLprh3NO7tiH38_-ve0iXMbl5XdHFtiUmXpGERtt8vc8lOGOxdA2OYOOLWwAIWRcpyrU9xaBv6-77v3oIU3nmqyX).

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I went into the belly of the beast…
body:
Following our historic Republican victory.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3351d11edf2641c2872ea82112955b1d&_e=Ps8hoGQcug_mb7vPs74bVlFqYNifkW8kABm0FAal-CKIxD97UI9O8pdoxA9KXFoJqe6EM-kka16KNa2rmz1YmEYF4nEHeR0rh2DSrcoIBxxyTB4Wu_wb3AOVWBL3qQX2N6dX_EUoMXtG_9Wo-Zl0wlqCrBHc0BMvcVOIkGgpD20xA84_EETEha-iXhxr3fQXCuA_qtBpsw7fh8Y6VRslr9tCfM9sPXApzk1_NClY7LwXBD7ZBIUPquBGuvDu8r2fANG3kBBgn5QO1bzmQWUR7rB0O4ZxLR-aMZQlJUaGiKGCodNY7pDhRJuurJNIKuQjJpxPeCOSxrJTE4lN7kF9x51YRiwVPAsdD9R7U6xycyz4R6nuRx0l81fXsOME_UxxwaLQHS8XVUtvHuDJpZzMYmMRY3FXFdfrKijncAbO4n4%3D)
---
Peter,
---
By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a clear message:
---
You asked us to clean house in Washington so that __your__ government would once again work for __you__ – the _PEOPLE_.
---
But there are those on the Left who – despite such a historic mandate from voters – would still have you believe that putting our country and _American_ citizens first is “extreme.”
---
**_That’s why I marched right into the belly of the beast on _CNN_ following the election to combat their lies and false narratives about voters like you, Peter._**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3351d11edf2641c2872ea82112955b1d&_e=Ps8hoGQcug_mb7vPs74bVlFqYNifkW8kABm0FAal-CKIxD97UI9O8pdoxA9KXFoJqe6EM-kka16KNa2rmz1YmEYF4nEHeR0rh2DSrcoIBxxyTB4Wu_wb3AOVWBL3qQX2N6dX_EUoMXtG_9Wo-Zl0wlqCrBHc0BMvcVOIkGgpD20xA84_EETEha-iXhxr3fQXCuA_qtBpsw7fh8Y6VRslr9tCfM9sPXApzk1_NClY7LwXBD7ZBIUPquBGuvDu8r2fANG3kBBgn5QO1bzmQWUR7sW5s6o8W3OdDgirFOSNh1iWq-xq5d02tx8I490YiikGYOs1xe0dzXqIg9-TD3vhDK9qzVvuqsxDyN0Hlx43_l8JAi8O7xUb3R2zGJYCJowDpoKQRYx-4oJevSSM9nLoIPw42IOJLOpBiOmCLzwCRU0%3D)
---
_I went on air to PROVE that the American people demanded change – and that no matter how hard they might try, the Democrats cannot deny the voice of the people._
---
But to fully prosecute my case against the Left’s continued lies and smears, I’m counting on grassroots Americans like you to share YOUR top priorities as we prepare to fight for you on _DAY_ _ONE_ of the new Congress.
---

clean_body: Following our historic Republican victory. | Peter, By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a clear message: You asked us to clean house in Washington so that your government would once again work for you – the PEOPLE. But there are those on the Left who – despite such a historic mandate from voters – would still have you believe that putting our country and American citizens first is “extreme.” That’s why I marched right into the belly of the beast on CNN following the election to combat their lies and false narratives about voters like you, Peter. I went on air to PROVE that the American people demanded change – and that no matter how hard they might try, the Democrats cannot deny the voice of the people. But to fully prosecute my case against the Left’s continued lies and smears, I’m counting on grassroots Americans like you to share YOUR top priorities as we prepare to fight for you on DAY ONE of the new Congress. Thank you – and let’s get to work and save our country. Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040 |
