name: Steve Friend
subject: Thanks to Kash, I stood up to the Deep State
body:
My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath. However, it nearly cost me everything.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ab06e67b1f248f681aac9220df34d02&_e=Cdt30bwm-0nvVF21GyMbNlAg6xjJaPQ4Xu9463S0QK-zQKKTsR1OtGWS8SksLzQt6EWSHh7WDn6Vlq7xNhusStukA1imfq6u5XAGzpulScwwZtjkMTbt5_hbbZG79xif9YgjTs8HT9t6LNWyQVt9Vsysh9_G7dzHSt4J7UGIkpvU1xhUdXxgJDjFo7fKCPI17Lme3hXBHFtF91KeBx0ZkwYOQudDHVXFtG35F_dUd4YoFFQqZFqvvaAMwljTlCiT7f5kNOvo-milQfS27Vw_2_PbNa5RziAipDHYy9sZlAH9fAVFAknBrWYNI4jeQORYBn8yeE1GX0eVFpaCNqkoiJuiNHGfxC51XKEh5Ob1bXo%3D)
Friend,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies — both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI’s National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State’s actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ab06e67b1f248f681aac9220df34d02&_e=Cdt30bwm-0nvVF21GyMbNlAg6xjJaPQ4Xu9463S0QK-zQKKTsR1OtGWS8SksLzQt6EWSHh7WDn6Vlq7xNhusStukA1imfq6u5XAGzpulScwwZtjkMTbt5_hbbZG79xif9YgjTs8HT9t6LNWyQVt9Vsysh9_G7dzHSt4J7UGIkps3Ht7kNPSd2MNC-Qd2mt-fojBKClnCnxqXZLIXEuTinZxcebyYtimiwJqr6vtG3vyYM-7KwUrcWqYvA0al7Kldk68B3esB3ydDwcfQYK0PgtfkWb2sp5wEduAl_E8R61vMQ8zT6zyzlDPsfV_nEoIE6hBeik1Jy_dhGrc2WEyhySDIUzoYZfub52K5iKBYGHU%3D)
[Donate](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ab06e67b1f248f681aac9220df34d02&_e=Cdt30bwm-0nvVF21GyMbNlAg6xjJaPQ4Xu9463S0QK-zQKKTsR1OtGWS8SksLzQt6EWSHh7WDn6Vlq7xNhusStukA1imfq6u5XAGzpulScwwZtjkMTbt5_hbbZG79xif9YgjTs8HT9t6LNWyQVt9Vsysh9_G7dzHSt4J7UGIkpvyFPE_KWZIZ88nj0n0DAClzt9JsmKBx4BpHKjYnCWIYldqK4St0KbY1ztMcTVKyI8nn9jDOIhYn_21ZWel2bCZXcQTChmKIfHL0-m9uTmFZirKPCp7_HyCa3cf7oa0NiWOzoY_R8v65vkll4NoANdL9NGd7AkJ3GpKfCH_FUrGldLOKFM0D7y8z8_zUQYhnsY%3D)
I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI’s unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn’t take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ab06e67b1f248f681aac9220df34d02&_e=Cdt30bwm-0nvVF21GyMbNlAg6xjJaPQ4Xu9463S0QK-zQKKTsR1OtGWS8SksLzQt6EWSHh7WDn6Vlq7xNhusStukA1imfq6u5XAGzpulScwwZtjkMTbt5_hbbZG79xif9YgjTs8HT9t6LNWyQVt9Vsysh9_G7dzHSt4J7UGIkps3Ht7kNPSd2MNC-Qd2mt-f-1qSY8F4dhLhpF-W3v19vDN3Z2PuEiO0Y6Q3U4WHwe3C83IQf3S7oVfJ8gHp0J5Xodpu4y701lmCSBmLwCh08DTw4Sww2qIvyHLeGzW_nDTnx1PtPKvVN_n575oBE2Pt62kCDbZqYUbPCbue8_v7ig2z_lCle9OJdKRjV9hkwy0%3D)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

**The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.**

Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State.

clean_body: My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath. However, it nearly cost me everything. | | | Friend, Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies — both foreign and domestic. When I discovered the FBI’s National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something. In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office. My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath.However, it nearly cost me everything. Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State’s actions. To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State. I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking. Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI’s unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. It didn’t take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment. I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI. At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk. I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions. The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger. Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty. I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back. The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth. In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign. Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at The New York Times. The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family. Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys. But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government. The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes. Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State. Thank you, Steve Friend The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Senate Confirmation: A Chance to Set the Record Straight
[THE TRUTH IS ON OUR SIDE](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_26_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is ready to take a stand.
For decades, he’s fought tirelessly for the health and freedom of the American people—challenging corruption in our public health agencies, exposing the influence of Big Pharma and Big Ag, and standing firm against censorship and misinformation.
Now, the Senate confirmation hearings present a pivotal moment: **an opportunity to let the truth shine through.**
[**This isn’t just a chance for Kennedy to address years of mischaracterizations and lies—it’s an opportunity to show the American people the depth of corporate capture in our health institutions and why bold action is needed to restore integrity and transparency.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_26_24_nd1&n=6)
_The Stakes Couldn’t Be Higher_
For years, the FDA, CDC, and other agencies have failed to prioritize the people they’re meant to protect. Instead, they’ve catered to corporate interests, allowing profits to take precedence over safety and accountability.
RFK Jr. has been unwavering in his commitment to exposing this corruption. His positions, often distorted by the media, are rooted in science, compassion, and a deep belief in the right of every American to make informed choices for their families.
**But fighting for the truth has come at a cost.**
When the Biden Administration refused Secret Service protection for Kennedy during his campaign—a protection every major presidential candidate is entitled to—he was forced to secure private security, taking on significant debt to ensure his safety and the safety of his team.
[**Your contribution today will help retire this debt so Bobby can focus entirely on this fight, without distractions.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_26_24_nd1&n=7)
[Help Retire Kennedy Debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_26_24_nd1&n=8)
Together, we can close this chapter and move forward with hope and determination, knowing that we’re on the right side of history..
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_26_24_nd1&n=9)
P.S. The Senate hearings will be a defining moment, not just for RFK Jr., but for the future of accountability in this country. Your support will help define this moment.
[**Donate now to retire the debt >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=confirmation_11_26_24_nd1&n=10)

name: Tina Kotek
subject: My thoughts on the election results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter,

I know it’s been a heavy few weeks following the results of the presidential election.

The outcome is not the one I’d hoped for, and I know most of you feel the same way. Regardless of who you supported in the election, please remember our democracy worked and election professionals in Oregon and across the country protected a free and fair election.

Here in Oregon, voters supported progressive individuals to be our next statewide leaders as Secretary of State, Treasurer, and Attorney General. Those offices will be in good hands next year. And the Oregon Senate and the Oregon House each picked up another Democratic seat and will maintain their Democratic majorities, so the legislature will be well-equipped to protect our state’s values.

That said, lots of folks are scared, sad, or both. It's time to dig deep and recommit ourselves to working together. I know there are good people in every corner of Oregon who are working tirelessly to shape a better future for their families and communities. Let’s come together and build on this resolve and stay committed to collaboration for the common good.

Oregonians have shown they will continue to lead with compassion, courage, and conviction — protecting a place where everyone can live freely and authentically.

This week, we’ll gather with friends and family to give thanks. I’m thankful for Oregon and what we’ve built in our state. And I’m thankful to be your governor in these challenging times.

We are strong, resilient, and unified by our shared belief in a brighter tomorrow. And, as your governor, I will always have your back and work hard to uplift and protect our wonderful state.

Best wishes,

Tina

Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services.
Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-biobox]
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]
Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. Friends, it’s Robert.
It’s been 3 weeks since Election Day, so I wanted to quickly check in with you and our grassroots team about your thoughts since November 5.
I know things are tough right now, people are frightened and nervous about what a second Trump administration could bring upon our country and its people. But I think it's crucial that we look back on the past few months to see how we ended up here.
As part of the Democratic leadership team, I will have a larger role to play in the party and have the opportunity to improve our messaging and strategy for the next cycle.
It's clear that Democrats need to make some changes, and I want to hear from you what you want to see from Democrats moving forward.

name: Amanda Chase
subject: BREAKING NEWS: New Date. Details for the Senate District Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | |
SPECIAL ELECTION for SENATE DISTRICT 10 TO BE HELD
WHEN? FRIDAY, DEC 13, 2024 Registration: 4:30-6:30pm
WHERE? Goochland Sports Complex 1800 Sandy Hook Road Goochland, Va 23063
---
---
| The Special Election to fill the vacancy in Senate District 10 will take place on Friday, December 13, 2024 at the Goochland Sports Complex, located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road in Goochland County. Registration is from 4:30 to 6:30pm.
### Tonight, the Senate District 10 Committee chose to have a Republican Mass Meeting on Friday, December 13th with registration beginning at 4:30pm, with only those in line by 6:30pm being eligible to vote.
This is a similar process to the convention many participated in over a year ago, with registration at the door to ensure Democrats don't participate in choosing our Republican nominee.
Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way?
Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years.
I'm thankful that the day was moved from a Thursday night to a Friday night.
The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory.
You may want to pack some snacks, water and even a lunch. It's such a small price to pay for our freedom.
My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting. So please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly.
Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County.
If you are willing to come Friday, December 13 to Goochland to vote for me, please click the link below so we can get a good head count. I'm so thankful for your support.
---
| [BE A CHASE DELEGATE CLICK HERE](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T6FfPlXyRCukjLkIZt-F8pL5SqXFdoW448i98uiu9T7i3WzE9pijYTylIBuNvyZEn3E_o16Ohjr-pd2A6VHAfDu_6EaKT_SFVWJfBShT-CKWW5Ez9UGbbKxwiWPaW0p2bln_QTyy_yiq-dmUBO0Ueu9xjd6qJFVu&c=kEA47IQOtaCDH1pp2ISrGGXjf8EXGZgCjYC--Xki8nlHy6wg1mmdgw==&ch=zatjWyVu0Fw0viierFtDY422LcDnpd2z47IHPEhL7lUmKz6LPSM3ZA==)
---
| |
---
We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December.
As it stands, if you would like to vote for me, you:
1. Must live in Senate District 10
2. Be a registered voter
3. Be willing to drive to the Goochland Sports Complex
4. Be in line to register from 4:30-6:30pm. Please arrive early.
5. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting. If you can't, please vote in the first round and stay as long as you are able. We are hoping to win this on the first ballot.
6. Bring your driver's license to vote.
7. Bring snacks in case their a wait

From now through our Republican Mass Meeting on Friday, December 13, please be vigilant about checking your emails so you will have the most recent information.

---

clean_body: | | | | SPECIAL ELECTION for SENATE DISTRICT 10 TO BE HELD WHEN? FRIDAY, DEC 13, 2024 Registration: 4:30-6:30pm WHERE? Goochland Sports Complex 1800 Sandy Hook Road Goochland, Va 23063 | The Special Election to fill the vacancy in Senate District 10 will take place on Friday, December 13, 2024 at the Goochland Sports Complex, located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road in Goochland County. Registration is from 4:30 to 6:30pm. Tonight, the Senate District 10 Committee chose to have a Republican Mass Meeting on Friday, December 13th with registration beginning at 4:30pm, with only those in line by 6:30pm being eligible to vote. This is a similar process to the convention many participated in over a year ago, with registration at the door to ensure Democrats don't participate in choosing our Republican nominee. Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way? Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years. I'm thankful that the day was moved from a Thursday night to a Friday night. The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory. You may want to pack some snacks, water and even a lunch. It's such a small price to pay for our freedom. My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting. So please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly. Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County. If you are willing to come Friday, December 13 to Goochland to vote for me, please click the link below so we can get a good head count. I'm so thankful for your support. | == | | We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December. As it stands, if you would like to vote for me, you: 1. Must live in Senate District 10 2. Be a registered voter 3. Be willing to drive to the Goochland Sports Complex 4. Be in line to register from 4:30-6:30pm. Please arrive early. 5. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting. If you can't, please vote in the first round and stay as long as you are able. We are hoping to win this on the first ballot. 6. Bring your driver's license to vote. 7. Bring snacks in case their a wait From now through our Republican Mass Meeting on Friday, December 13, please be vigilant about checking your emails so you will have the most recent information. | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | | |

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: America Betrayed
body:
I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. | |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbeeb30d94a14779b57e91ad1e77de95&_e=sHx0rbfYXO3dNjPzMVYN_wHXeTo6-6QZx2_XNdhAzLQRLReZrYqbhA2qwd1Iz5UAwE-KkPNOoe0OoStxpPMurOuFWGFYkSweUxXBViveSFcqKIahpZfhtRuzCZ1ETWx4t2-On8qHD1ebzx8A8jcUZu4Z_MTEnOsvvjONSaj6MBRFksRSZc_j58AkZJN7FB_-V_tSeMgXiLTSprpOWaeQkZ9EMGkUeEnt1GADP6BEe8uBm8ShhaO_zupIJdzbKlfw3ReFuFawOmHhkkh-r4-hA_8Yxu5UpXlF7k4p2Hu-vPo3RTA5rzkQq1eCkJDNP-dEtm5g2mdfvYoqLxqJl3ws1u-SWUiTqZhz_yod4l5TPNWhepK_x026YvbaBuB21p4wuhj2l6B-vSchWntN1-bXtw%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbeeb30d94a14779b57e91ad1e77de95&_e=sHx0rbfYXO3dNjPzMVYN_wHXeTo6-6QZx2_XNdhAzLQRLReZrYqbhA2qwd1Iz5UAwE-KkPNOoe0OoStxpPMurOuFWGFYkSweUxXBViveSFcqKIahpZfhtRuzCZ1ETWx4t2-On8qHD1ebzx8A8jcUZu4Z_MTEnOsvvjONSaj6MBRFksRSZc_j58AkZJN7FB_-V_tSeMgXiLTSprpOWaeQkZ9EMGkUeEnt1GADP6BEe8uBm8ShhaO_zupIJdzbKlfwc6iqD95FPe39IaJh6Ace2WOAQUqkth1J2NZVOp0EBun5P1kyVDSj8NzLNQD4eDTJW4MCnkJCAJhjpII8dzN14nhwl9QeYso8c36oZKWavEE5g7K2C_wGmRrEgFwXkgFXIt_NbDRD3vtWkqtiGGc3Iw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cbeeb30d94a14779b57e91ad1e77de95&_e=sHx0rbfYXO3dNjPzMVYN_wHXeTo6-6QZx2_XNdhAzLQRLReZrYqbhA2qwd1Iz5UAwE-KkPNOoe0OoStxpPMurOuFWGFYkSweUxXBViveSFcqKIahpZfhtRuzCZ1ETWx4t2-On8qHD1ebzx8A8jcUZu4Z_MTEnOsvvjONSaj6MBRFksRSZc_j58AkZJN7FB_-V_tSeMgXiLTSprpOWaeQkZ9EMGkUeEnt1GADP6BEe8uBm8ShhaO_zupIJdzbKlfwAca2S_Hym1tDsoD_FZ-ZOaw17YFuM76ydoiruyndz7r_2IRMEBv41HHkH-l0--0glhy8q6AXgAnnndyjgqp3y8NqdSqzpbkja7HXXFI2CVUFFTkjiwjghFeQWCKgmBWHaOKeEf3Bru5BQavJN24uFQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. name: Neil Parrott
subject: Happy Early Thanksgiving
body:
April, our kids, and I want to thank you for helping us in our race for US Congress. Thanks to you, and many people like you, we were in a solid | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=da832285ca)
---
|
---
| | Dear Peter,

Happy Early Thanksgiving!

April, our kids, and I want to thank you for helping us in our race for US Congress. Thanks to you, and many people like you, we were in a solid position to win this race.

On Election Day Voting, we won the race. During Early Voting, we won the race. However, the mail-in ballots, tens of thousands of them, were overwhelmingly straight-Democrat votes.

On election night, the race was too close to call. It was a bittersweet night. We went to bed relieved that Donald Trump would be our next President, but wondering what the next few days would mean for us and our volunteers.

I want to give you the details of what happened in the last few weeks of the campaign in a separate email, but for now, I must ask for your help. We were ahead in the polls, and we ended the race going “all in” in an attempt to win. However, due to a very unexpected expenditure, we now have $32,000 of campaign debt that we need to take care of right away.

You have been a big part of “Team Parrott,” and I could really use your help. _Would you please make an immediate donation of_ _ $10, _$____25__ __, $____50__ __, $____100, or more ___to Parrott for Congress to help us take care of this amount?_
---
| [Send $10 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=b4af0087dd&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $10 Today")
---
| [Send $25 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=7949f942a2&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $25 Today")
---
| [Send $50 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=38e18187bd&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $50 Today")
---
| [Send $100 Today](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=5747ffec11&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $100 Today")
---
| I look forward to writing again soon with details of the end of the election.

For now, I want to thank you again for standing with us, for praying for us, and for working to help our country go in a more common-sense, conservative direction.

For our country,
Neil
---
| [SEND WHAT YOU CAN TO HELP](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=ba201d18e5&e=5a45ee1154 "SEND WHAT YOU CAN TO HELP")
---

Friend,
Join us for the **Republican Party of Virginia's Annual Advance** in Charlottesville! This year, we’re adding something truly special to our Saturday program: **historical actors from American Historical Theatre** will bring famous political figures from the past to life.
Experience history like never before as talented performers portray American heroes and heroines, delivering **first-person performances** that educate, entertain, and inspire. It’s a unique opportunity to learn from the past while we work to shape the future.
**Purchase your tickets today** and be part of this unforgettable experience!

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: This year’s Giving Tuesday is more important than ever — help us prepare for a Trump presidency
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4MjEwNjQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDM5NzcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — every year, Giving Tuesday is an important day for LCV. Meeting
our Giving Tuesday fundraising goal sets up how much we can accomplish in the
year ahead. It’s one of the most important days on the calendar for us. With Trump headed back to the White House in January, this year’s Giving Tuesday
goal is even more important than usual. We’re already preparing for a series of showdowns over Trump’s extreme Cabinet
nominations, and for day-one attempts to roll back climate action and gut some
of our country’s most important environmental safeguards — all to deliver for
his Big Oil buddies. Will you stand with us against Trump’s dangerous pro-polluter agenda? A major
donor has just offered to match up to $100,000 to fund LCV’s environmental
campaigns in 2025 — but there’s a catch: We only get those funds if 1,000 grassroots donors ALSO renew their LCV membership before midnight on Giving Tuesday. Even $5 helps us reach our goal. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT- To help us reach this critical goal, we’ll send a free tote bag to LCV members who start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday. LCV is a vital voice, advocate, and information source for the public and
leaders on environmental issues, but we can only do our work with the help of
supporters like you. Right now, LCV has all hands on deck to get ready for
another Trump administration: We’re campaigning for the Biden administration to protect clean air and safeguard public lands, and for the Senate to confirm pro-environment judges, before Trump takes office in January.We’re opposing Trump’s most extreme nominees, like Chris Wright, a climate science denier and Big Oil CEO picked by Trump to run the Energy Department.We’re gearing up to defeat Trump’s radical Project 2025 agenda — which would gut environmental safeguards and destroy important federal agencies, in Congress, in the states, and in the courts. We’ve got our work cut out for us — and we need your helpif we’re going to protect our environment and our democracy in 2025 and beyond.
If everyone reading this email pitched in now, we’d blow through our Giving
Tuesday goal in minutes. Please, renew your LCV membership today. Each and every grassroots donation — even just $5 — brings us closer to our match goal. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/qjPNcm_E0yB_ Remember: if you start an annual gift of $19 or more this Giving Tuesday, you’ll
receive a free tote bag from LCV to show your support for the environment year-round. https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thanks for standing with us, Peter. I hope that we can count on your
support before this Giving Tuesday offer expires. People and the planet are
counting on you! Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11821064&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDM5NzcwOQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDM5NzcwOQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11821064&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDM5NzcwOQS2&spReportId=MjEwMDM5NzcwOQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

subject: Don’t miss Pramila’s Thanksgiving recipes!

subject: You’re Invited: Christmas Open House with me!

The holiday season is upon us, and we’d love to celebrate with you!
Join us for a festive Christmas Open House filled with holiday cheer, great company, and Christmas cookies. It’s a wonderful time to gather with friends, neighbors, and community members to reflect on the year and share some holiday joy.

clean_body: | | | | The holiday season is upon us, and we’d love to celebrate with you! Join us for a festive Christmas Open House filled with holiday cheer, great company, and Christmas cookies. It’s a wonderful time to gather with friends, neighbors, and community members to reflect on the year and share some holiday joy. Please RSVP to Brad at mailto:RepBrad@FinstadforCongress.com so we know you’re coming. We can’t wait to see you there! | mailto:RepBrad@FinstadforCongress.com Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District | | | | | | | PO Box 923, New Ulm, MN 56073

subject: We couldn’t have taken back the majority without you

body:
I’m excited to serve as our next U.S. senator and fight for conservative principles and Ohio values, but I need your help to determine what issues you most want me to fight for. [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5393ce03f81c4f0daac6f8f107e593d3&_e=g8MYZRR0adEsGeV6fnuQwjBhyX2-GDNTSmQ-oS1FqtYrHHYazP4mKtF6bW0jK3QMC-43rL1IIe4Srjnl7RBSBpsbSxd7KTi-_sMpdIUtTsfxKP0cd-N5IxcLSCH9lQnBV-13mah-3Ap-eE3AwyYlfoqTnbQbtMQvgJWt_tz5zlxNLF6OTBN0eWfNyuqBUvgvjHifsGoZ40dd0PSl0nw2m6RK3znaaO2pVvY_Siyo3Kqbfxxp9bx5WXnBwOU7WebOzjLmZSlD2DelN0hfKCAdz-5wgjB5JtUk0eA2-qHW8dvPmbZpR1XcBBOvkjp8tOrKCP22oQPwqBFceL0u2acNIoNbBISHNolhxcPaUT7Vgw2lPcWFoMkyYFYFR3ejofq8jCNaLR7idIA1ZS8daIV5UnfqvteyL6qIxbu0NfjCl9BPhsHCQjvFc1f58J5-7-lbz2nvWmL2Y2HCNtC9CWhYXw%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot - Let me introduce myself.

My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans!

_First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate!_

We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats [**at least two election cycles to defeat.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5393ce03f81c4f0daac6f8f107e593d3&_e=g8MYZRR0adEsGeV6fnuQwjBhyX2-GDNTSmQ-oS1FqtYrHHYazP4mKtF6bW0jK3QMC-43rL1IIe4Srjnl7RBSBpsbSxd7KTi-_sMpdIUtTsfxKP0cd-N5IxcLSCH9lQnBV-13mah-3Ap-eE3AwyYlfoqTnbQbtMQvgJWt_tz5zlxNLF6OTBN0eWfNyuqBUvgvjHifsGoZ40dd0PSl0nw2m6RK3znaaO2pVvY_Siyo3Kqbfxxp9bx5WXnBwOU7WebOzjLmZSlD2DelN0hfKCAdz-5wgjB5JtUk0eA2-qHW8dvPmbZpR1XcBBOvkjp8tOrKYtOx-j27vI1Ot5rDmlWsVFkmMKW78zrmKWiMXl-jowrr7AUN8sFBwJblOD-vXurY9ew1rvuEgb1Wumcb6G8qF83oRLu5WRFPYtEG9CapF6y_ClVMpg1JRPJ4jmErVwO7S77w8GGH4hk0bwK1noE__g%3D%3D)

I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values.

We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration.

So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this [**Top Issues Survey**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5393ce03f81c4f0daac6f8f107e593d3&_e=g8MYZRR0adEsGeV6fnuQwjBhyX2-GDNTSmQ-oS1FqtYrHHYazP4mKtF6bW0jK3QMC-43rL1IIe4Srjnl7RBSBpsbSxd7KTi-_sMpdIUtTsfxKP0cd-N5IxcLSCH9lQnBV-13mah-3Ap-eE3AwyYlfoqTnbQbtMQvgJWt_tz5zlxNLF6OTBN0eWfNyuqBUvgvjHifsGoZ40dd0PSl0nw2m6RK3znaaO2pVvY_Siyo3Kqbfxxp9bx5WXnBwOU7WebOzjLmZSlD2DelN0hfKCAdz-5wgjB5JtUk0eA2-qHW8dvPmbZpR1XcBBOvkjp8tOrKpsQ-DmI4grkfW2vl8Af1cFDyRBu-g4rY0gSxzxhiL2eCbLWc9ipxZEMTDhdJSSNwaAYbWccNHjeKEk7rf_1EVJzHV2G0FZupSZpdpySoAFTAAtiK-sTGuOz1R9xOpQjyK2AG72k4WscUYvRj378h8w%3D%3D) which will only take a few moments to complete.

We hope to receive 700 survey responses to our**Top Issues Survey** before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress.

We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January.

[**Please take a few moments today to complete your Top Issues Survey.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5393ce03f81c4f0daac6f8f107e593d3&_e=g8MYZRR0adEsGeV6fnuQwjBhyX2-GDNTSmQ-oS1FqtYrHHYazP4mKtF6bW0jK3QMC-43rL1IIe4Srjnl7RBSBpsbSxd7KTi-_sMpdIUtTsfxKP0cd-N5IxcLSCH9lQnBV-13mah-3Ap-eE3AwyYlfoqTnbQbtMQvgJWt_tz5zlxNLF6OTBN0eWfNyuqBUvgvjHifsGoZ40dd0PSl0nw2m6RK3znaaO2pVvY_Siyo3Kqbfxxp9bx5WXnBwOU7WebOzjLmZSlD2DelN0hfKCAdz-5wgjB5JtUk0eA2-qHW8dvPmbZpR1XcBBOvkjp8tOrKbMSik_Yh87DwlG8DXI1ppO4HlEqhWG7WkMFW28hDPZRbrEUI21rOdcv5uUi5XKXI2Puro_PvQx_49Cy_7pzISRJNFjfqh-Me9kdZVBiitiSozxOE0F-PdB4lyl089dWUQvJ8wRpiNDOSaTEZS6CPIQ%3D%3D) I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win.

[COMPLETE THE SURVEY ⇒](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5393ce03f81c4f0daac6f8f107e593d3&_e=g8MYZRR0adEsGeV6fnuQwjBhyX2-GDNTSmQ-oS1FqtYrHHYazP4mKtF6bW0jK3QMC-43rL1IIe4Srjnl7RBSBpsbSxd7KTi-_sMpdIUtTsfxKP0cd-N5IxcLSCH9lQnBV-13mah-3Ap-eE3AwyYlfoqTnbQbtMQvgJWt_tz5zlxNLF6OTBN0eWfNyuqBUvgvjHifsGoZ40dd0PSl0nw2m6RK3znaaO2pVvY_Siyo3Kqbfxxp9bx5WXnBwOU7WebOzjLmZSlD2DelN0hfKCAdz-5wgjB5JtUk0eA2-qHW8dvPmbZpR1XcBBOvkjp8tOrKLBo2QaIPf8Y6g-o3kXUubtyXQ-xIw6UIIEBJrbTGIdbYwDYvmBksgBObiIo9SUIfu5Ga6PHBYqqOHVyE4piTxQnua58d-a0Dt6iuwH1oLUyybMeurz_8ww6G3JIEDov7-Kbzp0vU497mSABV-bxh3w%3D%3D)
We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats.

We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans.

We are ready and eager to FIGHT for liberty and the American Dream as we rebuild America following Joe Biden's failed presidency.

[**Please complete your survey before you click away from this email.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5393ce03f81c4f0daac6f8f107e593d3&_e=g8MYZRR0adEsGeV6fnuQwjBhyX2-GDNTSmQ-oS1FqtYrHHYazP4mKtF6bW0jK3QMC-43rL1IIe4Srjnl7RBSBpsbSxd7KTi-_sMpdIUtTsfxKP0cd-N5IxcLSCH9lQnBV-13mah-3Ap-eE3AwyYlfoqTnbQbtMQvgJWt_tz5zlxNLF6OTBN0eWfNyuqBUvgvjHifsGoZ40dd0PSl0nw2m6RK3znaaO2pVvY_Siyo3Kqbfxxp9bx5WXnBwOU7WebOzjLmZSlD2DelN0hfKCAdz-5wgjB5JtUk0eA2-qHW8dvPmbZpR1XcBBOvkjp8tOrKT6Nhsnnu8wav2m8dCw9fb3MMa0VMCjIhFRI0ehMlb8qVw5snILKlOSf3uKfwrygTASU9vqq31LYL1wCTPzi-bhJla9Mpb5sHJLYTJOGhNfCow_5DXdCO8Ear4ZD2ZnuRUUv5rrqc_EUCklLki7ijZA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Bernie Moreno
Senator-elect (R-OH)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC is already looking for someone to challenge Rashida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After AIPAC tried (and failed) to recruit an opponent to run against Rep.
Rashida Tlaib in 2024, Rashida easily won re-election in Dearborn,
Michigan. She even outperformed Democratic presidential candidate Kamala
Harris in her district.

Now, AIPAC and its network of right-wing megadonors are already thinking
about 2026 and working on finding a candidate to challenge Rashida:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241126-1?refcode=em20241126-36185&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36185_1203867_nruOxF&akid=36185%2E1203867%2EnruOxF ]Tweet by David Weigel: Pro-Israel groups couldn’t find a credible
challenger to Rashida Tlaib this cycle. They are already looking ahead to
2026, seeing an opening w Tlaib’s decision not to endorse Harris. Tlaib
did win more votes than Harris in her district.

Rashida has proven she is a strong incumbent who stands by her values and
knows her community better than the Democratic establishment does.

But when our opponents like AIPAC have a war chest of millions of dollars
at their disposal, we need to stay prepared and take all challenges
seriously.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241126-1?refcode=em20241126-36185&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36185_1203867_nruOxF&akid=36185%2E1203867%2EnruOxF ]With our November fundraising deadline rapidly approaching this
Saturday at midnight, will you pitch in $5 or more to help
Justice Democrats protect our incumbents like Rashida while recruiting the
next generation of progressives to join her in Congress?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241126-1?refcode=em20241126-36185&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36185_1203867_nruOxF&akid=36185%2E1203867%2EnruOxF ]Contribute $5

Let’s make sure we’re ready to take on anything and everything AIPAC
throws at Rashida and the Squad.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241126-36185-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36185_1203867_nruOxF&akid=36185%2E1203867%2EnruOxF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36185%2E1203867%2EnruOxF

She even outperformed Democratic presidential candidate Kamala Harris in her district. Now, AIPAC and its network of right-wing megadonors are already thinking about 2026 and working on finding a candidate to challenge Rashida: [ ]Tweet by David Weigel: Pro-Israel groups couldn’t find a credible challenger to Rashida Tlaib this cycle. They are already looking ahead to 2026, seeing an opening w Tlaib’s decision not to endorse Harris. Tlaib did win more votes than Harris in her district. Rashida has proven she is a strong incumbent who stands by her values and knows her community better than the Democratic establishment does. But when our opponents like AIPAC have a war chest of millions of dollars at their disposal, we need to stay prepared and take all challenges seriously. [ ]With our November fundraising deadline rapidly approaching this Saturday at midnight, will you pitch in $5 or more to help Justice Democrats protect our incumbents like Rashida while recruiting the next generation of progressives to join her in Congress? [ ]Contribute $5 Let’s make sure we’re ready to take on anything and everything AIPAC throws at Rashida and the Squad. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=9aabc713a14d46829563f04b3033e80c&_t=04K6iCfN_9547eAsoJYBNLBIzh3GEZbW-_7fGCZ0DfbR_7ANSJIi65op2Ty9Wck9jaoi6MSdo3kgr-R7ORZWOdcu4gQ0JthOrLUE2p1NY9u5JZ9mYnb3fZ0HEFESRqRR)_
---
---
| | | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=9aabc713a14d46829563f04b3033e80c&_e=vQVrWjt-UoWTPzjZh7hCiy2mgIfCGL2Ad-NdBigFbDBsCO-GdBamfnjsINyhvby9yX4zfwmHPg8JSuaFgrJrAoZ9HRILaz4XAOX6RAMcwQ4WrwN4zxuFRNaHFFW5SKDzaFUD1FVZ4jWg5joIfMTwyT4AZvDDy4l7-6v1u-yBXxmIvUH0_1OjPaCIOPEsyyusJHvrjqw8lNEX3U42v9IoPWwecxdDbU3A-4EATfSxnh2ACuwNbo5MtVzIfO-IykPmVRciulPjdL7oiy7z4jYzwR_QImeowPw57SeW3XUnDwUghnp3ZQTTbYveYNGCK0v2zrmbRwxfE1nfUnddL2oA8XE4uWDzf5oHgbbr9Zjg3Xe84IClfOjkTlcTJl4sdX3S2ypwjT4L9LCsUnSGcTvxm1XP24rRYq1v-57H4f65P80%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life.

Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal.

Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=9aabc713a14d46829563f04b3033e80c&_e=vQVrWjt-UoWTPzjZh7hCiy2mgIfCGL2Ad-NdBigFbDBsCO-GdBamfnjsINyhvby9yX4zfwmHPg8JSuaFgrJrAoZ9HRILaz4XAOX6RAMcwQ4WrwN4zxuFRNaHFFW5SKDzaFUD1FVZ4jWg5joIfMTwyT4AZvDDy4l7-6v1u-yBXxmIvUH0_1OjPaCIOPEsyyusJHvrjqw8lNEX3U42v9IoPWwecxdDbU3A-4EATfSxnh2ACuwNbo5MtVzIfO-IykPmces7bQeb6DlbB5We9o6fHymJbACgH5FYwX5Eqq9GM9mY_CTufmSikiC-6XohPvuKeZnhwPFFao5YNdOJZ-_bTGzN4l2PXlldrKBeDNKrq8VCXYMLoJqzBGg7XXeCfU81cKoIvWZ3kBYnqEcSbfF89hH4ClmseiESbGIpk5Vk_8Q%3D) **
As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.**

Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him.

I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief.

I believe that you believe that too.

I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment.

The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=9aabc713a14d46829563f04b3033e80c&_e=vQVrWjt-UoWTPzjZh7hCiy2mgIfCGL2Ad-NdBigFbDBsCO-GdBamfnjsINyhvby9yX4zfwmHPg8JSuaFgrJrAoZ9HRILaz4XAOX6RAMcwQ4WrwN4zxuFRNaHFFW5SKDzaFUD1FVZ4jWg5joIfMTwyT4AZvDDy4l7-6v1u-yBXxmIvUH0_1OjPaCIOPEsyyusJHvrjqw8lNEX3U42v9IoPWwecxdDbU3A-4EATfSxnh2ACuwNbo5MtVzIfO-IykPmYVkio_ODIhoyUFy6Q6B2lNVwzrgFx89mpHfKE3p5G_Z_VoibZZMmDsrn4ZwA4Q4EeUmbOAZbpeCRlfVnPqEW9cUr7Js6Ni1Evd3_NTm8UI8WiXCaqDrV45LdboKNlnlgyVhgiI3LqCA3KnS3PoUO46bdpdGG-qW-Ldjv0NfmwVs%3D)

I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn?

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=9aabc713a14d46829563f04b3033e80c&_e=vQVrWjt-UoWTPzjZh7hCiy2mgIfCGL2Ad-NdBigFbDBsCO-GdBamfnjsINyhvby9yX4zfwmHPg8JSuaFgrJrAoZ9HRILaz4XAOX6RAMcwQ4WrwN4zxuFRNaHFFW5SKDzaFUD1FVZ4jWg5joIfMTwyT4AZvDDy4l7-6v1u-yBXxmIvUH0_1OjPaCIOPEsyyusJHvrjqw8lNEX3U42v9IoPWwecxdDbU3A-4EATfSxnh2ACuwNbo5MtVzIfO-IykPmSos9nKVkJjPUo_gOQBtIVDhU6y4VRuIAl6GhWiR2HZoYDaAkHUpU1MKHp-jszF6oEMs8pwDKnGdARWecKxrjvLtYLLFIv5kl7UoaFWtj8pfkXbRbe234njwtpAqyDXJAk1Q7RsoZafwI02D3fTo9iKZorHr34SDwiDiZCGaC2hc%3D)

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

Over 300 tweets in less than a week — and not one of them fighting for you. Nancy Mace’s hateful, transphobic crusade against incoming Representative Sarah McBride is just her latest attempt to distract from her disastrous record.

If you have been with us for awhile, you know we will ALWAYS hold Nancy Mace accountable. And we will ALWAYS stand up for ALL kids. Just this week in the wake of Nancy’s attacks, Annie raised nearly $10,000 for a South Carolina based LGBTQ+ non-profit organization that works every day to protect LGBTQ+ South Carolinians.

Meanwhile, Nancy’s so-called advocacy for women’s safety? Nothing but disingenuous posturing. How can she claim to protect women while supporting Donald Trump — an adjudicated rapist who is infamous for walking into women's dressing rooms? It’s hypocrisy, plain and simple.

We’re done with the distractions. Done with the hate campaigns. Done with the inaction.

**[Stand with Sarah McBride and demand better. name: JanePAC
subject: 5️⃣ reasons why your vote makes a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We hope these razor-thin victories inspire you today.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97719221/514349167/1328794144?refcode=ea.b6a47e29-41ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.b6a47e29-41ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2YTQ3ZTI5LTQxYWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MA4VYY0pf5MFqQJodTnzyzjr45dzoTnxsF-T4g6Awq4=&emci=26c74a23-41ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=b6a47e29-41ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)
---
Some people might tell you your vote doesn’t matter at all, or it only matters if you live in a “swing state.” Here’s why they’re wrong. In this year’s elections, some of the most consequential victories for climate action were decided by the thinnest of margins. We want to highlight five of our endorsed champions who proved that every single vote matters — and we hope you’ll feel as inspired as we do. 1️⃣ **In Nebraska, Ashlei Spivey made history. She secured her Senate seat in District 13 by only 150 votes, and will become the first Black woman to serve in the legislature since 2016.** 2️⃣ **In California, Marcus Bush’s victory was razor-thin. By just 254 votes, he won his seat on the National City Council in District 4.** 3️⃣ **In New Mexico, Carrie Hamblen’s re-election in Senate District 38 came down to just 298 votes.** 4️⃣ **Just 647 votes decided Charlotte Little’s re-election in New Mexico’s House District 68.** 5️⃣ **In Michigan, Reggie Miller won re-election in House District 31 with 698 votes.** As a bonus, we’d be remiss not to mention **Anthony Broadman, who won his Oregon State Senate seat in District 27.** While his race wasn’t as close as the others mentioned here, his victory gives the Oregon Senate a Democratic supermajority — effectively putting a stop to Republican walkouts that have long stymied climate legislation. It’s a game-changer for Oregon and a reminder of what’s possible when we organize and elect climate champions. So, the next time someone tells you voting doesn’t matter, tell them about Ashlei, Marcus, Carrie, Charlotte, Reggie — and Anthony, too. Because if this election taught us anything, it’s that opting out doesn’t cut it when our planet is on the line. Thank you for showing up, for believing in change, and for being part of this movement. Together, we’re unstoppable. | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97719222/514349168/2105508926?refcode=ea.b6a47e29-41ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.b6a47e29-41ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2YTQ3ZTI5LTQxYWMtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MA4VYY0pf5MFqQJodTnzyzjr45dzoTnxsF-T4g6Awq4=)

clean_body: We hope these razor-thin victories inspire you today. | Some people might tell you your vote doesn’t matter at all, or it only matters if you live in a “swing state.” Here’s why they’re wrong. In this year’s elections, some of the most consequential victories for climate action were decided by the thinnest of margins. We want to highlight five of our endorsed champions who proved that every single vote matters — and we hope you’ll feel as inspired as we do. 1️⃣ In Nebraska, Ashlei Spivey made history. She secured her Senate seat in District 13 by only 150 votes, and will become the first Black woman to serve in the legislature since 2016. 2️⃣ In California, Marcus Bush’s victory was razor-thin. By just 254 votes, he won his seat on the National City Council in District 4. 3️⃣ In New Mexico, Carrie Hamblen’s re-election in Senate District 38 came down to just 298 votes. 4️⃣ Just 647 votes decided Charlotte Little’s re-election in New Mexico’s House District 68. 5️⃣ In Michigan, Reggie Miller won re-election in House District 31 with 698 votes. As a bonus, we’d be remiss not to mention Anthony Broadman, who won his Oregon State Senate seat in District 27. While his race wasn’t as close as the others mentioned here, his victory gives the Oregon Senate a Democratic supermajority — effectively putting a stop to Republican walkouts that have long stymied climate legislation. It’s a game-changer for Oregon and a reminder of what’s possible when we organize and elect climate champions. So, the next time someone tells you voting doesn’t matter, tell them about Ashlei, Marcus, Carrie, Charlotte, Reggie — and Anthony, too. Because if this election taught us anything, it’s that opting out doesn’t cut it when our planet is on the line. Thank you for showing up, for believing in change, and for being part of this movement. Together, we’re unstoppable. | = With gratitude, The team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| | Peter,

More and more, many Americans feel that aspects of our democracy just don’t work for them. Whether it’s feeling unrepresented or losing trust in government, these are real concerns that need to be addressed.

That’s exactly what Marie is doing. Just last week, she introduced legislation to establish a bipartisan committee tasked with examining our current electoral systems and recommending solutions to tackle polarization and strengthen our democracy.

**But she needs to know if you’re with her in this fight, Peter. Take our one-question survey here:**

clean_body: | | Peter, More and more, many Americans feel that aspects of our democracy just don’t work for them. Whether it’s feeling unrepresented or losing trust in government, these are real concerns that need to be addressed. That’s exactly what Marie is doing. Just last week, she introduced legislation to establish a bipartisan committee tasked with examining our current electoral systems and recommending solutions to tackle polarization and strengthen our democracy. But she needs to know if you’re with her in this fight, Peter. Take our one-question survey here: | | ** | In an increasingly divided political environment, we need leaders who are focused on bringing people together. Marie knows that we have a lot more in common than what separates us, and our government should reflect that. She’s continuing to deliver on her campaign promise to bring all of our voices to the table. That’s why your input now is so valuable. Weigh in here: | | – Team MGP | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. clean_body: Background on report of Lt. Byrd's abysmal record [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Cop who fatally shot J6 protestor has lengthy disciplinary record that includes gun incidents [] Source: Just the News [] The Capitol Police officer who fatally shot Ashli Babbitt during the Jan. 6 riots and then was promoted has a lengthy internal affairs and disciplinary record that includes firearm-related incidents, a sweeping congressional investigation has found. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] April 05, 2024 Judicial Watch Asks Court to Deny Justice Department Request to Transfer Babbitt Wrongful Death Lawsuit from California to Washington, DC [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch argues it would prejudice the case and be unjust for Ashli’s family if it were transferred to the hostile forum of District of Columbia. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] September 23, 2024 Judge Sets 2026 Trial Date in Ashli Babbitt $30 Million Wrongful Death Lawsuit [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judge Ana C. Reyes scheduled a trial date of July 20, 2026, for the $30 million wrongful death suit filed on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, who was shot and killed in the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021, by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] April 10, 2024 FBI Records Reveal Posthumous Criminal Investigation of Ashli Babbitt [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicail Watch received 62 pages of records from the Department of Justice showing that the FBI opened a criminal investigation of Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt after her killing and listed four “potential violations of federal law,” including felony rioting and civil disorder. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Project 2025 is already underway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:

#
---
Peter, During Donald Trump’s re-election bid, many of us warned the American people about Republicans’ Project 2025 and the grave threat it poses to our democracy. Not surprisingly, those warnings are already proving true. **The implementation of Project 2025 is underway.** As Donald Trump chooses who will serve in his administration, he is putting MAGA sycophants in positions of power so they will let him abuse power without guardrails. Trump has selected _Fox News_ host and MAGA loyalist Pete Hegseth to lead the massive Department of Defense, Tulsi Gabbard — who has expressed concerning sympathy for Vladimir Putin and Bashar al-Assad — as his director of national intelligence, and vaccine-denying conspiracy theorist Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as the Secretary of Health and Human Services. Not to mention Trump announced the appointment of Tim Homan — who oversaw Trump’s horrific family separation policy at the border and contributed to the planning of Project 2025 — as his new “Border Czar.” These picks are deeply disturbing, Peter, but this is precisely what Democrats warned would be a part of the Project 2025 agenda: **Donald Trump is gutting our checks and balances by putting unqualified political loyalists in critical government roles to help him execute his plans to use the federal government as his personal fiefdom.** Donald Trump is making it abundantly clear with these picks that he does not respect the Constitution or the rule of law, and that he will dismantle our democracy if he is allowed to. **The Senate must do its job properly and defend our checks and balances by carefully vetting Trump’s nominees to ensure they are loyal to the Constitution, not to Donald Trump.** And the Senate must evaluate each nominee on their own merits, not as some negotiated package. **[I know there has been a lot of bad news following the election, but I want to remind you that this is not the time to give up. body:

---
Peter, there was a big winner in Wisconsin this year: _Fair maps._
Our Democracy Defenders helped flip 14 seats from red to blue across both the state assembly and state senate — smashing the GOP’s supermajority that had been in place for most of the last 13 years. These victories also put Democrats on track to take back majorities in both chambers in 2026.
**While we celebrate these incredible gains, we must also recognize that years of organizing, activism, holding Republicans accountable, and A.G. Holder’s long view made this all possible.**
To understand how big these victories were, we need to go all the way back to 2011. Upon taking office, newly elected Governor Scott Walker wasted no time focusing on manipulating the Badger State’s legislative maps.
He and his extreme allies in the state legislature quickly got to work, changing the rules of the state supreme court to undermine the state’s longstanding chief justice, gutting the state’s nonpartisan elections board, and enacting a horrifying gerrymander, which guaranteed them an unearned lock on power for a decade.
**When the NDRC was founded in 2017, we began to build an infrastructure for activism and organizing which put a spotlight on just how badly Republicans were bending the rules.**
In 2018, Governor Tony Evers won and promised to be a fair maps champion. But the GOP-controlled legislature immediately stripped away many of his powers.
**_In that critical moment, we didn’t back down._ We took our organizing to another level.**
Since then, NDRC Chair Eric Holder has made numerous trips to mobilize voters, raised millions of dollars, and brought increased national attention to critical state-level races in Wisconsin.
All that work culminated last year in the election of Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body. Republicans knew their days of running rampant with maps were over. The legislature passed Governor Evers’ fair maps ahead of this year’s elections.
This cycle, the NDRC endorsed 90 Wisconsin candidates as a part of our Democracy Defenders program. Committed Democrats like you understood the importance of these state-level races that too often go overlooked — and you put in the work.
**That’s how we won: Laying the groundwork for fair representation by securing fair maps. And that’s how we’ll continue to win in states across the country:_Together._**
Thank you,
Team NDRC

Our team took a look at our numbers over the 2024 election cycle, and we have to say, this team really stepped up. Here’s a peek at what we accomplished this cycle:
* Thanks to this team, we were able to raise over $4 million to protect this critical frontline seat. The best part? **Our average online grassroots contribution was just $27.89.**
* We knocked on thousands of doors and contacted thousands of voters by phone, and improved our margin by over 14,000. That means that over 14,000 _more_ folks in IL-13 voted to send Nikki back to Washington to keep fighting for this district.

subject: We’re still waiting for your signature
body:
Sign our card now.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-E~wASk/Y0VxSmNJV0JlSU9BQTN4NkVUOGxKaVdzd3NvcVVFY09aT0hPWXNkSk5pdmFZeXQzNlI4cWZvRENISHliR3g1YzkramN2R24vRm1uUG83ZEZ1bnU1M0g3QU15TFhTOE5uT3Y1MkFONDB0TnM9S0/Tjk4VGZrSWpqZXlJWE0wa1VkRzFEL0pWZFBQU0VBVE5EK21IdHlSUTFrWGljcTRUYVJuZnBFT0NzcTFaVGJqaDV6V3M2VEtucWFyQXJYbGlxdUZUTzBtcERVanJHZmx0S0)
---
This Thursday, approximately 200,000 people in our country's military will spend Thanksgiving far from home. That's why, we're asking YOU to sign a card thanking them for all they do.
**Please don 't let our heroes feel forgotten on this important day. [Sign the USO's Thanksgiving card now to thank our heroes for their service and sacrifice.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[](https://links.e.uso.)
---
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
[**Before time runs out, will you thank
our heroes this Thanksgiving?**](https://links.e.uso.)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/wdbzhr2Dp_CZ/Y0VxSmNJV0JlSU9BQTN4NkVUOGxKaVdzd3NvcVVFY09aT0hPWXNkSk5pdmFZeXQzNlI4cWZvRENISHliR3g1YzkramN2R24vRm1uUG83ZEZ1bnU1M0g3QU15TFhTOE5uT3Y1MkFONDB0TnM9S0/Tjk4VGZrSWpqZXlJWE0wa1VkRzFEL0pWZFBQU0VBVE5EK21IdHlSUTFrWGljcTRUYVJuZnBFT0NzcTFaVGJqaDV6V3M2VEtucWFyQXJYbGlxdUZUTzBtcERVanJHZmx0S0)
---
We hope you're preparing to spend Thanksgiving enjoying family traditions and cherished moments with loved ones around the dinner table. But we also hope you'll take a moment to remember that hundreds of thousands of service members will be spending the holiday deployed -- far from their families and the comfort and joys of home.
That's why the USO works hard to host special Thanksgiving events all over the world to support our heroes when they need it most. After an event at USO Kaiserslautern, one Sgt. shared, "This activity shows us how much this community cares for us. We are thankful for this and we will enjoy this special Thanksgiving at our new home."
During this especially difficult time of year, it means so much for our heroes in uniform to hear how much we value and appreciate the sacrifices they are making to serve our country. It's up to _all_ of us to make sure they don't feel forgotten this Thanksgiving.
**But we 're falling short of the 100,000 signatures we need on our Thanksgiving card for service members -- and your name is still missing!**
[**We know you 're someone who cares about supporting those who serve, so please help us show our gratitude at this critical moment. Sign our Thanksgiving card now to let service members stationed all over the world know how thankful you are for all they do.**](https://links.e.uso.)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/wdbzhr2Dp_CZ/Y0VxSmNJV0JlSU9BQTN4NkVUOGxKaVdzd3NvcVVFY09aT0hPWXNkSk5pdmFZeXQzNlI4cWZvRENISHliR3g1YzkramN2R24vRm1uUG83ZEZ1bnU1M0g3QU15TFhTOE5uT3Y1MkFONDB0TnM9S0/Tjk4VGZrSWpqZXlJWE0wa1VkRzFEL0pWZFBQU0VBVE5EK21IdHlSUTFrWGljcTRUYVJuZnBFT0NzcTFaVGJqaDV6V3M2VEtucWFyQXJYbGlxdUZUTzBtcERVanJHZmx0S0)
---
Thank you for all you do to support our heroes this holiday season.
--The USO

name: Defeat Boebert PAC
subject: this little bird has been personally victimized by Lauren Boebert.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=1d5bb637aad34d9ca9274bbaa49cb2f1&_e=BQ4y5N26ObpPIpS0s5jUf6zVTzl5nFWoLp9CMzGR6thW4YPH7ASc4B-6ZrF07j8cjCelZGIJH5fJZRlkit-Paz0tCixdOjx5_BzkAWNz50Z_HNlza_x6mcX1OL52NeRmLWJ5T8BFG8wRb5elUPCOeaFLRqTuzYmonGP1GpRXo-Zj_kD8g9zXkND6sD2E6LRmt2TylDW0cR4aVfmc1ziZaz5zYsUHtHPn10EfcbJza80f1K_w1k1cqVZNXuTc1Khl1XC6lIWpQV--3ZB7dOxWpVRjRGiOYH_dBTnPnR9zpyYyelA_DD3qJu4GspDS93J3nzsAqXy0JN8dS88zBMYhp1DDbm8OAtc5gBYXif6BIKoWCTCshSFwvo-dLgDjfmT3w_peO7q07myRKIZ5Y6658SwyCtPTdFjmFoK7kj8WpfjSsGvRJc46y0LUXHpmOeCL) Peter, we know it looks like a turkey, but it’s actually a Gunnison sage-grouse—a native (and yes, kind of goofy-looking) bird here in Colorado. **Believe it or not, this little bird has been personally attacked by Lauren Boebert.** Coloradans are steadfast in standing up for our precious public lands and wildlife, but the 4th Districts new representative, Lauren Boebert, called the bird “ugly” and derided a plan to conserve lands critical to its survival. **Here’s the kicker: the conservation plan Boebert’s complaining about was actually approved in 2020 under Donald Trump’s administration—not Biden or Harris, as she claims.** But facts rarely get in the way of Boebert’s feelings. She’s railing against efforts to protect wildlife, attacking conservation efforts, and siding with her oil and gas donors while ignoring the needs of her constituents. | | **Turning Point Action fined following CREW complaint**
_— Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington, Nov 1, 2024_
* * *
_In a landmark win in the fight against dark money, the Federal Election Commission fined Charlie Kirk’s Turning Point Action $18,000 for failing to disclose its donors following a 2021 complaint filed by Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington. The FEC found that Turning Point Action failed to disclose $33,795 in reportable contributions from donors who gave more than $200”_
---
We’ve got to talk about Turning Point, team.
If you’ve never heard of them, they’re a dark money organization that supports MAGA Republicans with an extreme conservative agenda and were instrumental this past election cycle in Donald Trump’s victory.
Turning Point and their affiliated groups have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars cycle after cycle to win seats for the MAGA movement. The Federal Elections Commission fined the organization this year for failing to disclose its donors.
**[Dark money spending like this is what our team is up against every single election cycle, but with a strong base of grassroots support, we can fight back against this extreme spending.
