If you’ve never heard of them, they’re a dark money organization that supports MAGA Republicans with an extreme conservative agenda and were instrumental this past election cycle in Donald Trump’s victory. Turning Point and their affiliated groups have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars cycle after cycle to win seats for the MAGA movement. The Federal Elections Commission fined the organization this year for failing to disclose its donors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = — Arizona Democratic Party Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. We've put up a massive effort to ensure every voter has the opportunity to make their voice heard and be fairly represented — and this work is only possible because of activists like you. Before we reach the end of the month, make a gift to support the fights to come.
Thank you,
Team Fair Fight
* * *
Under a Trump administration, these threats to our voting rights could become realities:
* Weakening enforcement of laws that protect the freedom to vote;
* Criminalizing parts of the voting process;
* Making it even easier for election disinformation to spread.

Project 2025 is the playbook for the next Trump administration, and it could upend our government and weaken our freedoms — including our say in our reproductive rights, the right to an education, and more.
We need to be prepared for legislation that seeks to threaten the freedom to vote at the state and federal level, and for the spreading of disinformation in our elections.
[**That’s where your support comes in. Your contribution can help us fight back against the voter suppression tactics to come. Can you make a gift today, before we reach the end of the month?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97721704/514357548/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241126_f_EOM1Liftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzYxZGY4MS00YmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8fpqbkO4mIvPTbOaWTX7p_iyTkDRvh1j1z47ckJPxA=)

Throughout this election season, we saw increased attempts at voter intimidation, from mass purges to threats of violence on Election Day. We cannot allow this to spread and become normalized.
We’ve faced Trump and his MAGA-loyalists before, and we refuse to back down from the challenges ahead. That means we need the support of this team with us at every step along the way.
[**Help us fight right-wing efforts to challenge our freedoms and keep us from using our voices — make a donation today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97721706/514357550/-1598577384?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241126_f_EOM1Liftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzYxZGY4MS00YmFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8fpqbkO4mIvPTbOaWTX7p_iyTkDRvh1j1z47ckJPxA=)

clean_body: Free and fair elections can’t wait | | | = Project 2025 is looming, and it calls for removing protections that ensure fair and free elections. Fair Fight needs to be ready for the attacks the Trump administration plans to bring. | = We've put up a massive effort to ensure every voter has the opportunity to make their voice heard and be fairly represented — and this work is only possible because of activists like you. Before we reach the end of the month, make a gift to support the fights to come. Thank you, Team Fair Fight Under a Trump administration, these threats to our voting rights could become realities: Weakening enforcement of laws that protect the freedom to vote; Criminalizing parts of the voting process; Making it even easier for election disinformation to spread. Project 2025 is the playbook for the next Trump administration, and it could upend our government and weaken our freedoms — including our say in our reproductive rights, the right to an education, and more. We need to be prepared for legislation that seeks to threaten the freedom to vote at the state and federal level, and for the spreading of disinformation in our elections. = = Throughout this election season, we saw increased attempts at voter intimidation, from mass purges to threats of violence on Election Day. We cannot allow this to spread and become normalized. We’ve faced Trump and his MAGA-loyalists before, and we refuse to back down from the challenges ahead. That means we need the support of this team with us at every step along the way. = Thank you for being with us. Fair Fight = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: Sarah McBride
subject: I joined Face the Nation on Sunday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Watch my full interview here.
#
On Sunday, I joined CBS Face the Nation.
I talked about what inspired me to run for office and what I’m going to fight for in Congress (hint: lowering housing, health care, and childcare costs facing families).
I also discussed how I’m staying focused on the issues keeping people up at night and how I won’t get distracted by the noise coming from House Republicans.

name: Team Truth to Power
subject: Say congratulations to Derek, Dave, and Josh!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39327%2E3422442%2E3m-0Ya)
Exciting news, Derek!
We’re thrilled to share that Derek Tran (CA-45), Dave Min (CA-47), and Josh Harder (CA-09) have all won their races this year! 🎉
Here at Truth to Power, we’ve known from the beginning that California would be one of the nation’s top House battlegrounds. That’s why our first endorsements this cycle were three top-tier House candidates in California. With your help, we supported these challengers, as well as Josh Harder, California’s most at-risk incumbent—**and a majority of our endorsed candidates won!**
That means that we were able to chip away at the GOP’s already narrow majority, and we’ve better positioned ourselves to flip the House next cycle.
**[Derek, to celebrate, we want to send a congratulatory message filled with encouragement from all of us here on Team Truth to Power. Will you take a moment to join us sending a victory message Derek, Dave, and Josh?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241226/?refcode=em20241126-39327&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&akid=39327%2E3422442%2E3m-0Ya)**
[Sign the card ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241226/?refcode=em20241126-39327&akid=39327%2E3422442%2E3m-0Ya)
These victories were made possible because of grassroots supporters like you showing up for the future we deserve. Thank you for fighting with us.
Together,
Team Truth To Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241126-39327&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39327_3422442_3m-0Ya&akid=39327%2E3422442%2E3m-0Ya)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39327%2E3422442%2E3m-0Ya).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: The Squad
subject: Peter, we need your help to turn November around
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241126-1133-foote&t=1001&akid=1133%2E342411%2E7bVJ1c ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter, we want to
be transparent with you.

Our fundraising has hit a critical slowdown this November — right after an
election where dark money groups spent millions to amplify far-right
leaders and silence progressive movements like our Squad.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241126-movement.IU-nmH&refcode=em20241126-1133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1133%2E342411%2E7bVJ1c ]This is a make-or-break moment and we need to ramp up our energy NOW
before the holidays begin. Can you help protect our Squad with a donation
of $3 or more today so that we can reach our $27,000 November fundraising
goal?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241126-movement.IU-nmH&refcode=em20241126-1133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1133%2E342411%2E7bVJ1c ]Donate ››

Our mission is more urgent than ever: we’re fighting to amplify our
Squad’s progressive values, vision, and advocacy.

Alexandria, Ilhan, Rashida, and Ayanna all have dedicated their time in
Congress to ensuring our voices are heard and valued as they advocate for
legislation that meets the urgency and needs of our communities.

Our Squad is only as strong as the grassroots support with them. What we
accomplish in these next four years depends on people like you who are
willing to act, show up, and keep pushing alongside us.

November's slowdown is a call to action. We need to regenerate our Squad’s
energy and we need your help to finish the month strong. And we can do
that by reaching our $27,000 November fundraising goal.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241126-movement.IU-nmH&refcode=em20241126-1133&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1133%2E342411%2E7bVJ1c ]Chip in today to help boost our fundraising and ensure our Squad can
focus 100% of their energy on fighting back against the Trump admin and
protecting our communities.

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1133%2E342411%2E7bVJ1c

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Jennifer Jenkins
subject: Tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Educated
body:
| | | [](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=823e0df31da341c1a2864c01c67ebf89&_e=h7sCT-gdTjbQ_S8COoZE3jIN84KWJ2gR57mWQaqXdWvz7510T5TgiDpk6WzKPqNmB35YxWoJLJ1bhtSWWDI-ngggnP-zw962OURYrV45wVF2nmN-wiei9ca4CU6cbaoTrFV0sGN3GY1_31Rj7iBw0FExgAhfMtzWjpZUOPTuEaCpTL9MKdR0CiXLKeXNDs6lzY7p1MiC1hLog3yyyETSaRuSG8UeCad2F8jxcNTLPSbjIy01AoevtavD7XSjrenAHPenSDZ5IFu7hbRJtoiAbYa9ugJD0MrVpzBko0MC9AEfd9-D5mn2ewhLTBb8YPk86DQqcCXYXRVez19zretzLzdxIKAibhZktiJDu9rb3jxL5Q-h9OGkBlYtAL5SWzcLZRZ2abXl2l9zpm3OIYAe1lL0BVLOMyL33scekcxHmn85ozdw5TqHXGKNQVKldGbg) Hi there, Peter. I have some difficult news. Since Donald Trump’s victory earlier this month, progressive group’s fundraising has completely fallen off a cliff. Just look at our Act Blue: [](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=823e0df31da341c1a2864c01c67ebf89&_e=h7sCT-gdTjbQ_S8COoZE3jIN84KWJ2gR57mWQaqXdWvz7510T5TgiDpk6WzKPqNmB35YxWoJLJ1bhtSWWDI-ngggnP-zw962OURYrV45wVF2nmN-wiei9ca4CU6cbaoTrFV0sGN3GY1_31Rj7iBw0FExgAhfMtzWjpZUOPTuEaCpTL9MKdR0CiXLKeXNDs6lzY7p1MiC1hLog3yyyETSaRuSG8UeCad2F8jxcNTLPSbjIy01AoevtavD7XSjrenAHPenSDZ5IFu7hbRJtoiAbVV85X4R_wAdABVtGXjZpGUHv-knBYFkcLH_K-RnyPiO9XVfiBwjoC2xopxFbpwDbjsHLzdv832J5IYhsn1FTPBlzyZ1NM6eubXq33IW2sIBPKVv6fOZP_NBkzkAHl5sihawziQUnn9CfDS11NP0ShiMuZpmkSKJ3yBhjJquN_5Y) We know reckoning with Trump’s victory has been tough. Still, if we’ve learned anything from his cabinet picks, we need to fight him and his cronies at every turn—especially now that Linda McMahon of the WWE empire has been tapped to lead the Department of Education. I know getting back into the fight can be a hard ask, especially this time of year. But if we’re going to compete with Moms for Liberty across the country in the coming years, we’re going to need to start right now. **[So I set a goal for us to raise another $10,000 by the end of this month and I’m counting on you to help us get there. Still, if we’ve learned anything from his cabinet picks, we need to fight him and his cronies at every turn—especially now that Linda McMahon of the WWE empire has been tapped to lead the Department of Education. I know getting back into the fight can be a hard ask, especially this time of year. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: 🚀 TO ALL MARK KELLY SUPPORTERS: Please, don’t click away 🧑‍🚀
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When Mark Kelly thinks about the folks who matter most to this campaign, it’s not just the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#

Friends —
When Mark Kelly thinks about the folks who matter most to this campaign, it’s not just the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
People like you.
---

Your support has been critical in turning the tide in Arizona. Before 2018, it had been 30 years since Arizona sent a Democrat to the U.S. Senate.
Your support, your voice, your energy helped us get Mark elected twice, and it helped defeat Kari Lake this year. Now Senator-elect Ruben Gallego is getting ready for his first term.

---

You made that possible. But there’s something else we thought you should know. Out of all of Mark Kelly’s supporters, less than 25% of them have made a donation.
Today, we’re asking you to join that important group.
---

Mark’s average donation online is around $30. Most people chip in much less. But as we prepare for the challenges ahead of us, all that matters is that you’re chipping in to help Mark defend our progress and fight the worst that might come our way.
We’ll put it straight to work. You have our word.
---

[**If that sounds good and you’re ready to make your first donation, please: We’re humbly asking you to chip in $3 before midnight tonight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov24.pA2hgt&refcode=em241126-1-120&t=1&akid=5926%2E6688874%2EWtbfZz)

Peter, this year's class of new Democratic Congressional lawmakers recently elected Yassamin to be their class president! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722004/514358666/2145040083?refcode=241126_team_class_pres_img&ms=241126_team_class_pres&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWVjYTFkOS00ZWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8WrmhmVSF_Ct1IQu0sVkt9CtiqzpD8f-5cs04Wh7W8Y=) That means Yass will serve as a voice for the newly elected Democratic members, and represent their concerns and priorities in discussions with Democratic party leadership. It's also a signal that Democrats are listening to voters who are ready for a new generation of leadership in Congress. It's so important that we have Yassamin's voice in Congressional leadership! Peter, Yassamin made history this November as the youngest woman in Congress and as the first Iranian-American Democrat, and she'll continue to make history as the Freshman Democrats Class President. We're so grateful to have you in this work with us. **[Support Yassamin's work →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97722005/514358667/2145040083?refcode=241126_team_class_pres&ms=241126_team_class_pres&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWVjYTFkOS00ZWFjLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8WrmhmVSF_Ct1IQu0sVkt9CtiqzpD8f-5cs04Wh7W8Y=)** Thank you, Peter. — Team Yassamin

She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help.

clean_body: Peter, Yassamin's colleagues just elected her as Freshman Class President of the new cohort of Democratic Congressional leaders. Here's what that means: | | = Peter, this year's class of new Democratic Congressional lawmakers recently elected Yassamin to be their class president! = That means Yass will serve as a voice for the newly elected Democratic members, and represent their concerns and priorities in discussions with Democratic party leadership. It's also a signal that Democrats are listening to voters who are ready for a new generation of leadership in Congress. It's so important that we have Yassamin's voice in Congressional leadership! Peter, Yassamin made history this November as the youngest woman in Congress and as the first Iranian-American Democrat, and she'll continue to make history as the Freshman Democrats Class President. We're so grateful to have you in this work with us. = Thank you, Peter. — Team Yassamin | Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03, and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help. Will you support her campaign? = = PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States

| | Fellow Patriot, _
It has been a huge week for us at America First Legal. _ **
I want to share news of _an enormous legal victory_ we won in court: **Our team at America First Legal, working with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and a coalition of other courageous state Attorneys General **won a lawsuit to stop the Biden-Harris Administration 's DHS from granting administrative amnesty and a fast track pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens** in the United States.
---
[DONATE HERE](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=546cb6734a6540388b505b9b1a303453&_e=QLxflPrcz9_leMkk-maoc3R34d2mBDpE3ieCl_x55ODMlweCZlyQ9NFTQifQjGZo6rlbnFYm0gEtrPD4fu2aE8Vh5EHa_7hvPUDQIKRUfQ8hwyWD6O8PbrMbZcEisuLX0NoIKESXnmRFMhIO_BeImAtSRTbS-8jISnsYJAEJvIW6o-8LdR0ivyYcEEKVI0TkkfqpGJ_ogiXyqJvCuC2n00L69eECrSnrz6W7hoYqJJPLQSok8OVze1phFMPHKvKQbdlaxtwAn2IlchEzxHArqmU8P1563569gQZTOHx00YnDrh_UylOB406iJdovdM_VTqLf1ng3Tc1Zfei6r2w5sHjYkzJdbeq7yXXhgfmJCRqsvmin3SAuJVUo7ShMmhBVgnjL8jQ-MHH9waB0FpjZBUZuw_6KusDVQCE1idDL020vM2kZkm957ylWyjWq5DGc46WpxDHDBV_-gCWx2diUjeRIZUkawviDL6slmtCPcTlD2DkJH4dKxsYDUNE3FBSe)
As you know, the Biden-Harris Administration has dedicated itself to the decimation of our immigration system and the erasure of our borders.
America First Legal was built to fight the Deep State and win. That's why your support of America First Legal is so important- we do the heavy lifting in the courtroom that stops the far-left's malicious attempts to transform and destroy America cold. _**[
Please support our work so we can continue to Save America >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=546cb6734a6540388b505b9b1a303453&_e=QLxflPrcz9_leMkk-maoc3R34d2mBDpE3ieCl_x55ODMlweCZlyQ9NFTQifQjGZo6rlbnFYm0gEtrPD4fu2aE8Vh5EHa_7hvPUDQIKRUfQ8hwyWD6O8PbrMbZcEisuLX0NoIKESXnmRFMhIO_BeImAtSRTbS-8jISnsYJAEJvIW6o-8LdR0ivyYcEEKVI0TkkfqpGJ_ogiXyqJvCuC2n00L69eECrSnrz6W7hoYqJJPLQSok8OVze1phFMPHKvKQbdlaxtwAn2IlchEzxHArqmU8P1563569gQZTOHx00YnDrh_UylOB406iJdovdM_VTqLf1ng3Tc1Zfei6r2w5sHjYkzJdbeq7yXXhgfmJCRoqpXOg-xUjQbsxhT0TpQl1gMWG6EuDDOyGx2U8kU4Wtwiym04sr20kOAwditAYbTFd0ZgQNORIG5r0aBdozUcF2y4OU48YVUFMjqTR4sMRk2n8zo-r23P-3KcOd7HIEbg__MrpTgk7iHit7WYLS3B3) Thank you! **_ _
Gene Hamilton_ _
Executive Director, America First Legal _
